lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Excuse me. My name is Richard Stewart. I'm a photographer. May take a picture and your little boy?
lines.chinese: 对不起，我叫 Richard Stewart。 我是一位摄影师。 我可以为你和你的小男孩儿拍一张照片吗？

lines.speaker: Mrs.Vann
lines.english: What's it for?
lines.chinese: 做什么用？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: It's for a book.
lines.chinese: 是为一本书拍的。

lines.speaker: Mrs.Vann
lines.english: You're writing a book?
lines.chinese: 你在写一本书吗?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: It's a book of pictures. I call it Family Album, U.S.A.
lines.chinese: 这是一本摄影集。 我称之为“走遍美国”。

lines.speaker: Mrs.Vann
lines.english: Oh, that's a nice idea. Well, it's fine if you take our picture. I'm Martha Vann.
lines.chinese: 噢,这想法不错。 你想为我们拍照就请吧。 我叫 Martha Vann。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thank you. I appreciate your help. I'm Richard. What's your name?
lines.chinese: 谢谢。很感谢你的帮助。 我是 Richard，你叫什么？

lines.speaker: Gerald
lines.english: Gerald.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: How old are you, Gerald?
lines.chinese: 你今年多大？

lines.speaker: Gerald
lines.english: Five.
lines.chinese: 五岁。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: And where do you live?
lines.chinese: 你们住哪？

lines.speaker: Mrs.Vann
lines.english: We live in California.
lines.chinese: 我们住在加利福尼亚州  。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Well, welcome to New York. OK, just a second. I'm almost ready here.
lines.chinese: 噢，欢迎你们到纽约来。 好了，请稍等一下。 我快要准备好了。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Can I help you?
lines.chinese: 我能帮你忙吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh, please. Hold Gerald's hand, please. Great! Now point to the buildings. Terrific! Give Mommy a kiss, Gerald. Nice! Thank you, Gerald. And thank you, Mrs Vann.
lines.chinese: 噢，太好了。 请握住 Gerald 的手。很好！ 现在请指着那些建筑物。 好极了！ 亲一亲妈咪，很棒！ 谢谢你， Gerald。 谢谢，Vann太太。

lines.speaker: Mrs.Vann
lines.english: Oh, my pleasure. We'll be looking for your book.
lines.chinese: 噢，不客气。 我们一定去买你的书。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thank you. Good-bye. Bye, Gerald. Thanks again.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。再见。Gerald，再见。 再次感谢 。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Oh, you're welcome.
lines.chinese: 噢  ，请别客气。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Hey, let me take your picture!
lines.chinese: 嘿  ，让我给你拍一张照片。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Wonderful. Please.
lines.chinese: 好啊，请。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Are you from New York?
lines.chinese: 是从纽约来的吗？

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No, I'm from Greece. I'm an exchange student.
lines.chinese: 不是，我是从希腊来的。 我是一名交换学生。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: When did you come here?
lines.chinese: 是什么时候来这儿的？

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Three months ago.
lines.chinese: 三个月之前。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Your English is very good.
lines.chinese: 你的英语说得很好。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thanks. I studied English in school.
lines.chinese: 谢谢夸奖。 我是在学校里学的英语。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Would you like some coffee?
lines.chinese: 要不要来点咖啡？

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No, thank you. Tell me about your book.
lines.chinese: 不了，谢谢。 谈谈你的书吧。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh, it's not finished yet, but I have some of the pictures. Would you like to see them?
lines.chinese: 噢，它尚未完成。 但我手头有一些照片。 要不要看一看？

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Yes, I'd like that.
lines.chinese: 要啊，我想看一看。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Here they are. Family Album, U.S.A. It's an album of pictures of the United States：the cities, the special places, and the people. And these are pictures of people working：steelworkers, bankers, police, street vendors, ambulance drivers, doctors...Oh, this is my father. He's a doctor. This is my mother.
lines.chinese: 就在这。走遍美国。 是关于美国的： 一些城市、一些特别的地方以及人们的摄影选辑。 这是人们工作中的照片： 钢架工人、银行职员、  警察、 街头小贩、 救护车驾驶员、医生等等…… 噢，这是我父亲。他是一名医生  。 这是我母亲。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: What's her name?
lines.chinese: 她叫什么名字？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Ellen. My younger brother, Robbie. He goes to high school. This is my sister Susan. She works for a toy company. Here's my grandfather. He lives in Florida. And this is my wife Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 这是我弟弟 Robbie  。 他在上高中。 这是我妹妹 Susan  。 她在一家玩具公司工作  。 这是我祖父,  他住在在 Florida。 这是我太太 Marilyn 。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Oh, she's very pretty.
lines.chinese: 噢 ,她很漂亮。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thanks. And what about your family?
lines.chinese: 谢谢。那你的家庭呢?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: They're in Thessaloniki. That's a large city in northern Greece. But now I'm living in the Bronx.
lines.chinese: 他们住在 Thessaloniki  。 那是希腊北部的一个大城市。 但现在我住在 Bronx。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: With a Greek-American family?
lines.chinese: 跟希裔美国家庭住吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No. Hispanic.
lines.chinese: 不是,是西班牙语裔家庭。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh no! It's thirty. Will you excuse me? I have to meet my wife.
lines.chinese: 哎呀,已经五点半了。 我失陪了。 我得去接我太太。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: It was nice meeting you.
lines.chinese: 非常高兴遇见你。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: It was a pleasure meeting you, too. Thanks for your help. And good luck! I've got to go. By the way. I'm Richard. What's your name?
lines.chinese: 我也很高兴碰到你。 谢谢你的帮助。 祝你好运,我得走了。 噢,我忘了说,我叫 Richard。 你呢?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Alexandra.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Bye-bye, Alexandra. Thanks.
lines.chinese: 再见,Alexandra。谢谢。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Bye-bye. Richard! Richard! You left your bag.
lines.chinese: 再见,Richard  ！Ricchard！你掉了一个旅行袋！

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Excuse me, officer. Can you help me?
lines.chinese: 对不起,警官。 你能帮帮我吗?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.english: Sure.
lines.chinese: 当然可以。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Can you tell me how to get to Linden Street, in Riverdale?
lines.chinese: 你能告诉我 怎么去 Riverdale 的林登街?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.english: "Richard Stewart, 46 Linden Street, Riverdale, New York." You should take the number 1 subway.
lines.chinese: 林登街 46 号, 纽约” 应当搭 1 路地铁。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Is there a station near here?
lines.chinese: 附近有地铁站吗?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.english: Yes. The station's that way. You should take the number 1 train to Van Cortlandt Park.
lines.chinese: 有。地铁站在那边。 搭 1 路车 到Van Cortlandt公园下车。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Number 1 train to Van Cortlandt park. Thank you.
lines.chinese: 路车到 Van Cortlandt 公园。谢谢。

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.english: Anytime. Good luck. Remember, the number 1 train. The uptown platform.
lines.chinese: 不用谢。祝你好运。 记住,  搭1 路车。在北线月台。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.english: You're welcome.
lines.chinese: 不客气。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Is this pink too bright for me?
lines.chinese: 这粉红色对我是不是太过鲜艳了?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Mmm-hmm. It is a very bright pink. Try this. It's size eight.
lines.chinese: 是的,这种粉红色是鲜艳了点。 试试这一件,尺码是八号。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: But I wear size ten.
lines.chinese: 但我穿十号的衣服。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: How about green? It's size ten.
lines.chinese: 绿的怎么样?它是十号的。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Let me try it on.
lines.chinese: 让我试试看。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: I'm taking too much of your time.
lines.chinese: 我耽误了你很多时间。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It's six 0'clock. Where's my husband? I was expecting him here at five forty-five.
lines.chinese: 已经六点了。 我丈夫怎么还没来? 我们约好了五点四十五在这儿会面的。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Don't worry. The traffic is very heavy at this hour.
lines.chinese: 别担心。这个时间交通很忙。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I know. But we're going to be late for dinner.
lines.chinese: 我知道。但我们晚餐可要迟到了。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: I'll take this green sweater. I like the color on me, don't you?
lines.chinese: 我买这件绿色毛衣吧。 我觉得这种颜色较适合我,你说呢?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I think it looks terrific on you.
lines.chinese: 我觉得你穿上它好极了

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I'm sorry I'm so late. I had a really bad day.
lines.chinese: 对不起我迟到这么久。 今天真是糟透了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It's ten after six. We're late. Robbie's cooking tonight, and dinner's at six thirty.
lines.chinese: 现在是六点十分。我们晚了。 今晚 Robbie 做饭,晚餐六点半开始。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I know. I know. I'm really sorry. I left my bag of film on the ferry. I went back for it , but the ferry was gone. I lost a whole day's work.
lines.chinese: 我知道。我知道。我真的很抱歉。 我把装底片的旅行袋遗忘在渡船上。 等我回去找的时候,船已经开走了。 我浪费了一整天的工作成果。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'll call the Staten Island Ferry lost-and-found office.
lines.chinese: 我来打电话给 Staten Island渡轮失物招领处。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I didn't think of that. Thanks.
lines.chinese: 我倒没有想到这个法子。谢了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Hello, Yes. The number, please, of the Staten Island Ferry lost-and-found office. Five five five...zero eight zero eight. Thank you.
lines.chinese: 你好。 你好。我想问一下， 渡轮失物招领处的电话号码。 谢谢。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I really appreciate it, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 真的很感谢,Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Hello. Did anyone find a camera bag this afternoon, a small canvas bag, on the J. F. Kennedy Ferry? ...No? Maybe someone will find it. The name is Stewart, Richard Stewart. And the telephone number is five five five...three oh nine oh. Thank you.Sorry, Richard. They don't have it.
lines.chinese: 你好。 请问今天下午有人捡到一个照像机旅行袋， 一个小的粗帆布袋？ 是在J. F. Kennedy渡船上丢的。……没有吗? 也许会有人发现的。 失主是 Stewart ,Richard Stewart。 电话是 555...... 谢谢  。 对不起,Richard。他们那儿没有。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thanks, anyway. There was a girl on the ferry. Now maybe...
lines.chinese: 不管怎样,我都得谢谢你。 在渡船上有一个女孩。 也许现在……

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Tell me about it on the way home.
lines.chinese: 在回家的路上告诉我吧  。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: And give her a teaspoon of the medicine after every meal. Don't worry. She'll be fine. You're welcome. Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 每餐之后给她吃一茶匙的药。 不要担心,她会好的。 不用谢。再见。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: How are you?
lines.chinese: 你怎么样?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'm tired and hungry.
lines.chinese: 我累了,也饿了。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, Marilyn and Richard called. They'll be here soon, and then we'll eat.
lines.chinese: 好啦, Marilyn和 Richard 打电话来了。 他们马上就到。他们一到就开饭。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: All right. Is...is Susan coming?
lines.chinese: 好吧, Susan 来吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, she'll be here later. She has to work late tonight.
lines.chinese: 来,她会晚一点。 她今晚得工作得晚一些。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: And what's Robbie cooking for dinner?
lines.chinese: 为晚餐准备了什么?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: It's a surprise.
lines.chinese: 会给你一个惊喜。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I hope its pasta.
lines.chinese: 我希望是意大利通心粉。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Robbie, the dinner was terrific.
lines.chinese: 晚餐真是棒极了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, it was delicious.
lines.chinese: 对, 味道非常好。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What's for dessert?
lines.chinese: 有什么甜点呢?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Oh, I forgot dessert.
lines.chinese: 哦,我忘了甜点了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Robbie!

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Don't worry. We've got lots of ice cream.
lines.chinese: 别愁。 我们有很多冰淇淋。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh, I'd love some ice cream.
lines.chinese: 哦,我想吃冰淇淋。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, there's chocolate and coffee and a little vanilla.
lines.chinese: 好的,这儿有巧克力冰淇淋, 咖啡冰淇淋和一点香草的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll have vanilla. Is that all right with everyone?
lines.chinese: 我要香草的。 各位有意见吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'll have chocolate.
lines.chinese: 我要巧克力的。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Me, too.
lines.chinese: 我也是。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Uh, one scoop of coffee and one scoop of chocolate for me.
lines.chinese: 我要一勺咖啡的 和一勺巧克力的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Robbie, will you help me serve?
lines.chinese: 你能帮我端么?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I keep thinking about that bag of film. Eight rolls. a whole day's work. And good stuff,too.
lines.chinese: 我一直在想着旅行袋的事。一共有八卷 。 一整天的成果呀。 而且都很精采。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I'll get it. Hello.
lines.chinese: 我去开门。你好。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Hello. Does Richard Stewart live here?
lines.chinese: 你好。 住在这儿吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, he's my brother. I'm Robbie...Robbie Stewart.
lines.chinese: 是的，他是我哥哥。 我叫 Robbie...Robbie Stewart。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I'm Alexandra Pappas. How do you do? Your brother left his bag of film on the ferryboat. I found it.
lines.chinese: 我叫 Alexandra Pappas。 你好。 你哥哥将他的旅行袋遗忘在渡船上了。 我发现了它。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm really glad to see you. I mean...my brother'll be really glad to see you!
lines.chinese: 非常高兴见到你。 我的意思是......我哥哥见到你会非常高兴。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Robbie! Who is it?
lines.chinese: 是谁呀？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It's Richard's film! I mean, Alexandra Pappas. Come in, please.
lines.chinese: 的底片。 我是说 Alexandra Pappas。 请进。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Alexandra!

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Hello, Richard. I found your bag!
lines.chinese: 你好, Richard。  我捡到你的旅行袋。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh, thank you! Thank you! Um...Alexandra, let me introduce you. This is my wife Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 哦,谢谢,  谢谢! 噢……Alexandra,让我介绍一下。 这是我太太 Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Richard showed me your photo. How do you do ?
lines.chinese: 给我看了你的照片。 你好。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Oh yes. Richard told us all about you. It's nice to meet you.
lines.chinese: 哦。 跟我们谈起你。 很高兴见到你。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: And this is my mother, Ellen Stewart.
lines.chinese: 这是我妈妈,Ellen Stewart。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: How do you do?
lines.chinese: 你好。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: And my father, Dr.Philip Stewart.
lines.chinese: 这是我父亲,Philip Stewart 医生。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Nice to meet you, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 很高兴见到你, Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: And…ah…you met Robbie
lines.chinese: 还有……啊,你已经见过 Robbie  。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Yes. And you must be Susan. Hi.
lines.chinese: 是的。那你一定是 Susan 了,你好。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hi. Welcome.
lines.chinese: 嗨,欢迎。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I'm so glad you found the bag and took the time and trouble to return it.
lines.chinese: 我很高兴你发现了旅行袋 而且不怕麻烦,花时间将它送来。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Oh, it was no trouble. I just took the wrong train.
lines.chinese: 哦,没什么麻烦。 只是我坐错了车。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Would you like something to eat?
lines.chinese: 来吃点东西,  好吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thank you, no. I'm late for dinner at my house. I really have to go.
lines.chinese: 谢谢,  不用了。 我回家吃晚饭要迟到了。 我真的得走了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Would you like to call home?
lines.chinese: 你想跟家里通个电话吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I'd appreciate that.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你(让我使用电话)。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Please, use the phone.
lines.chinese: 请随便用。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thanks. Excuse me.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。失陪一下。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Alexandra's a high-school exchange student from Greece.
lines.chinese: 是从希腊来的交换高中生。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Where does she live?
lines.chinese: 她住在哪儿?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: With a family in the Bronx.
lines.chinese: 住在 Bronx区的一个家庭  。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Oh, that's not too far from here!
lines.chinese: 噢,那儿不是很远!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Take it easy, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 不要太紧张,Robbie。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thank you. I can only stay a few minutes.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。 我只能停留几分钟。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Have some iced tea.
lines.chinese: 喝点冰茶吧。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thanks, Mrs. Stewart.
lines.chinese: 谢谢, Stewart 太太  。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Please sit down, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 请坐 ,Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: So, you're an exchange student. Where do you go to school?
lines.chinese: 哦,你是一名交换学生。 在哪儿上学?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: At the Bronx High School of Science.
lines.chinese: 在Bronx 区的理科中学读书。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh, that's a very good school. What are your favorite subjects?
lines.chinese: 哦,那是个好学校。 喜欢哪些课程?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Biology and mathematics. Richard tells me you're a doctor.
lines.chinese: 生物学和数学。 告诉我您是医生。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes, a pediatrician. And what does your father do?
lines.chinese: 是的,小儿科医生。 令尊是做什么的?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: He's a lawyer, in Thessaloniki.
lines.chinese: 他是 Thessaloniki 的一名律师。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Would you like some pasta? I made it myself. It might be a little cold.
lines.chinese: 你想不想来点意大利通心粉？ 我自己做的。 可能有点凉了。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Thanks, no. I do have to go. It was nice meeting you all.
lines.chinese: 谢谢,不用了。我真的得走了。 很高兴见到你们一家。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Well, maybe you'll come for lunch some Sunday, so we can really thank you for bringing Richard's bag back.
lines.chinese: 既然如此,或许哪个星期天能来吃中饭。 让我们好好的感谢你 送回 Richard 的旅行袋。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Maybe.
lines.chinese: 再说。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You're welcome anytime.
lines.chinese: 欢迎你随时来玩。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Can I drive you home?
lines.chinese: 我开车送你回去好吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No, thanks. The train is just up the street. It won't take me long at all.
lines.chinese: 不用了,谢谢。 地铁就在街的那一头。 不需要花很长时间的。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Well, you really saved the day for me, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 你真的帮了我一个大忙,Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Bye-bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Good night.
lines.chinese: 晚安。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: She's a smart young lady, and very nice.
lines.chinese: 她是个聪明的年轻姑娘,而且很善良。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Very! Hey, she forgot her bag!
lines.chinese: 十分！  嘿,她忘了她的包！

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I guess we'll be seeing Alexandra again, Right, Robbie?
lines.chinese: 我想我们不久又将见到 Alexandra。 对吧,Robbie?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Excuse me. Can you help me?
lines.chinese: 对不起，你能帮我么？

lines.speaker: Vendor
lines.english: Sure, what do you want?
lines.chinese: 可以啊,什么事？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Where is 83 Wooster Street?
lines.chinese: 街 83 号在哪？

lines.speaker: Vendor
lines.english: That's easy. Walk to the comer. Then make a left turn. Then walk two blocks to the traffic light.Make another left to Wooster.
lines.chinese: 很好找。你走到拐角， 然后向左转， 接着走两条街到红绿灯， 再向左转就到了 Wooster街了。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Thank you. To the comer and then a left?
lines.chinese: 谢谢你。 走到拐角向左转，对吗？

lines.speaker: Vendor
lines.english: Yeah. A left. Hot dog? Only seventy-five cents.
lines.chinese: 是的，向左转。 要热狗吗？只要七十五美分。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: No. Thank you. I have a dinner date.
lines.chinese: 不，谢谢。我要去赴晚餐约会。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: 555-9470...and it's busy....Try again. 555-9470...and it's still busy. Excuse me ,ma'am.I'm looking for 83 Wooster Street.
lines.chinese: 占线…… 再试一次。 还是忙。 对不起，夫人。 我想找 Wooster街 83 号。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.english: Yes. Wooster Street is two blocks, and 83 is to the right about two houses.
lines.chinese: 噢，Wooster街是两条街区， 号是在右边，大约过两栋房子就到了。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Thank you, thank you!
lines.chinese: 谢谢，谢谢！

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.english: You're welcome.
lines.chinese: 不用谢。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Who is it?
lines.chinese: 谁呀？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Harry Bennett. Is this Susan?
lines.chinese: 是 Susan 吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, it is. Come up. I'm on the top floor.
lines.chinese: 是的，是我。请上来。 我在顶层。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Nice to meet you, Susan. Sorry I'm late. The traffic. The parking. I was lost.
lines.chinese: 很高兴见到你，Susan。 很抱歉我迟到了。 交通拥挤，又找不到停车的地方，而且我又迷路了！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What pretty flowers! Thank you. Oh, please come in. Don't worry about being late. It's fine. Excuse the mess. I just moved here. Oh, I'd like you to meet my sister-in- law Marilyn. Marilyn Stewart, this is Harry Bennett.
lines.chinese: 好漂亮的花!谢谢你。 噢，请进来。 别为迟到担心了，没有关系的。 请不要介意这儿乱得很，我刚刚搬来住。 噢，我来向你介绍我嫂子 Marilyn。 这是 Harry  Bennett。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Pleased to meet you.
lines.chinese: 很高兴见到你。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Nice to meet you, Harry.
lines.chinese: 我也很高兴见到你，Harry。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Are we too late for our dinner reservation?
lines.chinese: 我们会不会错过晚餐订位的时间？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: No,the restaurant will hold our table. I know the owner very well. I eat there a lot.
lines.chinese: 不会，餐厅会保留我们的席位。 我和老板很熟。 我在那儿吃过好多次。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Do you know the phone number of the restaurant? I'd like to call home and leave the number with the baby-sitter.
lines.chinese: 知道那家餐厅的电话号码么？ 我想打电话回家 把餐厅的电话告诉临时保姆。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Sure. The number is... five five five... seventeen twenty.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: May I use the Phone? Five five five...one seven two oh, Hello? Hi, Michelle. It's Daddy. Can I speak to Betty? I want to leave the phone number of the restaurant.... Hi, Betty. I'll be at five five five...seventeen twenty. OK. Thanks. See you later. Well, that's done. Shall we go ?
lines.chinese: 我可以用一下电话吗？ 喂? 嗨，Michelle。是爸爸。我能跟 Betty说话吗? 我要留餐厅的电话号码给她...... 好，Betty。我的电话号码是 555-1720。好，谢谢。再见。 好了，打完了。我们可以走了吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'm ready. See you later, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 我准备好了。Marilyn，再见。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Have a nice evening.
lines.chinese: 祝你们今晚愉快。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Bye, Marilyn. Hope to see you again.
lines.chinese: 再见，Marilyn。希望能再次见面。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Me, too. Have fun!
lines.chinese: 我也是。祝你们玩得愉快！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Thanks.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: After you.
lines.chinese: 请先走。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: Ah! Miss Stewart! Welcome! How are you?
lines.chinese: 嗨！Stewart 小姐！欢迎光临！ 最近好吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Five, Somsak.And you?
lines.chinese: 很好，Somsak，你呢？

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: Fine, thank you. Sumsak： This is my friend Harry Bennett.
lines.chinese: 很好，谢谢。这是我的朋友 Harry Bennett。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Pleased to meet you.
lines.chinese: 很高兴见到你。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: Very nice to meet you. Any friend of Miss Stewart's is welcome at Somsak's. Follow me, please.
lines.chinese: 很愉快见到你。 小姐的任何朋友，Somsak 餐厅都是很欢迎的。 请跟我来。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I like it here.
lines.chinese: 我喜欢这儿。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I do, too. I come here often.
lines.chinese: 我也是。我常来这儿  。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: A special place for special people.
lines.chinese: 这是为特殊人物而设的特别地方。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Thank you, Somsak.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你，Somsak。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Well! Nice restaurant.
lines.chinese: 嘿，这是一家好餐厅。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: Would you like something to drink?
lines.chinese: 你们要点什么饮料吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, I'd like a glass of ginger ale with ice. Harry, what would you like?
lines.chinese: 是的，我要一杯加冰块的姜味汽水。 你要什么？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Do you have a dry white wine?
lines.chinese: 你这儿有涩白酒吗？

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: How about a Califomia chabis?
lines.chinese: 来一杯California 白葡萄酒，好么？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Chablis is fine.
lines.chinese: 好的。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: What would you like to eat?
lines.chinese: 你们要吃点什么？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'd like the mee krob. Harry, would you like to see a menu?
lines.chinese: 我喜欢 mee krob。 你想看看菜谱么？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: No, it's OK. I"ll have the mee krob also. What is it?
lines.chinese: 不用，没有关系。 我也要 mee krob。 那是什么？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Crispy fried noodles. I love them.
lines.chinese: 酥炒面条。我喜欢吃。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: May I bring you a salad?
lines.chinese: 要不要给你来点色拉？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh yes. What do you recommend today?
lines.chinese: 噢，好啊。 今天你推荐什么色拉？

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: I recommend rose-petal salad. Special for new friends.
lines.chinese: 我向你们推荐玫瑰花瓣色拉。 特地为新朋友准备的。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Rose-petal salad?
lines.chinese: 玫瑰花瓣色拉好吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Why not?
lines.chinese: 有何不可？

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: I'll take care of everything.
lines.chinese: 我会好好照料一切。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I hope you're hungry.
lines.chinese: 我猜想你饿了。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: What? Oh, yes. Starving.Well, I...
lines.chinese: 什么？噢，是的。我很饿。好啦，我……

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Well, I...
lines.chinese: 好啦，我……

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: What do you do at Universe Toy Company?
lines.chinese: 你在宇宙玩具公司做什么工作？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'm the vice-president of new toy development.
lines.chinese: 我是负责新玩具开发的副总裁。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Terrific!
lines.chinese: 了不起！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I know you're a CPA.
lines.chinese: 我知道你是一位会计师。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: That's true. Harry Bennett, Certfied public accountant. I love numbers. I do some work for Smith and Dale, your company's accounting firm.
lines.chinese: 是的。Harry Bennet， 职业会计师。 我喜欢数字。 我为贵公司的会计顾问公司 Smith 和 Dale 事务所做一些工作  。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And so...
lines.chinese: 所以……

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Here we are.
lines.chinese: 所以我们才有缘相见。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是啊。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I have a daughter.
lines.chinese: 我有一个女儿。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I know. How old is she?
lines.chinese: 我知道。她多大了？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: She's nine years old.
lines.chinese: 她九岁。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: That's a nice age. What's her name?
lines.chinese: 正是美妙年龄。她什么名字？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Michelle.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Do you have a picture of her?
lines.chinese: 你有她的照片吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: She's very pretty.
lines.chinese: 她很漂亮。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢  。

lines.speaker: Somsak
lines.english: Rose-petal salad. And there's a phone call for you, Mr.Bennett.
lines.chinese: 玫瑰花瓣色拉。 先生，有你的电话。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I'll get the rest of the dinner. Excuse me.
lines.chinese: 我去把晚餐的其余东西端来。 失陪。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Please forgive me ,Susan, but...I have to leave. I feel terrible, but...
lines.chinese: 请原谅我，Susan，可是…… 我得走了。真是糟糕透了，但……

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What's the matter?
lines.chinese: 发生了什么事？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: My daughter isn't feeling well.
lines.chinese: 我女儿感到不舒服。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh no! Is it serious?
lines.chinese: 噢，糟糕。严重吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I don't know.The baby-sitter says she has a stomachache, and she's crying. I'll have to go home. Will you forgive me?
lines.chinese: 我不知道。临时保姆说她肚子痛， 并且她一直哭。 我必须回家一趟。你能原谅我吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Of course. I'm so sorry for Michelle. And you didn't have a chance to eat.
lines.chinese: 当然。我为 Michelle 担心。 可是你什么也没有吃。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Oh, it's OK. Let me take you home first.
lines.chinese: 噢，没关系。 先让我送你回家吧。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: No,no. Please, go ahead.
lines.chinese: 不用，不用。你放心走吧。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: It's our first date.
lines.chinese: 这可是我们的第一次约会。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: We'll make another. Please don't worry.
lines.chinese: 我们还可以再次约会的。 请别挂在心上。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I'll phone you.
lines.chinese: 我会给你打电话的。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I hope your daughter is all right. Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 我希望你女儿安然无恙。再见。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What happened?
lines.chinese: 怎么了？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: The baby-sitter called. His daughter is sick.
lines.chinese: 他临时保姆打电话来了。 说他女儿生病了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What's wrong?
lines.chinese: 什么病？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I think she has a stomachache. He's a good father.
lines.chinese: 我想她是肚子痛。 他是个好父亲。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: So...what do you think of him?
lines.chinese: 那么……你觉得他怎么样？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: He's very nice. But I think he was nervous tonight. It was his first date in two years.
lines.chinese: 他很不错。 但我猜想他今晚有点紧张。 这是他两年来第一次约会。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Will you see him again?
lines.chinese: 你会再见他吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I hope so.
lines.chinese: 我希望如此。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: This food is delicious.
lines.chinese: 这菜的味道不错。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: He didn't get a thing to eat.
lines.chinese: 他什么也没有吃。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: You ordered enough for three or four people, but I'm not complaining. The food delicious.
lines.chinese: 你叫了够三、四个人吃的， 但我不在意。 菜好吃极了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Who is that?
lines.chinese: 那是谁呀？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Do you think it's...
lines.chinese: 你想会是……

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: No. You won't believe it, Marilyn!
lines.chinese: 不会。  简直无法相信，Marilyn！

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I believe it. Even without looking.
lines.chinese: 我能相信。即使不看我也知道。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Hi!

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: How...?
lines.chinese: 你怎么……

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Your downstairs neighbor let me in.
lines.chinese: 你楼下的邻居让我进来的。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Did you go home?
lines.chinese: 你回家了吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I did, but everything is OK, so I decided to come back. To apologize for leaving so early, I brought you a little gift. It's a bonsai tree for your new apartment. Hi, Marilyn. I hope it's not too late.
lines.chinese: 回去了，但一切安好。 于是我决定回来。 为了表示对我提早离开的歉意，我给你带了一件小礼物。 这是一颗盆栽 给你的新公寓。 好，Marilyn。  我希望我来得不算太晚。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Oh, not at all. We're still eating.
lines.chinese: 噢，没关系。我们还在吃着呢。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Please, come in. Join us. It's our meal form the restaurant.And how is your daughter?
lines.chinese: 请进。跟我们一起吃吧。 这是从餐厅带回来的的菜。 对了，你女儿怎么样？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Oh, she's fine. It was only a tummy ache.
lines.chinese: 噢，她没事了。 仅仅是肚子有点痛。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It's good that you went back.
lines.chinese: 你回去是对的。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Yes, I think it's important for me to be there since her mother died.
lines.chinese: 是的，我想我在场是非常重要的 因为她妈妈去世了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I agree. Aren't you hungry?
lines.chinese: 我想是的。你饿了吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: As a matter of fact...I am hungry.
lines.chinese: 老实说……我饿了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: There's lots of food left.
lines.chinese: 这儿还剩下很多食物。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Mmm,this is delicious!
lines.chinese: 嗯，很好吃！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Enjoy!
lines.chinese: 那就享受吧！

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm going to excuse myself. I have a lot of work to do to get ready for tomorrow. Good night, Harry. It was nice meeting you.
lines.chinese: 很抱歉失陪。 我得为明天做许多准备工作。晚安，Harry，  很高兴与你见面。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Bye, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 再见，Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Good night, Susan.
lines.chinese: 晚安，Susan。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Good night, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 晚安，Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: She's going to a fashion show here in the city tomorrow.She is sleeping here so she won't have to travel from Riverdale in the morning.
lines.chinese: 她将参加明天在本市举行的时装表演。 她晚上住在这儿免得早上从 Riverdale赶过来。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: You two must be close.
lines.chinese: 你们两个关系一定很好。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: We are. The whole Stewart family is close.
lines.chinese: 是的。 全家相处都很好。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I like that.
lines.chinese: 我喜欢这样。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: And then, tww years ago, my wife died.
lines.chinese: 接着，两年前，我妻子去世了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: You miss her.
lines.chinese: 你思念她。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I do...yes, but I have Michelle...and with time...
lines.chinese: 不错……是的，但我还有 Michelle…… 而且随着时间流逝……

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Is there anyone else in your life?
lines.chinese: 在你生活中还有别的女人吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: No, not yet. What about you?
lines.chinese: 不，还没有。你呢？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh, I date occasionally, but my work keeps me busy.
lines.chinese: 哦，我偶尔约约会， 但我老是忙于工作。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Ooh, speaking of keeping busy-I have an early start tomorrow, and the baby-sitter has to get home. Where did the time go? It's midnight. Thank you, Susan.I had a nice evening.
lines.chinese: 哦，说到忙于工作--- 我明天还得早起， 而且临时保姆也该回家了。时间过得真快！ 都午夜了。 谢谢，Susan。 我度过了一个愉快的夜晚。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Me, too, Harry. Harry?
lines.chinese: 我也很愉快，Harry。 什么事？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Yes?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'd like to meet your daughter someday.
lines.chinese: 我希望有一天能见见你女儿。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Does that mean that I can see you again?
lines.chinese: 是不是说我可以再与你见面？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Of course.
lines.chinese: 当然。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Wonderful. I'll call you, and we'll go out to dinner.
lines.chinese: 那太好了。我会打电话给你， 然后我们到外面吃晚饭。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Please do.
lines.chinese: 好呀。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I promise I won't leave early.
lines.chinese: 我发誓我再也不会提早走了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It was for a good reason.
lines.chinese: 你今天早走是有原因的。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: You know something?
lines.chinese: 知道吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What?
lines.chinese: 什么？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I think we're going to be good friends. Good night, Susan.
lines.chinese: 我想我们可以成为好朋友的。 再见，Susan。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Good night, Harry. Have a safe trip home. Are you all right?
lines.chinese: 再见，Harry 路上小心点。 你怎么了？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Sorry.
lines.chinese: 对不起。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I never liked that umbrella stand. Good night, Harry.
lines.chinese: 我一直嫌那伞架碍事。 再见，Harry.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Marilyn, you want coffee or tea?
lines.chinese: 你是要咖啡还是茶？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Coffee, please.
lines.chinese: 请来点咖啡。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I am so excited! At this time tomorrow morning, Grandpa will be sitting in the kitchen with us.
lines.chinese: 我感到好兴奋！ 明早这时候， 爷爷就和我们一起坐在厨房里啦。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: When does he arrive?
lines.chinese: 他什么时候到？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: At six 0'clock this evening.
lines.chinese: 今晚六点。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: By plane?
lines.chinese: 坐飞机来？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: No, by train.
lines.chinese: 不，坐火车。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Are we picking him up at the station?
lines.chinese: 我们要去车站接他吗？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Not Grandpa. He doesn't want anybody picking him up. He likes to be independent.
lines.chinese: 那就不是我们爷爷啦。 他不愿意让别人接他。 他喜欢独立。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Huh.
lines.chinese: 哦。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, let's go upstairs and prepare Grandpa's room.
lines.chinese: 对，我们上楼去准备爷爷的房间。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Great! Let's do it!
lines.chinese: 好！我们去准备！

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Good morning, Mom.
lines.chinese: 早安，妈妈。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Morning.
lines.chinese: 早安。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, hi,fellas.
lines.chinese: 你们大家好。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Hello.
lines.chinese: 好。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Hi,honey.
lines.chinese: 嗨，亲爱的。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Hi, honey.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Morning, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 早安，Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: We're going upstairs to set up Grandpa's room. There's coffee ready.
lines.chinese: 我们要上楼去收拾一下爷爷的房间。 咖啡准备好了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm really excited about seeing Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 一想到要见到爷爷我就感到兴奋。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Me, too. Milk, please.
lines.chinese: 我也一样。请给我牛奶。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: He's so funny. He always makes me laugh. I hope Grandpa's going to like living with us.
lines.chinese: 他很有趣。 他总是让我发笑。 我希望爷爷喜欢和我们住在一起。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I think he will. It just takes time to fell comfortable in a new place.
lines.chinese: 我想会的。 总是需要一段时间才能适应一个新的环境。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Won't he miss being in Florida?
lines.chinese: 他不会想念佛罗里达吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Will, he will. But I think he'll like being here with the family.
lines.chinese: 他会的。 但我想他也会乐意和全家人住在这儿。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Are you sure about that? It's crazy here most of the time.
lines.chinese: 你能肯定吗？ 这儿经常吵吵闹闹的。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: But it's fun.
lines.chinese: 但很有趣。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's for sure.
lines.chinese: 说的也是。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: You know, maybe I'll put together some photos of Grandpa as a "welcome" present.
lines.chinese: 我说， 或许我会把爷爷的一些照片集中起来 作为欢迎他的一份礼物。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's a neat idea. What can I do ? I've got it! I have a picture of Grandpa and Dad and me in my wallet. It's from the Fathers and Son's Breakfast at my junior high school graduation.
lines.chinese: 这是个好主意。 那么我能做点什么呢？ 有啦！ 我皮夹里有一照片是爷爷、爸爸和我在一起照的。那是在父子早餐上拍的 在我初中毕业的时候。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh, I remember this picture.
lines.chinese: 噢，我还记得那张照片。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'd really lik to pick up Grandpa at the railroad station.
lines.chinese: 我真想去火车站接爷爷。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Railroad stations or airports-Grandpa always tells us he'll get here by himself.
lines.chinese: 无论是火车站还是机场-- 爷爷总是说他能独自来这。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: He's something!
lines.chinese: 他真了不起！

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Is this all Grandpa's stuff?
lines.chinese: 这里面都是爷爷的东西吗？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: That's it. But I'm sure he has a few bags with him on the train.
lines.chinese: 是的。 不过我相信他在火车上还有几件行李的。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What's inside?
lines.chinese: 这里面是什么？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I don't know. It's locked.
lines.chinese: 不知道。锁着的。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, hi, darling.
lines.chinese: 哦，亲爱的。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Morning, Philip.
lines.chinese: 早安，Philip。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I want to put some of my good hangers in Grandpa's closet. You know I'm very exceted about his arrival.
lines.chinese: 我想在爷爷的衣橱放几个好的衣架。 知道我对他的到来是多么高兴。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: We are, too.Susan called early this morning. She's unhappy and can't leave till tonight. She wants to be here for Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 我们也很兴奋。 一大早就打电话来。 她很不高兴她原希望在家等候爷爷。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, Grandpa will be disappointed, too. He loves Susan.She always reminds him of Grandma. Well,how's everything here?
lines.chinese: 爷爷也会感到失望的。 他喜欢 Susan。 总是让他想起奶奶。唔，东西都收拾好了吗？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Fine.We were just wondering about this trunk.
lines.chinese: 好啦。我们正猜测这只大衣箱呢。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: It's locked.
lines.chinese: 它锁着。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh. I have the key. Grandpa sent it to me.
lines.chinese: 啊，钥匙在这。爷爷寄来给我的。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Excuse me .Is this seat taken?
lines.chinese: 对不起，请问这个座位有人吗？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: No, it's not taken.
lines.chinese: 没，没人坐。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Oh, thank you.
lines.chinese: 啊，谢谢。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, let me help you with this.
lines.chinese: 来，我帮你放。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Oh, thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Do you want to sit by the window?
lines.chinese: 想靠窗坐吗？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: No, no,no. I like the aisle seat better. Please, you sit by the window.
lines.chinese: 不，不，不。我喜欢坐在靠过道的地方。 你请靠窗坐。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: My name is Stewart...Malcolm Stewart.Pleased to meet you.
lines.chinese: 我姓 Stewart……Malcolm Stewart。 很高兴遇见你。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: I'm Elsa Tobin. How do you do?
lines.chinese: 我叫 Elsa Tobin，你好。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Do you live in New York?
lines.chinese: 你住在纽约吗？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: No,no.I'm from Florida.
lines.chinese: 不，我是从佛罗里达来的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I am, too. But didn't you just get on?
lines.chinese: 我也是。可是，你不是刚上车的吗？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: No,no.I just chaged my seat. A man next to me was smoking, and smoke really brothers me .Where are yuo from in Florida?
lines.chinese: 不，不。我仅仅换了一下座位。 我旁边的那位男的吸烟， 烟味我受不了。你从佛罗里达什么地方来？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Titusville.It's near Orlando.
lines.chinese: 就在 Orlando 附近。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Small world. I'm form Titusville,too.
lines.chinese: 世界真小。我也是从 Titusville 来的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Really? What part?
lines.chinese: 真的么？什么地方？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: My husband and I live near Spaceport.
lines.chinese: 我和我丈夫住在 Spaceport附近。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I know that area. My house is only a few miles from Spaceport. Do you still live there?
lines.chinese: 我知道那地方。 我的家离 Spaceport只有几里路。 你还住在那儿？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Oh yes, yes.My husband's there now. He couldn't take time off to come to New York with me. Do you still live there?
lines.chinese: 哦，对，对。我丈夫现在就在那儿。 他走不开，没时间和我一起来纽约。你现在还住那儿？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: No.I sold the house and the furniture, put a few personal things in an old trunk, and shipped it to my children in NewYork. That's my desination.
lines.chinese: 不。我把房子家俱都卖了， 剩下一些个人东西放进一个旧衣箱，运到我孩子那儿去了，他们住在纽约。 那是我的目的地。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Are you married?
lines.chinese: 你有家室吗？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: My wife died four years ago.She was a wonderful woman. A real friend.
lines.chinese: 我妻子四年前去世了。 她是个很好的女人。一个真正的朋友。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: I'm sorry.Really, I'm sorry.
lines.chinese: 对不起，真的，我感到难过。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Lots of wonderful memories. We were married almost fifty years.Well, forty-seven, to be exact.
lines.chinese: 许多美好的回忆。 我们结婚将近五十年。 准确的说，是四十七年。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: John and I celebrate our fortieth anniversary next month.
lines.chinese: 下个月，John 和我将庆祝我们的结婚四十周年纪念日。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, congratulation! That's nice. What does John do?
lines.chinese: 啊，恭喜你们！太好了。 现在做什么工作？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: He's an aerospace engineer and works for Orlando Aircraft Corporation.He started with them almost forty years ago. What do you do?
lines.chinese: 他是航空工程师 为奥兰多飞机制造公司工作。 他在那儿做了近四十年了。你现在做什么？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I just retired. Had my own company. A construction company. Roads, bridges, big stuff. But I just sold it and retired.
lines.chinese: 我刚退休。我有自己的公司， 一家建筑公司。道路、桥梁，都是大工程。我前不久把它卖了，接着退休了。

lines.speaker: Conductor
lines.english: Excuse me, ma'am. Ticket,please.
lines.chinese: 对不起，太太。车票请拿出来看一下。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Would you kindly hold these keys, please? I have a ticket, I know. I was in the smoking section.
lines.chinese: 请帮我拿一下这些钥匙，可以吗？ 我知道，我有车票。 我原本坐在吸烟的位子。

lines.speaker: Conductor
lines.english: It's OK, lady. Take your time.
lines.chinese: 没关系，太太。慢慢来。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I'm sure it's in your purse, Mrs.Tobin.
lines.chinese: 我肯定是在您的皮包里，Tobin 太太。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Oh,here it is.
lines.chinese: 哦，在这儿。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: And here are your keys.
lines.chinese: 你的钥匙。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Do you have family in New York?
lines.chinese: 你在纽约有亲戚吗？

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: No, no.But do have very close friends in New York City. We like to go to the theater togther. You said you have family in New York.
lines.chinese: 没有。但我在纽约有非常要好的朋友。 我们常一起去戏院。你说你在纽约有家人。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Yes,indeed. A son and his wife and their three children-my grandchildren.
lines.chinese: 对，没错。 有个儿子、儿媳妇以及他们的三个孩子-- 我的孙儿女们。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: You must be excited.
lines.chinese: 您一定很兴奋。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I can't wait, to see them!
lines.chinese: 我恨不得马上见到他们！

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Are you going to live with them?
lines.chinese: 您打算和他们一起住吗？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 对。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Permanently?
lines.chinese: 一直住下去？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well...they want me to, but it's too early to know for sure.I'm pretty independent. I tried to teach my kids the importance of independence, but I'm not sure I want to be alone. Some people don't mind being alone.I do.
lines.chinese: 这……他们希望这样。 但我现在还不能确定。 我是独立惯了的人。我总是告诫孩子们独立的重要性， 但我不知道我是否想一个人生活。 有些人不在乎独自生活，我在乎。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: I understand. But tell me. Why did you stop working?
lines.chinese: 我能理解。但你能告诉我， 你为什么要退休？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I retired because... I wanted to be with my family. I didn't want to be alone anymore!
lines.chinese: 我退休是因为……我想和全家人在一起。 我不想再一个人独自生活了！

lines.speaker: Voice
lines.english: Ladies and gentiemen, Amtrak is happy to announce our arrival in New York City. The train will be stopping in five Minutes. Please check to be sure you have your belonings. And have a good stay in the Big Apple. Thankyou.
lines.chinese: 各位女士、先生， 我很高兴的宣布：Amtrak 火车就要到达纽约了。火车将在五分种后靠站。 请记得带上您的行李。 祝您在纽约过得愉快。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Well, here we are .It was so nice meeting you, Mr.Stewart.
lines.chinese: 好了，终于到了。 很高兴遇见你，Stewart先生。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: And nice meeting you,too.Mrs.Tobin. Please look us up. We're in the phone book. Dr.Philip Stewart, in Riverdale.
lines.chinese: 我也很高兴遇见你，Tobin 太太。 请跟我们联络。 我们家的电话可以在电话簿上查到。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: Your son?
lines.chinese: 你的儿子？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That's right. And have a good time in New York.
lines.chinese: 对。祝你在纽约玩得愉快。

lines.speaker: Elsa
lines.english: And don't be so independent. You're very lucky to have a caring family.
lines.chinese: 不要再坚持独住了。 你很幸运，有一个温馨的家庭。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: When can we go fishing?
lines.chinese: 我们什么时候可以去钓鱼？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Robbie, we'll go fishing soon, and we'll take your dad with us.
lines.chinese: 我们很快就去。 带你爸爸也一起去。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'm ready, Grandpa.You name the day.
lines.chinese: 我准备好啦，爷爷。哪一天随你挑吧。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: That's a great idea, Grandpa! Philip needs a day off. Robbie Good idea.
lines.chinese: 好主意，爷爷！ 需要休一天假。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Presents-for me?
lines.chinese: 礼物，给我的？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Form me and Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 和我送的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And this one's form me .I looked all over the house to find it.
lines.chinese: 这张是我送的。 我找遍了整个房间才找到它。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Richard, these are terrific pictures. This one really brings back memories. You remember that day, Robbie?
lines.chinese: 这些照片真棒。 这一张的确唤起了许多回忆。 你还记得那天么，Robbie？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I sure do. It was fun.
lines.chinese: 当然。那时真有趣。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, I'm sorry Susan isn't here. I miss her very much.
lines.chinese: 哦，可惜Susan 不在。 我非常想她。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: She feels bad, too, Grandpa. She called to say the plane was delayed. You know airports.
lines.chinese: 她也很沮丧，爷爷。 她打电话回来，告诉我们飞机晚点。 机场的情况你是知道的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I can't wait to see her. She looks just like Grandma at that age. I'd better unpack.I started traveling twenty-four hours ago. I'm not so young anymore.
lines.chinese: 我等不及见她了。 她和她奶奶年青时长得一模一样。 我还是先把行李打开吧。从出门到现在已经二十四小时了。 我不再那样年青了。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Don't you want something to eat?
lines.chinese: 您想吃点什么？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: No, thanks.After a good night's sleep, I'll enjoy breakfast even more.
lines.chinese: 不用了，谢谢。 好好睡一觉，明天的早餐会更香。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, come on, Dad. Ellen and I'll take you to your room.
lines.chinese: 好，来吧，爸爸。 和我带你去你房间。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm sure glad you're here, Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 您来这儿我真高兴，爷爷。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Good night, Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 晚安，爷爷。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Pleasant dreams.
lines.chinese: 祝你做个好梦。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Philip, do you have the key to the trunk?
lines.chinese: 衣箱的钥匙在你那吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I have the key, but it doesn't work.
lines.chinese: 我有钥匙，但打不开箱子。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I sent the wrong key. I have something for you. I made it my self. I think you'll enjy it .I researched it for over a year.It's our family tree.
lines.chinese: 我寄错了钥匙。 我有件东西给你，是我亲手做的。 我想你们会喜欢的。我研究了一年多。 这是我们的家谱。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, Grandpa! How exciting!
lines.chinese: 啊，爷爷！真让人兴奋！

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Fabulous! Why, I didn't know that your grandfather was born in Germany.
lines.chinese: 真是令人难以置信！ 你看，我竟然不知道您的爷爷出生在德国。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Lots of interesting information about ur family.A gift from me.
lines.chinese: 里面有很多有趣的关于我们家的事情呢。 这是我的一件礼物。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Thank you so much.
lines.chinese: 太感谢你了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Grandpa! Grandpa! Oh, Grandpa, I'm so happy to see you!
lines.chinese: 爷爷！爷爷！ 啊，爷爷！见到您我真的很高兴！

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, you look so beautiful, Susan. My granddaughter. Like I always said, you look just like Grandma.
lines.chinese: 哦，你看起来真漂亮。Susan，我的好孙女。 就像我常说的，你长得特像你奶奶。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I think you're going to be very happy here with us.
lines.chinese: 我想你和我们住在一起会很快乐的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I know you will.
lines.chinese: 我想你会的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I don't feel alone anymore.
lines.chinese: 我再也不觉得孤单了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm exhausted. My new exercise class is so hard.
lines.chinese: 我太累了。我那里的健身班太难了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Your new exercise class?
lines.chinese: 你的新健身班？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Yeah. My new advanced exercise class.
lines.chinese: 对。新的高级健身班。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Why advanced?
lines.chinese: 为什么是高级？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: My instructor thought that the beginner's class was too easy for me.
lines.chinese: 我的老师认为 初级课程对我来说太容易了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Too easy for you?
lines.chinese: 对你太容易了？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Don't laugh. In the beginner's class, they give you a chance to rest between exercises.
lines.chinese: 别笑。在初级健身班 你有机会休息。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: So?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: The advanced class is nonstop.
lines.chinese: 高级课程班是没有休息的。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I lift weights every morning for sixty minutes without stopping. No problem.
lines.chinese: 每天早晨我举重六十分钟 中间还不是没有休息。 小事一桩。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Listen, Richard, doing aerobics for an hour is a lot different than lifting weights.
lines.chinese: 听着，Richard， 一小时的有氧运动可与举重大不相同。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Yeah.Quite a bit different.I think aerobics. I could work out in your class with no problem.
lines.chinese: 是啊。相当不一样。 我觉得有氧运动很容易。 如果我去你的班上做运动一定不会觉得有问题。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: You think so?
lines.chinese: 你这样认为？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Oh, without a duobt. When's the next class?
lines.chinese: 哦，毫无问题。 下一次上课什么时候？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Tomorrow morning at ten 0'clock. Try it.
lines.chinese: 明早上午十点。试一试吧。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Tomorrow morning after lifting weights, I'll try aerobics. It's a snap. Tomorrow morning at ten 0'clock.
lines.chinese: 明早举完重， 我去试试有氧运动。 简单得很。明早十点。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Aren't you going to the aetobics class this morning?
lines.chinese: 今天上午你不去上有氧运动课吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Of course. Easy. No sweat.
lines.chinese: 当然。小事情。  绝无问题。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: You are not going to be able to move afer this and the aerobics class.
lines.chinese: 你会动都动不了 在你做完这个又去上有氧运动课之后。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Are you kidding me? It's going to be a piece of cake. You want to bet.
lines.chinese: 你在取笑我？ 这种事不费吹灰之力。 想打赌吗？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Yeah. What's the bet?
lines.chinese: 好啊。赌什么？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I bet I can go one hour in your class this morning and not feel a thing!
lines.chinese: 我打赌我今天在你的健身班运动一小时之后 丝毫不累！

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: The bet is-I win, and you cook dinner for the entire family. Or you win, and I cook dinner for the entire family.
lines.chinese: 这样赌好了： 要是你赢了，我替全家做晚餐。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: It's a bet.
lines.chinese: 一言为定。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: OK. Call my instructor, Jack Davis, right now. His number is 555-8842.The advanced class starts at ten 0'clock advanced class starts at ten o'clcok.
lines.chinese: 好，给我的教练 Jack Davis打个电话，现在就打。 他的电话是 5555-8842。 高级健身课十点钟开始。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Well, it's eight twenty now.
lines.chinese: 现在是八点二十了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It onl takes eight minutes by bicycle to the aerobics class. Give him a call.
lines.chinese: 骑自行车去上有氧运动课只需要八分钟。 打个电话给他。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Davis Aerobics Centrer for Good Health.
lines.chinese: 有氧运动健身中心。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Jack Davis, please.
lines.chinese: 请找 Jack Davis。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: This is Jack Davis.
lines.chinese: 我就是Jack Davis。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Hello. This is Richard Stewart. My wife, Marilyn Stewart, is a member of your program. I'd like to come to the ten o'clock advanced class this morning.
lines.chinese: 你好，我是 Richard Stewart。 我太太 Marily Stewart 是你的学生。 我想来上十点的高级健身班。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Oh, fine,fine.Be here a few minutes early.You need to complete some forms before the class.
lines.chinese: 哦，好，好。要早几分钟到这。 上课之前你得填一些表格。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thanks. I'm on my way over.
lines.chinese: 谢谢，我马上就来。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Bye-bye. It's all set. I'm going.
lines.chinese: 再见。都安排好了。我现在就去。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: See you later.
lines.chinese: 待会见。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Good luck.
lines.chinese: 祝你好运。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Don't forget about the bet. Dinner for the entire family. And that includes Susan.
lines.chinese: 别忘了打赌的事。 给全家做晚餐。 包括 Susan 的。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Don't you forget.
lines.chinese: 你自己别忘了。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: OK, Richard. That's terrific. Your pressure is 120 over 75, and that's fine. Now stand up,please. Good, it's 122 over 80. You can sit down now. When was your last complete physical?
lines.chinese: 很好，Richard。  真不错。 你的收缩压是 120，舒张压 75。挺好的。 现在请站起来。好，收缩压 122，舒张压 80。 现在你可以坐下了。 上一次全身检查是什么时候？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Six months ago.
lines.chinese: 六个月以前。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Good.Do you have any back or knee problems?
lines.chinese: 好。你的背部及膝关节有什么毛病吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Nope. I am in perfect health.
lines.chinese: 没有。我身体好的很。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: What do you do for a living, Mr.Stewart?
lines.chinese: 你是做哪一行的，Stewart 先生？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I'm a photographer.
lines.chinese: 我是摄影师。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Interesting. What do you photograph?
lines.chinese: 很有意思。你拍什么样的照片呢？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Everything. The American scene. People, places, events.
lines.chinese: 什么都拍。美国风光。人物、地方、事件。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Did you ever think of photographing an aerobics class?
lines.chinese: 你想过拍摄有氧运动课吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: No...I can't remember taking pictures of people exercising.
lines.chinese: 没有……我记不起拍过人们练健身操的照片。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: But don't you think it'd be a goo subject?
lines.chinese: 你不觉得这是个好题材吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Sure.
lines.chinese: 当然是。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: I need some good photos for my advertising, Mr.Stewart Maybe you can photograph a class, and I can give you and Mrs.Stewart a month of classes-free.
lines.chinese: 我做广告需要一些好照片，Stewart先生。 也许你来拍一节上课的情形，那我让你和你太太 免费上一个月。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: When can I photograph a class?
lines.chinese: 我何时拍？

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Anytime.
lines.chinese: 什么时候都行。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: How about today?
lines.chinese: 今天怎么样？

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Terrific!
lines.chinese: 太好了！

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Instructor
lines.english: Oh, hi.
lines.chinese: 噢，嗨。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Are we ready to go?
lines.chinese: 我们可以开始吗？

lines.speaker: Instructor
lines.english: Yeah. Yeah. Let's get in our lines. We're going to take it slow first. Stretch up...and we're going to go left first...2,3,4...now stretch...OK,hold to the right. Sunrises.Stretch it out. Flat back.Bring it up...and twists...and side...2,3...and left...push...push...turn...hit the floor. Take it side again...OK, and switch. Stretch it out .And we're going to warm down with a tango.Left, Right. Enjoy it.
lines.chinese: 是，是。让我们排好位置。 开头我们要做得慢一点。 伸展……先向左  ……现在左右交替… 好，在右边停住。 双手捧日。尽量舒展。平背拉回。身体打直……摆动……侧身……2，3  …… 向左……推……推……转身……触地板。再侧身……好，左右交替。尽量伸展。 我们用探戈来舒缓。 左，右。继续。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Richard, did you go to the Davis Aerobics calss today?
lines.chinese: 今天你去上 Davis 的有氧运动健身课了？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Yes, I went to the aerobics class today.
lines.chinese: 去了，  我上有氧运动课了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What is wrong with you?
lines.chinese: 你怎么啦？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Nothing. I am in excellent health. I have ideal blood pressure. A perfect heart.In other words, I'm in wondeful condition.
lines.chinese: 没什么。我身体好的很。 我血压很正常，心脏也很好。总之，我身体很棒。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Richard, did you go to the aerobics class, really?
lines.chinese: 你真的上了有氧运动课？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: And your legs don't hurt?
lines.chinese: 你的腿痛不痛？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Hurt? What do you mean?
lines.chinese: 痛，什么意思？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What about your arms? Lift your arms up like this. And they don't hurt-not even a little?
lines.chinese: 你胳膊怎么样??手抬起来，像这样。 一点也不痛？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Nope.
lines.chinese: 不。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: You are in great condition. I can't believe it!
lines.chinese: 你的身体太好了，我简直不敢相信。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Grandpa, Ellen, Philip, Robbie, you and me .That's six steaks.
lines.chinese: 爷爷、Ellen、Philip、Robbie，你和我。 六份牛排。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Don't forget Susan.
lines.chinese: 别忘了Susan。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Seven steaks.Cooking dinner for the entire family is not so easy. The shopping：the salad：tomatoes,lettuce, cucumbers, and onions. The main course：steak and potatoes. Richard, how much broccoli do I need for seven people?
lines.chinese: 七份牛排。 给全家人做饭真不是件容易的事。 购物单：色拉：蕃茄、莴苣、黄瓜、洋葱。 主菜：牛排和马铃薯。七个人吃需要多少花椰？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Marilyn, I have to tell you something. At today's exercise class...
lines.chinese: 我得告诉你一件事。 今天上健身课的时候……

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Yes, Richard.
lines.chinese: 说吧，Richard。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Well, I didn't really exercise.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我没有真的上健身课。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I knew it!
lines.chinese: 我想也是！

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I wanted to, but Jack Davis needed a photographer. I'm sorry, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 我真的想参加，但 Jack Davis 要我拍照。 对不起，Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I don't understand. Did you exercise or not?
lines.chinese: 我搞不懂你到底作了健身操没有？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: No.Instead of exercising, I photographed the class.
lines.chinese: 没有，我给他们拍照而没有锻练。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: And you didn't exercise?
lines.chinese: 你没有参加健身操？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: No.

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: There's another advanced class today at four 0'clock. We'll go together.
lines.chinese: 没有。 今天下午四点钟还有一次高级班。 我们一起去。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: What about the bet?
lines.chinese: 那打赌的事呢？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Oh, the bet is still on, but you shop for the groceries.Remember, you win, and I cook dinner for the entire family.
lines.chinese: 打赌仍然有效，但你去买菜。 记得吗，你要是赢了，我给全家做饭。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: You win, and I cook dinner for the entire family.
lines.chinese: 你赢了，我给全家做饭。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Including Susan. Four 0'clock at the advanced exercise class. With me.
lines.chinese: 包括 Susan 的。 四点钟去高级健身班，跟我一起。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Don't forget to breathe.
lines.chinese: 别忘了呼吸。

lines.speaker: Instructor
lines.english: Skip, hop, front, Twist...again...OK,Now...scissors.
lines.chinese: 跳，蹦，向前。 扭腰……再来…好，现在……张腿合腿。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: This is fun.It's a piece of cake.
lines.chinese: 有意思，毫不费力。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Yeah.Just wait. Instuctor： 5, 6, 7, go right, 1, 2, back, 3, 1, 2, 3, pony, pony...1, 2, 3, kick...1, 2, 3, kick...pony.And twist, twist.
lines.chinese: 哦。等着瞧吧。向右， 1，2，  向后， 小马步，小马步 …… 踢  ……1，2，3，踢……小马步。扭摆，扭摆。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: OK. Let's pick up the pace.
lines.chinese: 好。把节奏加快一些。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: How are you doing, Richard?
lines.chinese: 现在怎么样，Richard？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I can barely move.
lines.chinese: 我简直动不了。

lines.speaker: Instructor
lines.english: 2,3,4,front.Now we're going to run it off. Front...knees up, knees up.
lines.chinese: 前踢。现在我们来快跑。 前踢，膝盖抬起，抬起。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: OK, Finish off by jogging in place. OK. Keep those knees up. All right.That's it for today. Thank you, everyone. See you next week.
lines.chinese: 好，结束之前原地慢跑。 好，膝盖抬高。 行了。今天就这些。谢谢大家。下星期见。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thank you, Jack, but no thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你，Jack，但不该谢你。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: The advanced exercise class is not so easy, huh?
lines.chinese: 高级健身班不是那么容易吧，对不对？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Come on, Richard.Get up. Let's go, you have to cook dinner for the entire family.
lines.chinese: 好啦，Richard。起来。走吧。 你今晚得替全家做饭。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Marilyn, I'm exhausted. I can't move.
lines.chinese: 我太累了。简直动不了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Oh, you'll do it. It's a piece of cake.
lines.chinese: 噢，你办得到。这不费吹灰之力。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Excuse me, Richard,Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 打扰一下，Richard Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: You are a terrific instructor, Jack.
lines.chinese: 你真是个了不起的教练，Jack。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: Thanks. But I have a question. Is this your very first advanced aerobics class?
lines.chinese: 谢谢。但我想问一个问题。 这是你第一节有氧运动高级班吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Yes,it is.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.english: You are in great shape, Richard. Very few people last in this class for the full hour the very first time.
lines.chinese: 你的身体状况好极了，Richard。 很少人能够 第一次撑完满一小时的课。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It's true. You are in Great shape.
lines.chinese: 这是真的。你身体很好。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Thanks!
lines.chinese: 谢谢！

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I think we'll cook dinner together.
lines.chinese: 我想我们还是一起做晚饭了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi, Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 嗨,爷爷。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Hi, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 嗨,Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Can I help?
lines.chinese: 要我帮忙吗?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Yes, indeed. Hand me two eggs from the refrigerator, and I'll make you two fried eggs.
lines.chinese: 对,正需要。 替我从冰箱里拿两个鸡蛋来。 我给你煎两个蛋。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: How about some bacon?
lines.chinese: 来点熏猪肉怎么样?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I made enough for an army. You going to the baseball game today? It's a perfect day for it-a little cloudy but nice and warm.
lines.chinese: 我煎了一大堆。 你今天要去看棒球赛? 今天是看球赛的好天,有点云,但舒适暖和。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Dad and I were planning to go to the game, but he has to work today, and my friends don't wan to go. It's not an important game, anyway.
lines.chinese: 爸爸本来要和我一起去看比赛的, 但他今天工作忙, 我的朋友们又不想去。话说回来,这场比赛不重要。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Do you have any other plans for the day?
lines.chinese: 那么你今天有别的计划吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll work on my computer. I have a new math program, and I want to learn how to use it.
lines.chinese: 我要练电脑。 我有一个新的数学软件,我想学习怎样用。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Maybe you can teach me how to work on a computer someday.
lines.chinese: 改天你教教我 如何使用电脑吧。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Anytime.It's really easy, but, like anything, you need to work at it, Grandpa.This bacon is great. I love crispy bacon.
lines.chinese: 没问题。实在很容易,但是,和其它东西一样, 你得常常练它,爷爷。 肉做得太好了。我喜欢脆的肉。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, what are you doing tomorrow?
lines.chinese: 噢,明天你打算干吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Nothing much.
lines.chinese: 没什么要紧的事。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well,maybe your dad and I could take you fishing with us.
lines.chinese: 嗯,也许你爸爸和我可以带你去钓鱼。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'd like that, but...
lines.chinese: 我很想去,但是……

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: But what?
lines.chinese: 但是什么?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: But Dad is always so busy.
lines.chinese: 但是爸爸总是那么忙。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well,can you come fishing with me tomorrow?
lines.chinese: 那么,你明天能和我去钓鱼吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Sure,I can.
lines.chinese: 当然,我可以。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Robbie says you can't take him to the game today.
lines.chinese: 说你今天不能带他去看比赛。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I really feel bad about it, but they need me at the hospital today, in the children's ward.
lines.chinese: 我真过意不去。 但今天医院有事, 在小儿科病房那边。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I understand.
lines.chinese: 我可以理解。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Maybe we can spend some time together next weekend.
lines.chinese: 也许下个周末我们可以一起玩。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Definitely.We should. You and Robbie and me. Remember our first fishing trip?
lines.chinese: 没问题。 我们应该如此。 你,Robbie 和我。 还记得我们第一次一起钓鱼吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I sure do...Well, I've got to run, Dad. See you later.
lines.chinese: 我当然记得…… 嗯,我得赶紧走了,爸爸。 再见。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Going fishing?
lines.chinese: 要去钓鱼?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I'm thinking about it...So,how's work?
lines.chinese: 我正在考虑中…… 工作还顺利吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh,the usual problems.
lines.chinese: 还不是那些老问题。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: You're working pretty hard these days.
lines.chinese: 你这阵子工作得很辛苦呀。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I guess I am.
lines.chinese: 我想是吧。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: When did you last go fishing with Robbie?
lines.chinese: 你上一次和 Robbie 一起去钓鱼是什么时候啦?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I remember exactly. It was on his birthday, June second,two years ago. We didn't catch anything.
lines.chinese: 我记得很清楚。 是在他生日那天。两年前的六月二日。 我们什么也没有钓着。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Remember our fishing trips?
lines.chinese: 还记得我们以前外出钓鱼的事么?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes.I loved them.
lines.chinese: 记得。我好喜欢哟。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Remember catching your first fish?
lines.chinese: 还记得你第一次钓到鱼?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: How can I forget? I fell out of the boat! we had some good times together.
lines.chinese: 怎么忘得了? 我摔到船外去了! 我们度过许多美好时光。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Yes,we did. Maybe we should do it again.
lines.chinese: 确实如此。 也许我们该再来一次。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: How about tomorrow?
lines.chinese: 明天怎么样?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Don't you have to work?
lines.chinese: 你明天不用上班吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: My paper work will wait.
lines.chinese: 文书工作可以缓缓的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, Robbie will be thrilled. I am, too, Son.
lines.chinese: 啊,Robbie会高兴得不得了。 我也很高兴,儿子。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I want to spend more time with Robbie.
lines.chinese: 我想多花点时间和 Robbie 在一起。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Tomorrow.It'll be like old times for you and me. And Robbie will love it. 《
lines.chinese: 明天。 你我过去的美好时光会重现。 会喜欢的。第 10 页走遍美国》英文文本教材.txt

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, what's the weather going to be like?
lines.chinese: 那么,明天的天气怎样?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Radio says sunny and mild.
lines.chinese: 广播说是晴天,  温和适中。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, I'll tell Robbie. And thanks, Dad.
lines.chinese: 好,我告诉 Robbie。 谢谢你,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Don't thank me . I'm just being a grandfather.
lines.chinese: 别谢我。 我只是在尽一个爷爷的本份而已。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: This is really neat! When do we eat?
lines.chinese: 太好了！ 我们什么时候吃?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: First, we have to catch some fish. In order to catch fish, you have to do this. Here we go. that's it. Then drop it into the water. All of this comes before eating. OK?
lines.chinese: 首先,我们得钓几条鱼。 要钓鱼你就得这样。 现在可以开始了。 就这样。然后把它扔到水。 这些都是在吃之前得做的事,知道吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: How do you know so much about fishing?
lines.chinese: 你对钓鱼怎么知道那么多?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Grandpa taught me. We spent a lot of time fishing together. Now, the important thing is to get the book close to the fish. All right? Like this.
lines.chinese: 爷爷教我的。 我们以前常常一起钓鱼。 现在,重要的是让鱼钩靠近鱼。知道吗? 像这样。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I think I see some fish right under us, Dad.
lines.chinese: 爸爸,我想我看见一些鱼就在我们下方的水里。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh, not a chance!
lines.chinese: 啊,不可能。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I just saw a big one!
lines.chinese: 我刚才看见一条大鱼!

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Hi, there!
lines.chinese: 你好!

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: What's your name?
lines.chinese: 你叫什么名字?

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: Albert.

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Are you all alone?
lines.chinese: 就你一个人吗?

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: Yes,sir.
lines.chinese: 是的,先生。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: How old are you , Albert?
lines.chinese: 几岁啦,Albert?

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: I'm ten.
lines.chinese: 十岁。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Where's your father?
lines.chinese: 你爸爸在哪?

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: He's up there at the lodge.
lines.chinese: 他在那边小屋里。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Does he know you're here?
lines.chinese: 他知道你在这儿吗？

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: Yes, sir.
lines.chinese: 是的,先生。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: OK, Robbie, maybe you should watch him. The water's pretty deep here.
lines.chinese: 也许你得看着他点。 这儿水相当深。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll watch him, Dad.
lines.chinese: 我会注意他的,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: What time is it?
lines.chinese: 什么时间啦?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's almost lunchtime, and no fish yet.
lines.chinese: 差不多到午餐时间了,还没钓到鱼。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I can go up to the lodge for some hot dogs and drinks.
lines.chinese: 我可以到那边小屋去弄些热狗和饮料来。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: No way! We're here to catch our lunch.
lines.chinese: 不行! 我们要在这儿钓我们的午餐。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: To catch fish, you need the right magic.
lines.chinese: 要钓到鱼,你得有正确的魔法。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: That's right. I forgot! The right magic. Do it for Robbie,Dad.
lines.chinese: 对了。 我忘记这招! 正确的魔法。 爸爸,给 Robbie示范。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: You remember?
lines.chinese: 你还记得吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Sure. Come on.
lines.chinese: 当然记得。你来吧。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well,first, you have to turn your hat around like this. Then you close your eyes and say the magic words. Fish, fish, send me a fish.
lines.chinese: 首先,你得把你的帽子转一下,像这样。 然后,闭上眼睛念魔语。鱼,鱼,给我一条鱼。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Fish, fish, send me a fish...I got one!
lines.chinese: 鱼,鱼,给我一条鱼……我钓到了!

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: See, it works!
lines.chinese: 瞧,真有效!

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It's a big one!
lines.chinese: 真大哟!

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, it always worked for me, too.
lines.chinese: 嗯,这办法对我也是屡试不爽。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Grandpa, get the net ,please!
lines.chinese: 爷爷,请把网子拿来!

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Dad, you got one, too!
lines.chinese: 爸爸,你也钓到一条!

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You bet I have!
lines.chinese: 我当然钓到了！

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Easy, Philip, easy.
lines.chinese: 慢慢来,Philip,慢慢来。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Sorry,Dad.
lines.chinese: 抱歉,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, one more and I've got a pair of boots.
lines.chinese: 嗯,再钓一只我就有一双靴子了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You didn't say the magic words.
lines.chinese: 你没有念魔语。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Robbie's right.
lines.chinese: 说对了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes,but you did, and we've got our lunch. Let's build a fire and cook it ! Come on ,Albert, you can help us!
lines.chinese: 没错,如果你念了,  我们就有了午餐。 咱们去升火烧鱼！ 走,Albert,你来帮我们!

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: I want to stay here and fish.
lines.chinese: 我想呆在这儿钓鱼。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: All right, but be careful.
lines.chinese: 好吧,但你得小心。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Is it finished yet?
lines.chinese: 行了吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I think so. I hope you like,your fish well done.
lines.chinese: 我想行了。 我想你们喜欢烧得不错的鱼。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Burned, you mean.
lines.chinese: 你的意思是烤熟的。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hey, I'm a doctor, not a chef.
lines.chinese: 嘿,我是个医生,不是厨师。

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: Help! Help! I can't swim.
lines.chinese: 救命!救命!我不会游泳!

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Dad! Grandpa! He fell in.
lines.chinese: 爸爸!爷爷!他掉到水里去了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Easy does it ,Robbie.That a boy. That's it.
lines.chinese: 慢慢来,Robbie。 对了。 就这样。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: He's not breathing, Philip!
lines.chinese: 他停止呼吸了,Philip。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Robbie, run to the car.Bring a blanket and my medical bag.
lines.chinese: 去车上! 拿一条毯子和我的医疗箱来。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes,Dad.
lines.chinese: 好的,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Now, come on, son. Come on, son.
lines.chinese: 醒醒,孩子。醒醒,孩子。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Breathe,Albert!
lines.chinese: 呼吸呀,Albert!

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Here's the bag. Will he be OK, Dad?
lines.chinese: 箱子拿来了。 他会没事吗,爸爸?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I hope so. That's it. That's the way. That's it. There. Oh, it's going to be all right. That's it. Wrap him in the blanket. Dad! That's it. That's it. It's all right, Albert. You're going to be OK.
lines.chinese: 希望没事。 对啦。 就这样。 很好,啊。 不会有问题了。 对了。用毯子把他裹好,爸爸! 对了,就这样。 不要紧了,Albert。 你不会有问题了。

lines.speaker: Albert
lines.english: I want my daddy! 《
lines.chinese: 我要我爸爸!第 11 页走遍美国》英文文本教材.txt

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: We'll take you to him. Easy now. Easy does it. That's it.
lines.chinese: 我们会送你去他那儿。 放轻松,不要紧,没事了。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Your dad is quite a guy.
lines.chinese: 你爸爸真不赖。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know, Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 我知道,爷爷。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: How is he ,Philip?
lines.chinese: 他怎样了,Philip?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: He's asleep. He's ging to be fine.
lines.chinese: 他睡了。 他不会有事了。

lines.speaker: Father
lines.english: How can I thank all of you?
lines.chinese: 我该如何感谢你们?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Thank my son Robbie. He pulled him out of the water.
lines.chinese: 谢我儿子 Robbie 吧。 是他把你孩子从水里拉上来的。

lines.speaker: Father
lines.english: I'm very grateful, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 非常感谢你, Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Dad saved him, not me.
lines.chinese: 是爸爸救了他,不是我。

lines.speaker: Father
lines.english: I'm so thankful to all of you.
lines.chinese: 非常感谢你们。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: So long.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: He's a lucky boy.Well, what do you say we get back to our fishing?
lines.chinese: 他是个幸运的孩子。 你们说,我们继续钓鱼怎么样?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: That's great idea. Uh-oh. It's probably the hospital. I have to get to a phone. It probably means we can't stay.
lines.chinese: 好主意。 哎哟,可能是医院。 我得去找个电话。 看来我们可能不能呆了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's OK.
lines.chinese: 没有关系。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: One of my patients has a hight fever, and I have to go to the hospital. I'm sorry, Robbie. I guess I ruined your day.
lines.chinese: 我的一位病人发高烧， 我得赶去医院。 对不起,Robbie。我想我今天扫了你的兴了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You didn't ruin my day, Dad. I understand. I really do.
lines.chinese: 你没有扫我的兴,爸爸。 我能理解,真的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Why are you back so early?
lines.chinese: 你们怎么这么早回来?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Philip had to go back to the hospital.
lines.chinese: 必须要回医院。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: He had an emergency.
lines.chinese: 他有紧急事情。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, that's too bad, Robbie. Did it spoil your fun?
lines.chinese: 啊,那太遗憾了,Robbie。 会不会让你扫兴?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: No, Mom. We had a great time.
lines.chinese: 不，妈妈。我们玩得很高兴。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, did you do any fishing?
lines.chinese: 你们钓鱼了吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yeah, we caught lots of them. Look! They had a special on frozen fish down at the supermarket.
lines.chinese: 当然,我们钓到好多鱼。看! 超级市场冷冻鱼特价。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, you really had a bad day.
lines.chinese: 哦,你们今天真没意思。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: We had a good day. Robbie pulled a boy out of the water.
lines.chinese: 我们今天玩得很开心。 从水中救出一个孩子。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And Dad saved his life. He's a terrific doctor,Mom.
lines.chinese: 爸爸救了他的命。 爸爸是个了不起的医生,妈妈。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I know.
lines.chinese: 我知道。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hi, Pop. Hi, Son.
lines.chinese: 你好,爸爸。你好,儿子。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hello,Dad.
lines.chinese: 你好,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
