lines.english: What a day!
lines.chinese: 今天好忙!

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: How about a cup of coffee ,Son?
lines.chinese: 来杯咖啡怎么样,儿子?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'd love a cup of coffee..
lines.chinese: 我是想来杯咖啡。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: How was the patient?
lines.chinese: 病人怎么样了?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: She'll be fine.
lines.chinese: 她会好的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Was it serious?
lines.chinese: 病得很重吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: No.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Until today, I was never really interested in medicine.
lines.chinese: 直到今天,我才对医学真正感兴趣。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, it's hard work.
lines.chinese: 嗯,这种工作很辛苦。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Now I know.
lines.chinese: 我现在知道了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I had a good time today, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 我今天玩得很开心,Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Me,too.
lines.chinese: 我也一样。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Can we? When?
lines.chinese: 行吗?什么时候?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: How about next Saturday?
lines.chinese: 下周六如何?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Won't you be busy?
lines.chinese: 你不是有事吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'm changing my schedule. Well, do we have a date?
lines.chinese: 我准备把工作时间改一下。 哦,我们算是约定了吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: We sure do, Dad. Grandpa, can you come?
lines.chinese: 当然,爸爸。 爷爷,你能去吗?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I have other plans, Robbie. But I think you two can have a good time together without me.
lines.chinese: 我另有安排,Robbie。 但我觉得我不去你们也会玩得很开心。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: No, Dad, and certainly not without the right magic.
lines.chinese: 不,爸爸，没有正确的魔法绝对不行。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: OK, Philip. This is your third cup of coffee. We should get to work, or we won't be finished by dinnertime.
lines.chinese: 好啦,Philip。这是你的第三杯咖啡了。 我们得开始做事了, 要不然晚餐时间到了我们还没做完。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I guess we must.
lines.chinese: 我想我们是该开始了。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: We must.
lines.chinese: 我们是该开始了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: OK.The beginning of my famous Thanksgiving apple pie.One apple. Two apples. Three apples. Four apples
lines.chinese: 好。开始做我最拿手的感恩节苹果派。 一个苹果。两个苹果。三个苹果。四个苹果。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Come on, Philip! Get busy with your famous apple pie. There's much mre to be done.
lines.chinese: 快点,Philip！ 快做你拿手的苹果派吧。 要做的事太多了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Now, the ingredients.
lines.chinese: 现在,看看配料。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What goes into my apple pie besides apples? Ah, yes. Flour, sugar, butter.Butter, nice and cold and hard. OK, here are the walnuts. Last but not least, the reason my apple pie is famous-cinnamon. Cinnamon...Ellen, where's the cinnamon?
lines.chinese: 除了苹果以外,我的苹果派还要放什么? 哦，对了。  粉,糖,黄油。 黄油,新鲜且又冷又硬。嗯,核桃在这。 最后但同等重要的, 我的苹果派就是靠它出名的---桂皮粉。桂皮粉…… 桂皮粉放在哪儿?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: If there is any cinnamon,it's in the cabinet with the salt and pipper.
lines.chinese: 要是有的话, 应该跟盐和胡椒粉一起放在橱柜。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Salt, pepper, dill weed, garlic powder,cinnamon. Ellen?
lines.chinese: 盐,胡椒粉,莳萝,大蒜粉,桂皮粉,Ellen?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes,Philip.
lines.chinese: 什么事,Philip?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Is it possible that we forgot to buy cinnamon?
lines.chinese: 是不是我们忘了买桂皮粉?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes,it is possible that we forgot to buy cinnamon. Philip Well, how can I make my famous apple pie without cinnamon?
lines.chinese: 是的,我们可能忘了买桂皮粉。这下好啦,没有桂皮粉我那道著名的苹果派怎么做?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Good morning.
lines.chinese: 早安。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, hi, Robbie.Good morning.
lines.chinese: 哦,Robbie,早安。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Good morning. Robbie. Can you do me a favor?
lines.chinese: 早安,Robbie。 你能帮我个忙吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Sure, Dad.What?
lines.chinese: 当然,爸爸。干什么?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Remember my apple pie on Thanksgiving? What do you love about it?
lines.chinese: 记得在感恩节我做的苹果派? 你最喜欢中间的什么?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: The apples?
lines.chinese: 苹果吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: No. The sssss...
lines.chinese: 不。是 sssss……

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Cinnamon!
lines.chinese: 桂皮粉。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Right.We don't have any cinnamon.
lines.chinese: 对。我们没有桂皮粉了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll go down to Henry's grocery. He's always open. I'll get some for you. Plilip： That's my boy!
lines.chinese: 我到亨利杂货店去买。那儿总是开门营业。 我去替你买一些。好儿子!

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, put your heavy jacket on, Robbie. It's cold outside.
lines.chinese: 把你的厚夹克穿上,Robbie。 外面很冷。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Alexandra might call. Tell her I'll call her right back.
lines.chinese: 可能会来电话。 告诉她我会马上给她回电话的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Thanks, Son.
lines.chinese: 好。 谢谢你,孩子。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Uh, why does he always have to slam the door?
lines.chinese: 唉,为什么他老是砰一声地关上门。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Hello...Hello,Alexandra.How are you?... Fine. Robbie just went to the store.He'll be back sonn. He said he'll call you... Oh, oh, I see... Oh... certainly.Well, do you have the phone number there?...Oh... I see...Please, I know he wants to talk to you...Thank you, and happy Thanksgiving to you and your family, too. Try to come by later for dessert... Bye.That was Alexandra. She and the Molinas are going to spend Thanksgiving with their cousins.She doesn't have the phone number.
lines.chinese: 好……Alexandra。你好吗？……很好。 刚去商店。 他很快就回来。他说了他要给你打电话。 嗯,嗯,  我知道了。……嗯……一定。 那么,有那儿的电话号码吗?啊……我明白……我知道他很想跟你说话…… 谢谢, 祝你和你的全家感恩节愉快。晚会尽量到这儿来吃甜点……再见。 是 Alexandra 打来的。 她和Molina 一家准备与亲戚一起过感恩节。 她不知道那儿的电话号码。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh, Robbie will be disappointed.
lines.chinese: 哦,Robbie 会很失望的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: He'll be grouchy. Maybe she'll call back. She promised.
lines.chinese: 他会发牢骚的。 也许她会打电话回来。她说了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Here's your cinnamon, Pop. It was a dollar and sixty cents.You forgot to ask me for the change.
lines.chinese: 这是你要的桂皮粉,爸爸。 花了一元六角。 你忘了问我要找回零钱。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Or did you forget to give it to me?
lines.chinese: 或许是你忘了给我?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Thanks, Son.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你,儿子。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Alexandra called.
lines.chinese: 来电话了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll call her back.
lines.chinese: 我给她回电话。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: She said she'll call you later. She's not at home.
lines.chinese: 她说她等会儿给你电话。 她现在不在家。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You should have your breakfast, Son. Make you feel better. Protein, vitamins.
lines.chinese: 你应该吃早点,孩子。 这样才会让你觉得舒服些。 蛋白质,维他命。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: She said she'll call back?
lines.chinese: 她说过她会回电话?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes, she did.
lines.chinese: 是的,她说了。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Good morning, everyone! Happy Turkey Day? What's wrong?
lines.chinese: 各位早安! 火鸡节快乐! 怎么啦?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Nothing. Absolutely nothing.
lines.chinese: 没有啊。什么事也没有。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: What's gotten into him?
lines.chinese: 他怎么搞的?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: He missed a phone call.
lines.chinese: 他没接到一个电话。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: From...?
lines.chinese: 打来的人是……?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 对,Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's nice to see young love... Oh, to be young again! Where's the coffee?
lines.chinese: 真高兴看见年轻人相爱……啊,能再恢复年轻多好! 咖啡在哪?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I love parades. The Thanksgiving Day parade is always such great fun. Look at that Superman balloon! Wowee! Just floating along high above Central Park West.Don't you just love it? Oh, and the bands and the music. John Philip Sousa. I love his music. Da dadas da da dada da da da da da dada. Oh,look at that float, Robbie.Look at those funny-looking clowns.
lines.chinese: 我爱看游行。 感恩节的游行总是如此有趣。 你看那个超人气球！ 啊哈！高高飘浮在中央公园西路上空前。 你能不喜欢吗? 哦,还有那乐队和音乐。 的曲子。 我喜欢他的作品。 哒  哒哒  哒  哒   哒哒 哒  哒  哒  哒  哒  哒  哒哒。 噢,你看那花车,Robbie。 你看那些滑稽的小丑。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It's for kids.
lines.chinese: 这是给小孩看的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Maybe so, but parades always make me feel like a kid.Remember when you and your dad and I went to the Thanksgiving Day parade? You were Four or five years old ,I think.
lines.chinese: 也许是,但这些游行总是让我觉得像小孩子。 还记得你,你爸爸和我 去参加感恩节游行的事吗? 当时你才四五岁,我想。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hello, hello... Oh,hi, Susan. How are you?... Here's Mom.
lines.chinese: 喂，喂……啊，嗨，Susan。 你好吗?……妈妈就来了。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Hello, Susan. Yes, I know, but he'll get over it . Good. Then you'll be here about five? Oh, fine. I look forward to seeing you and Harry and Michelle. Drive carefully. Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 是的,我知道。他过一会就好了。 很好。那么大约在五点左右来? 嗯,很好。 我很想见 Harry 和 Michelle。 开车时小心。 再见。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Taste Ellen's turkey dressing. It's delicious.
lines.chinese: 尝尝 Ellen 的火鸡填料。 味道好极了。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I'm not surprised. It's Grandma's recipe.
lines.chinese: 我一点也不觉得奇怪。 这是奶奶的配方。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It's my favorite part of the meal.
lines.chinese: 这是全餐中我最爱吃的部份。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What about my famous apple pie?
lines.chinese: 我那著名的苹果派怎么样?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Dad,your apple pie is my favorite dessert.
lines.chinese: 爸爸,你做的苹果派是我最爱吃的甜点。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: How's the parade?
lines.chinese: 游行怎么样?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Mom! Is it for me?
lines.chinese: 妈妈!是我的吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: No, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 不,Robbie。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Who was it?
lines.chinese: 谁来的电话?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Wrong number. Philip, would you join me in the kitchen, please? It's getting late. We have vegetables to prepare.
lines.chinese: 打错号码。 请你跟我来厨房帮忙,好吗? 时间不早了。我们还得准备蔬菜。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Can I help with anything?
lines.chinese: 我能帮什么忙吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: No, honey. You just relax with Grandpa.I'll get you to help serve later.
lines.chinese: 不用,亲爱的。 你只要轻轻松松陪爷爷就行了。 等一会我会叫你帮忙端菜。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Ellen reminds me so much of Grandma.
lines.chinese: 真让我想起你奶奶。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What time does the Michigan football game come on?
lines.chinese: 足球赛何时开始?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Four.
lines.chinese: 四点钟。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Philip!

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'll be back to see the game.
lines.chinese: 我到时候来看比赛。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Grandpa,when did Dad graduate from Michigan?
lines.chinese: 爷爷,爸爸是什么时候从 Michigan 毕业的?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Let me think. He graduated from medical school in 1960 and from the University of Michigan in 1956.
lines.chinese: 让我想想。 他在一九六零年从医学院毕业 一九五六年从 Michigan 大学毕业。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: did you go to Michigan, too,Grandpa?
lines.chinese: 你也是 Michigan 大学的吗,爷爷?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Yup. I graduated in 1937.
lines.chinese: 是的。我是一九三七年毕业的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I've got to start thinking about college soon.
lines.chinese: 我很快也得开始考虑大学的事了。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: OK, everybody. I want to welcome Harry and his daughter Michelle to Thanksgiving with us.
lines.chinese: 好啦,各位。 我想对 Harry和他女儿 Michelle 来参加我们的感恩节晚餐表示欢迎。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Thank you, Dr.Stewart.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你,Stewart大夫。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Call me Philip.
lines.chinese: 叫我 Philip。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: But first, I think we should take a moment and remember the meaning of Thanksgiving.
lines.chinese: 好的。 不过首先,我想我们应该用一两分钟 来追忆一下感恩节的意义。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Philip, I took Michelle to a school play about the first Thanksgiving.
lines.chinese: 我带Michelle 看过学校演出的 第一次感恩节历史剧。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, why don't you tell us about that, Michelle?
lines.chinese: 那好,能否给我们讲一讲, Michelle?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Thanksgiving was about the Pilgrims, the first settlers in America. They shared the first harvest with the Indians and gave thanks.
lines.chinese: 感恩节是关于清教徒的, 他们是第一批来美国定居的移民。 他们与印第安人分享首次收获 和感恩。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: All right. Then in that spirit let each of us give thanks. Each in his own way.Who wants to begin?
lines.chinese: 很正确。 现在本着同样心意让我们开始感恩。 每个人用自己的方式来表达。 谁先开始?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I will. I give thanks for being here with my family and for being well, so I can enjoy you all.
lines.chinese: 我来。 我感谢能在这里和家人同住而且很健康, 让我享受到你们大家的温馨。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: All right! We love you, Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 太好了! 我们爱你,爷爷。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'd like to give thanks for a healthy year, a good job, and for meeting Harry and Michelle.
lines.chinese: 我感谢这一年来身体健康,工作顺利, 并且认识了 Harry和 Michelle。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: We'd like to give thanks for meeting Susan and the Stewart family.
lines.chinese: 我们要感谢认识了 Susan 和Stewart 一家人。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I love you, Daddy.
lines.chinese: 我爱你,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Thanks, Harry. That was very kind of you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你,Harry。 你真好。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'd like to give thanks for Grandpa coming to live with us. And I'd also like to thank my math teacher for giving me a passing grade. And call me , Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 我感谢爷爷到这儿和我们一起生活。 我还要感谢我的数学老师 给我及格分数。 还有,打电话给我，Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh,Robbie!
lines.chinese: 啊,Robbie!

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: She'll call.
lines.chinese: 她会打的。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: You go first, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 你先讲,Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm thinking. You go first.
lines.chinese: 我还在想。 你先来。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Well, you all know I'm working on my photo album.It's not finished yet. And I'd like to thank Marilyn for being so patient.
lines.chinese: 好吧,你们都知道我正在进行我的写真集。 现在还没有完成。 我要感谢 Marilyn没有不耐烦。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Thanks, Richard. I should thank you for encouraging me to keep working on my fashion designs I'm lucky to have a husband with an artistic eye.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你,Richard。 我应该感谢你一直鼓励我 继续我的服装设计工作。 我很庆幸,我丈夫具有艺术的眼光。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, we have a lot to be thankful for. For the food on this table. Just like th Pilgrims.
lines.chinese: 啊,我们有很多需要感谢的事情。 感谢这桌上的丰盛食物。 就像早年清教徒那样。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'll go along with that, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 我也有同感,Ellen。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, help me serve, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 好,帮我分菜,Robbie。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: It was a wonderful meal, Mrs. Stewart. Thank you.
lines.chinese: 真是一顿精美的晚餐,Stewart 太太。 谢谢  。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: And now to see the end of the football game.
lines.chinese: 现在去看看足球赛的最后一段。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Exactly.
lines.chinese: 正合我意。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Where are you going, Philip?
lines.chinese: 你上哪去,Philip?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Remember, the Michigan football game? And Michigan needs a touchdown.
lines.chinese: 记得吗,Michigan 足球赛? 队需要得分。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Did you forget something?
lines.chinese: 你是否忘了什么东西?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Dad, your famous apple pie.
lines.chinese: 爸爸,你最著名的苹果派。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Just let me see the score, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 让我去看看比分,Ellen。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Go ahead, Philip.We should all take a little break before dessert.
lines.chinese: 去吧,Philip。 吃甜点之前我们大家应该稍微休息一下。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, who could that be? Oh, it must be Alexandra. I invited her to come by for dessert.
lines.chinese: 啊,这会是谁呢? 一定是 Alexandra。 我邀请她来吃甜点。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You did?
lines.chinese: 请了她?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I like Ellen.
lines.chinese: 我喜欢 Ellen。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You know everyone, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 你认识每一位吧, Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: No, she doesn't know Harry Bennett and his daughter Michelle.
lines.chinese: 不,她不认识 Harry Bennett 和他女儿 Michelle。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Nice to meet you.
lines.chinese: 幸会。

lines.speaker: Harry&Michelle
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Marilyn&Michelle
lines.english: Hello,Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 你好,Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Hi, Marilyn.Hi, Susa... Happy Thanksgiving.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Marilyn。 嗨，Susan。 感恩节快乐。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: And Alexandra brought us a pumpkin pie.
lines.chinese: 给我们带来了一个南瓜派。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Please sit down, Alexandra. Dad, Richard-Alexandra's here.
lines.chinese: 请坐,Alexandra。 爸爸,Richard Alexandra 来了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Michigan needs a touchdown. Three minutes to play. Hi, Alexandra. Welcome.
lines.chinese: 队需要一次底线得分。 还剩三分钟。 嗨,Alexandra。欢迎。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hello, Alexandra, Yes, Michigan needs a touchdown. One tiny little touchdown, with just three minutes to play. Alexanda： You want Michigan to win.
lines.chinese: 你好,Alexandra。 是啊,Michigan 队需要一次底线得分。 一次小小的底线得分,只剩下三分钟了。你希望 Michigan 队赢球。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: How'd you guess?
lines.chinese: 你怎么晓得?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: What happened?
lines.chinese: 怎么啦?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: We forgot to trun the over on .
lines.chinese: 我们忘了开烤箱开关。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: We did? Philip, why don't you go watch the last three minutes of the game.I will serve coffee and pumpkin pie.
lines.chinese: 我们忘了吗? 你何不去 看完那最后三分钟的球赛。 我来准备咖啡和南瓜派。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: OK. I'll be back in a few minutes.
lines.chinese: 好,过几分钟我就回来。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Robbie,would you bring the dessert plates. And, Marilyn, would you pour coffee, please.
lines.chinese: 你把甜点盘子拿来。 请你倒一杯咖啡。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Sure, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 当然,Ellen。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: How was your Thanksgiving dinner, Alexandra?
lines.chinese: 你的感恩节晚餐怎么样,Alexandra?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Just wouderful, Mr. Stewart. The Molinas are a large family. I love being with them.
lines.chinese: 好极了,Stewart 医生。 家是一个大家族。 我喜欢和他们在一起。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm glad you came by , Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 我很高兴你来,Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I am, too.
lines.chinese: 我也一样。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Touchdown! Touchdown! Touchdown!
lines.chinese: 底线得分！底线得分！底线得分！

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Great Thanksgiving. Lots to be thankful for. Michigan scored a touchdown. Alexandra came by . And nobody misses Philip's famous apple pie.
lines.chinese: 美好的感恩节。 要感谢的事很多。 队底线得分。 来了。 并且没人会想到 Philip 著名的苹果派。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, Grandpa!
lines.chinese: 啊,爷爷!

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Robbie, this new Walkman is absolutely wonderful.
lines.chinese: 这个新的随身听真棒。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Richard and Marilyn bought it for me for my birthday.
lines.chinese: 这是 Richard 和 Marilyn送给我的生日礼物。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: They're so thoughtful. You are very lucky, Robbie, To have such a nice family.
lines.chinese: 他们考虑真周到。 你真幸运,拥有一个这样温馨的家。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Is something wrong, Alexandra?
lines.chinese: 怎么了?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No, nothing.
lines.chinese: 没有,没什么。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, there is. I can tell. What's the matter? Come on, you can tell me .What's up?
lines.chinese: 有,你有心事。 我能觉察到。 到底发生了什么事? 说吧,告诉我。 有什么事?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I don't know. Something's wrong.
lines.chinese: 我也说不上来。 有点不对劲。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: OK, let's talk.
lines.chinese: 好吧,我们就来谈谈。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I received a letter from my partents this morning.
lines.chinese: 今天早上我收到父母的信。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Did they write some bad news?
lines.chinese: 他们写了什么坏消息?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, then why are you so sad?
lines.chinese: 那,你为什么如此悲伤?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I miss them. I miss them very much.
lines.chinese: 我想念他们。 我非常想他们。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm sorry. Alexandra. But I understand.
lines.chinese: 我为你难过,Alexandra。 但是我能理解。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: The Mollnas treat me so nicely, and I love being with you family so much... but when I received the letter with photographs of my family, I cried. I cried because I miss them all.
lines.chinese: 一家人对我很好, 我也很喜欢和你们一家在一起…… 但是当我收到那封信 连同家人照片时,我哭了。 我哭因为我想念他们。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You really miss your family, don't you?
lines.chinese: 你非常惦念你的家人,是吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Yes.I know I must seem silly. It's not like I have nobody. I Like the Molinas very much, and they're so kind to me.
lines.chinese: 是的,我知道我看起来很可笑。 我身边并非没有亲人。 我很喜欢Molina 一家。 他们对我真好。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hey, why don't we go out for a cheeseburger and French mes? That'll cheer you up. And you can use my Walkman.
lines.chinese: 嘿,我们何不出去 吃一顿奶酪汉堡和炸薯条? 这样会让你舒畅些。 可以用我的随身听。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: That's a good idea. But if we go out, please don't complain about your math teacher or your math homework. I want to have fun.
lines.chinese: 好主意。 但是我们出去, 你可别老抱怨 你的数学老师或你的数学作业。 我想要快快乐乐的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: So do I.
lines.chinese: 我也想。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I have to turn off the lights, or else my father will get really angry. He says I never turn them out when I leave. If they come home and they're on...
lines.chinese: 我得关掉灯, 要不然我爸爸会生气。 他说我离开时从不关灯。 要是他们回来看见灯开着……。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Do you hear something?
lines.chinese: 听到什么了吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Yes. What was that?
lines.chinese: 是的。 是什么呢?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It sounded like a dog barking.
lines.chinese: 听起来像狗叫。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: It sounded like a dog barking right here.
lines.chinese: 好像有狗就在这儿叫。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yeah.
lines.chinese: 对。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: A dog!
lines.chinese: 狗!

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: A sprinel! Come on in! Make yourself at home.
lines.chinese: 一条长毛垂耳狗! 进来! 不要客气。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Oh,you poor little thing. Come here.
lines.chinese: 可怜的小东西。 过来。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Come on.

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Poor baby.
lines.chinese: 可怜的小东西。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Where did you come from?
lines.chinese: 你从哪儿来?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Her name's Gemma, and she belongs to Mr.and Mrs.Levinson. There's a phone number-five five five...eight four four eight. Robbie, maybe you should call them and tell the Levinsons we have their cute little spaniel.
lines.chinese: 叫做 Gemma, 是 Levinson 夫妇家的狗。 有电话号码--- 也许你该给他们打个电话 告诉 Levinson 夫妇他们可爱的小猎犬在我们这儿。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I've always wanted a springer spaniel.She's so cute.
lines.chinese: 我一直想要一条长毛狗。 这条狗真可爱。

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.english: The number you ae calling-555-8448-is no longer in service.
lines.chinese: 你打的电话号码 555--8448 是空号。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: The number's no longer in sevice.
lines.chinese: 这个号码现在是空号。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Oh, you poor, poor baby. You've lost your family.
lines.chinese: 呵,可怜的小家伙。 无家可归了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: We'll find them. Don't worry, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 我们会找到他们的。 别担心,Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Don't worry, Alexandra. We'll find the owner.
lines.chinese: 别担心,Alexandra。 我们会找到狗的主人的。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: How, Robbie?
lines.chinese: 怎么找,Robbie?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Let me think.
lines.chinese: 让我想想。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Gemma, sit. Good Gemma.Give me your paw.Good Gemma.This dog is well trained.
lines.chinese: 坐。 乖 Gemma。 把脚伸出来。 乖 Gemma。 这条狗受过很好的训练。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: With a little help from the ASPCA, the American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals. They're the ones.We once found a cat. She was caught in the branches of our tree.And Dad called the ASPCA.They came and solved the problem.
lines.chinese: 有事找 ASPCA , 美国禁止虐待动物协会。 找他们没错。 我们有一次发现一只猫。 被我们家树的树枝夹住了。 爸爸打电话给 ASPCA。 他们来了,也解决了问题。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Robbie, let's call them.
lines.chinese: 我们给他们打电话。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Let me see-ASPCA....Here it is.ASPCA Animal Shelter. 555-7700.
lines.chinese: 让我瞧瞧---ASPCA...... 在这儿。 动物收容所。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Hello, ASPCA.
lines.chinese: 喂，ASPCA。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hello,my name is Robbie Stewart. I have a lost dog I'd like to bring to you. How late are you open?
lines.chinese: 喂,我叫 Robbie Stewart。 我这儿有一条失犬我想送来给你们。 你们那儿开门到多晚?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: We're open till nine P.M.
lines.chinese: 我们开到晚上九点。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thank you. I'll bring the dog over by nine.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。 我在九点之前把狗送来。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Thanks. Bye.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。 再见。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks. Good-bye.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。 再见。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: They're still open?
lines.chinese: 他们现在还开着？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: They're open until nine 0'clock. We have two and a half hours. Let's take Gemma by there now. They'll find the owner.
lines.chinese: 他们开到九点。 还有两个半小时。 我们赶紧把 Gemma 送去。 他们会找到主人的。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I hope so. I'm so sad to see this little dog without her family.
lines.chinese: 希望如此。 看到这狗没有家我真难过。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm sure they'll find the owner . But if they don't, I'll adopt her. She's so cute. Look at those eyes. She's hard to resist .Don't you just love her?
lines.chinese: 我相信他们会找到狗的主人。 如果找不到,我就收养她。 她真逗人喜欢。 你看她的眼睛。 真是人见人爱。 你能说你不喜欢?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I'd like to keep her, too. But I'll be going home to Greece at the end of the semester. She just wants love and affection.Come on, Robbie. Let's get her to the animal shelter, so they can find her owners quickly. Don't worry, Gemma. We'll get you home. It's not easy being away from home.
lines.chinese: 我也愿意收留 。 但是我就要回希腊去了 在这个学期结束的时候。 她需要爱和关怀。 走吧,Robbie。 我们把她送到动物收容所, 好让他们很快找到她的主人。 别担心,Gemma。 我们会送你回家的。 离家独闯不容易。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Come on, Poochie. Atta girl! Let's go .We're off to the animal shelter.
lines.chinese: 来吧,小狗。 好女孩! 我们走。 我们这就去动物收容所。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Your name?
lines.chinese: 你的名字?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Robbie Stewart. And this is Alexandra Pappas.
lines.chinese: 这位是 Alexandra Pappas。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Your name will do, Mr.Stewart. Your address?
lines.chinese: 你的名字就够了,Stewart 先生。 你的住址?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: 46Linden Street, Riverdale.
lines.chinese: 林登街 46 号。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Where did you find the dog?
lines.chinese: 你在什么地方找到这条狗的？

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: She found us.
lines.chinese: 她找到我们的。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: You tried calling the number on the collar?
lines.chinese: 是否照狗脖子上项圈的电话号码打过电话了?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, but the number's no longer in service.
lines.chinese: 打过,但那个号码是空号。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: And there's no address on the dog tag?
lines.chinese: 牌子上没有地址?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: There's no other information.
lines.chinese: 没有其他资料。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: No ID number. Without that, it's hard.
lines.chinese: 没有识别号码吗? 没有就难办了。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: You will try to find the dog's owner.
lines.chinese: 你们会尽力去寻找狗的主人吧。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Oh, we'll try, believe me.
lines.chinese: 哦,我们会想办法的,相信我。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And if you don't?
lines.chinese: 要是找不到呢?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 什么?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: If you don't... can I...can I adopt the dog?
lines.chinese: 要是你们找不到狗的主人……我可否……我可否收养这条狗?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Why, yes. If the owners don't claim the dog in forty-eight hours, then you can apply for adoption.
lines.chinese: 当然可以。 如果狗的主人在四十八小时内不认领, 你就可以申请收养她了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: How do I do that?
lines.chinese: 我该办什么手续呢?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: You really want to ?
lines.chinese: 你真想要这样做?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes. I'm serious. If no one comes to claim Gemma, I'd like to adopt her.
lines.chinese: 是的,我是真心的。 如果没有人来认领 Gemma, 我愿意收养  。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: It's not diffcult.
lines.chinese: 这不难。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: OK. If you want to adopt an animal, first we need to know some references.
lines.chinese: 好。 如果你想收养动物, 首先我们得了解证明人。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: References? People we know?
lines.chinese: 证明人? 我们认识的人?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Friends, teachers... We need to talk to some people about you We want to be sure that you're responsible and that you can take good care of an animal. Then you have to till out this form about your family background.
lines.chinese: 朋友,老师…… 我们得向一些人打听你的情况。 我们要确定你是负责的。 而且能够好好照料动物。 然后你要填写这份表格。 关于你的家庭背景的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Is that it?
lines.chinese: 就这些啦?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: No, there's more. We need to know about your history with animals. Have you ever owned an animal?
lines.chinese: 不,还有。 我们要了解你以前和动物的关联。 你是否曾养过动物?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes. We had a cat when I was eight years old. I love cats.
lines.chinese: 是的。 我八岁时养过一只猫。 我喜欢猫。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Do you have any animals now?
lines.chinese: 你现在还养着什么动物吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Umfortunately,no.
lines.chinese: 很遗憾,没有。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Anything else?
lines.chinese: 还有别的事吗?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: We also lide to know your reasons for wanting an animal.
lines.chinese: 我们还想知道 你要养动物的原因。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Just to hold it and cuddle with it. Just to have as a pet I love animals.
lines.chinese: 只不过想抱抱它。 还是要养来当宠物。 我喜欢动物。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: To have a friend-a pal. You know, man's best friend is his dog.
lines.chinese: 想要一个朋友,一个伙伴。 你知道,人类最好的朋友就是狗。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: And one thing more. If you're under twenty-one years of age...
lines.chinese: 还有一件事。 如果你还不到二十一岁……

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's me.
lines.chinese: 我就是这种情况。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Then an adult must sign for you.
lines.chinese: 那就必须有一位成人来替你签字。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Uh-oh.
lines.chinese: 啊哈。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: No problem.My parents will think it's a good idea. I'll be back with them.
lines.chinese: 没问题。 我的父母会觉得这是件好事。 我会带他们来。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: If the real owners don't come to claim Gemma...
lines.chinese: 如果狗的主人没认领 Gemma……

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: After forty-eight huors. But please call first.
lines.chinese: 四十八小时后。 请你先打电话给我啊。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks for your information and for being so helpful.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你的帮助和如此热心。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: It's my pleasure. Nice talking to both of you.
lines.chinese: 我很愿意效劳。 很高兴与两位交谈。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks again. Bye.
lines.chinese: 再次谢谢 。 再见。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Maybe the real owners will come to claim her. Robble： Her eyes look so sad. She must really miss them.
lines.chinese: 也许狗的主人会来认领的。她的目光那么忧郁。 她准是很想主人。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: I see you're both animal lovers
lines.chinese: 我看得出你们都是热爱动物的人。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: We are.
lines.chinese: 我们是。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Good-bye, Miss Aborn. We'll call in a couple of days.
lines.chinese: 再见,Aborn 小姐。 我们两三天后给你打电话。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Good-bye, and thanks for bringing Gemma in.
lines.chinese: 再见,谢谢你们把 Gemma 送来。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Bye.
lines.chinese: 再见。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I keep thinking about the dog-about Gemma, alone in the animal shelter.
lines.chinese: 我一直在想那条狗---Gemma, 独自在动物收容所。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know. But I promse you, Alexandra, the dog is just fine.They're very kind to the animals.
lines.chinese: 我知道。 但是我向你保证, Alexandra, 那条狗会很好的。 他们照料动物很细心。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I know they are. I mean about her being alone. Even if they are kind to Gemma, she's still alone, without her family
lines.chinese: 我知道他们会。 我是指她很孤单。 即使他们对 Gemma 很好, 她仍是孤单的,没有家。

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.english: Ready, folks?
lines.chinese: 可以点菜了吗,两位?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Are you ready, Alexandra?
lines.chinese: 想好了吗,Alexandra?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Yes, I'm ready. I'll have the chefs salad, please.
lines.chinese: 是的,我想好了。 我要主厨色拉。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I will have a cheeseourger, medium rare, with raw onion, and French fries, please.
lines.chinese: 我要一份奶酪汉堡,五分熟的, 加生洋葱和炸薯条。

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.english: Anything to drink?
lines.chinese: 要喝点什么吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: A diet cola, please.
lines.chinese: 一份健怡可乐。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Ginger ale with lots of ice for me, thank you.
lines.chinese: 橙味汽水,多加些冰,谢谢。

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.english: I've got it. Thanks.
lines.chinese: 我都记下了。 谢谢。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Aren't you surprised that the animal shelter is so careful about finding homes for the animals?
lines.chinese: 你不觉得很惊讶吗? 动物收容所需要如此小心 为动物寻个家。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: No, I'm not.
lines.chinese: 不,我不觉得。

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.english: And a cheeseburger, medium rare, with onion and French fries .And a ginger ale with lots of ice. Salad dressing?
lines.chinese: 一份奶酪汉堡,五分熟的, 加生洋葱和炸薯条。 一份橙味汽水,加多快冰块。 沙拉要什么调味酱?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hey, I wanted you to hear my new sound system when the dog scratched on the front door.Let's finish eating, and then we'll go back to my house. I want you to hear my new tapes. I've got some areat new dance music.
lines.chinese: 嘿,我正想让你听我的新的音响设备 当那狗在抓前门时。 我们赶紧吃完, 然后回到我家。 我给你听我的新录音带。 我有几卷很好的新舞曲。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hell.Stewart residence.
lines.chinese: 喂。 家。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Hello. Is Robbie Stewart there?
lines.chinese: 你好。 在吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: This is he. Who's this?
lines.chinese: 我就是。 你是谁?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: This is Linda Aborn from the animal shelter.
lines.chinese: 我是动物收容所的 Linda Aborn。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It's Linda from the animal shetter. Yes, Linda. Hi.
lines.chinese: 是动物收容所的 Linda。 是的,Linda。 嗨。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: We have good news and bad news, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 我给你带来了好消息和坏消息,Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Oh?

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: The good news is that the Levinsons have come by to pick up the dog. The bad news is, you won't be able to adopt the dog.
lines.chinese: 噢? 好消息是 Levinson 夫妇已来这儿 把狗领回去了。 坏消息是你不能收养那条狗了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's OK.
lines.chinese: 没有关系。

lines.speaker: Linda
lines.english: Come by one day and look at some of the other dogs. I'm suer there's one for you. Thanks, Robbie. And the Levinsons thank you for bringing their dog to us.
lines.chinese: 有空来一趟,看看其它的狗。 我相信会有你喜欢的。 谢谢,Robbie。夫妇也谢谢你把他们的狗送来。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Linda. Bye.
lines.chinese: 谢谢,Linda。 再见。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: The owners clairned Gemma?
lines.chinese: 主人把狗领回去了?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's right.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I'm glad for the dog.
lines.chinese: 我真替那条狗高兴。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I guess I am , too. She said if I come by, She'll help me fine another dog.
lines.chinese: 我想我也一样。 她说,如果我去, 她会帮我另外找一条狗。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Come on .Let's dance.
lines.chinese: 来吧。 咱们跳舞。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Molly, I need your special talent for handing special maters.
lines.chinese: 我需要你处理特殊情况的特殊才能。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Like what special matters?
lines.chinese: 什么样的特殊情况？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, I have a scheduling problem.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我在安排工作方面遇到困难。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 是吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I have three tonsillectomies set for Friday with Dr. Earl.
lines.chinese: 我安排好要和 Earl 大夫在星期五进行三个扁桃腺切除手术。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 是吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I need to fit a fourth operation into his schedule. And...I know you can do it.
lines.chinese: 我得在他的工作日程上再加第四个手术。 这……我知道你能做到。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Who's the patient?
lines.chinese: 病人是谁？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Carl Herrera. The boy has infected tonsils, and we should remove them as soon as possible.
lines.chinese: 这孩子的扁桃腺受到感染了， 我们要尽快把它切除。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Well, I'll try to arrange th schedule, Dr. Stewart. But it's not going to be easy.
lines.chinese: 好吧，我尽力去安排，Stewart 大夫。 不过，这事可不容易。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I know you'll be able to take care of it.
lines.chinese: 我知道你能够处理好这件事。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, Mrs. Herrera, Carl will be perfectly fine after we remove his tonsils.
lines.chinese: 你好，Herrera 太太， 切除扁桃腺之后，Carl会完全恢复健康的。

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.english: Thank you for your reassurance, Dr. Stewart. He's had so many colds and sore throats recently.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你消除了我的顾虑，Stewart大夫。 他最近常常感冒，并且喉咙痛。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, It's a very easy operation, Carl. You won't feel a thing.
lines.chinese: 这是个很简单的手术，Carl。 你一点感觉也没有。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: But when do they do it?
lines.chinese: 但是什么时候动手术？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: This Friday.
lines.chinese: 这个星期五。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: But Saturday's my birthday.
lines.chinese: 但星期六是我的生日。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, we could reschedule the operation, Mrs. Herrera, but I don't want to put it off too long.
lines.chinese: 这样吧，我们可以重新安排手术时间，Herrera 太太。 但我希望不要拖得太久。

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.english: No, I think it's important to do it now. We can have a birthday party for you, Carl, when you come out of the hospital.
lines.chinese: 不，我觉得还是应该现在动手术。 我们可以给你举行生日派对，Carl， 在你病好出院后。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Nurse Baker, would you come in, please?
lines.chinese: 护士，请你来一下，好吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Come with me, Carl. You and I will talk this over.
lines.chinese: 跟我来，Carl。 我俩商量商量。

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.english: She has a special way with kids.
lines.chinese: 她对孩子很有一套。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: She sure does.
lines.chinese: 她的确如此。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Carl, does your throat hurt?
lines.chinese: 你喉咙痛吗？

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: OK. Do you want to get better?
lines.chinese: 好，你想把病治好吗？

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: OK. We want you to get better, too. You'll have your tonsils out tomorrow, and you won't get so many colds anymore.
lines.chinese: 我们也希望你能尽快康复。 明天，你的扁桃腺切除后， 你就不会老患感冒了。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: But if I have my tonsils out tomorrow, I'll miss my birthday party on Saturday.
lines.chinese: 但是，我如果明天切除扁桃腺， 就会错过星期六的生日派对。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: I know. It's a problem, isn't it? Let me try to work something out.
lines.chinese: 我知道。 这确实是个问题，不是吗？ 让我想个办法解决。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: What?
lines.chinese: 什么办法？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: I have to think about it.
lines.chinese: 我得想一想。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: You're fooling me .
lines.chinese: 你想骗我。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Oh, I'm not, Carl. Give me a chance to think about it, and I'll come up with something.
lines.chinese: 噢，我不骗你，Carl。 给我一个机会想想， 我会想出一个办法的。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: A surprise?
lines.chinese: 一个惊喜？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Maybe. But you just put on your pajamas and robe, and I'll think of a surprise.
lines.chinese: 也许是。 你先把你的睡衣裤和长袍穿上， 我来想出一个绝好的主意。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Will it hurt?
lines.chinese: 会痛吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: No. There are other boys and girls here, and they're having their tonsils out. You'll meet them.
lines.chinese: 不痛。 还有其他男孩女孩在这， 他们也将切除扁桃腺。 你会见到他们的。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: I don't want to.
lines.chinese: 我不想见。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Change your clothes, Carl. Everything will be just fine.
lines.chinese: 把衣服换了，Carl。 一切都会安好的。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: OK. Do you know how to play charades?
lines.chinese: 好。 你们会打哑谜吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Frank, you've never played charades?
lines.chinese: 你从来没玩过哑谜。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: Nope.
lines.chinese: 没有。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Carl, you're sure you've never played? OK, Betty, Tim, and Frank. We're going to play charades. Frank, you can learn as we go. And, Carl, you join in at anytime. OK, let me think. OK, I've got one .All right.
lines.chinese: 你肯定你从没玩过吗？ 好，Betty，Tim，Frank。 我们来玩哑谜。我们玩，你跟着学。 还有Carl，你随时都可以加入。 好，让我想想。 好，我有了。 行了。

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: A movie! A movie!
lines.chinese: 电影！ 电影！

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Right. A movie. OK.
lines.chinese: 对。 电影。 好。

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.english: Six words. It has six words.
lines.chinese: 六个字。 有六个字。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: That's easy. I can play.
lines.chinese: 这很容易。 我也能玩。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Good. OK. We've got a movie. The title.
lines.chinese: 好的。 我们知道是一部电影。 名字是……

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: Six words.
lines.chinese: 有六个字。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Right. First word...
lines.chinese: 对。 第一个字……

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: Sounds like.
lines.chinese: 听来）像……

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.english: Sounds like...
lines.chinese: 听来）像……

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: You got that part right. Yes.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: Sounds like... Time： Sounds like what?
lines.chinese: 听来）像 no  。听来）像 no  。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: Sounds like no.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Absolutely right, Frank. Sounds like no. OK. We've got a movie. Six words. The first word sounds like no.
lines.chinese: 好。 我们知道是一部电影。 六个字。 第一个字音像 no。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: Row. Row.

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.english: Go.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Nope.
lines.chinese: 不对。

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.english: Show. That's It-show.
lines.chinese: 就是它，show。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: No...OK...
lines.chinese: 不是……好……

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: Snow.
lines.chinese: 雪。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Absolutely right, Betty. Sounds like no-snow. OK, a movie. Six words. The first word is snow.
lines.chinese: 完全正确 Betty。 音像 no，Snow。 好，一部电影。六个字。 第一个字是 Snow  。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: This is fun.
lines.chinese: 很有意思。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Oh, OK.
lines.chinese: 噢，好了。

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: The fifth word.
lines.chinese: 第五个字。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Right, fifth word.
lines.chinese: 对，第五个字。

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.english: Seven?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Absolutely right. Very good. The fifth word is seven. OK, we've got a movie. The first word is snow. Fifth word, seven.
lines.chinese: 完全正确。 很好。 第五个字是 seven。 好，我们知道是一部电影。 第一个字是“snow”。 第五个字是“seven”。

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: I got it! I got it!
lines.chinese: 我知道了。 我知道了。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs.
lines.chinese: 白雪公主和七矮人〕

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: I got it!
lines.chinese: 我猜对了。

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.english: I got it!
lines.chinese: 我猜对了。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Carl, now you know charades. Why don't join us?
lines.chinese: 现在你知道什么是哑谜了。 你何不参加入我们的游戏呢？

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: I don't like charades. It's for babies.
lines.chinese: 我不喜欢哑谜。 这是给婴儿玩的。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Oh, I like it
lines.chinese: 噢，我喜欢哑谜。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Well, they're babies.
lines.chinese: 嗯，他们都是婴儿。

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.english: You're a sore loser.
lines.chinese: 你是个输不起的家伙。

lines.speaker: Tim
lines.english: Yeah.
lines.chinese: 对。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: No arguing. Save your voices. Between now and tomorrow you're all going to have your tonsils out. And you won't be able to speak for a while. So save your voices till then.
lines.chinese: 别争了。 留着点嗓子。 从现在起到明天 你们都要切除扁桃腺。有一段时间，你们没有办法讲话。 所以，省着点嗓子。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hi, gang. Hi, everybody. Well, what's going on?
lines.chinese: 嗨，各位。 噢，怎么啦？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: I sure I am glad to see you, Dr. Stewart. This is a rough group.
lines.chinese: 真高兴见到你来，Stewart 大夫。 这是一群粗野的孩子。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: I didn't want to play charades, so they're angry at me.
lines.chinese: 我不想玩哑谜。 所以他们生我的气。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Why don't you want to play?
lines.chinese: 你为什么不玩？

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Because I don't want to be here. I don't want my tonsils out.
lines.chinese: 因为我不想呆在这儿。 我不想切除扁桃腺。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Why not?
lines.chinese: 为什么不想？

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Because my birthday is tomorrow. My mother promised me a birthday party with a clown.
lines.chinese: 因为明天是我的生日。 我妈妈答应给我安排一个有小丑的生日派对。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: But you can have on when you go home, Carl.
lines.chinese: 但你回去以后还可以办一个呀，Carl。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: But my birthday is tomorrow.
lines.chinese: 但是我的生日就在明天。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'm sorry, Carl.
lines.chinese: 很抱歉，Carl。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Carl, you'll have your party when you go home.
lines.chinese: 你回去以后就可以开个生日派对了。

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: But it won't be on my birthday! And you promised me a surprise.
lines.chinese: 但那就不是在我生日那天了！ 而且你答应给我一个惊喜。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: It hurts, doesn't it?
lines.chinese: 有点痛，是不是？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: You'll feel better tomorrow, Betty, believe me. Only one day, and it won't hurt as much. Do you feel like eating? Having some dinner? Oh, don't look so sad. Let me tell you about your dinner. It's ice cream
lines.chinese: 明天你就会好些，Betty，相信我。 只要一天，就不会像现在这样痛了。 想吃东西吗？ 吃点晚餐？ 噢，别显得那么无精打采。 我告诉你晚餐是什么。 是冰淇淋喔。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Ice cream. All kinds of flavors. Chocolate.
lines.chinese: 冰淇淋。 各种口味的都有。 巧克力的。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Strawberry?
lines.chinese: 草莓的？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Vanilla?
lines.chinese: 香草的？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Vanilla, too?
lines.chinese: 香草的，也有吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: I see you're feeling better already, Betty. So you will have dinner?
lines.chinese: 我看得出来你已经感觉好些了，Betty。 那么要吃晚饭吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: OK, honey, we'll see to it that you have strawberry and vanilla ice cream. Just rest now. You need some rest to help you get better quickly. Hi Frank. How you doing?
lines.chinese: 好，亲爱的，我们设法 让你吃到草莓和香草的冰淇淋。 现在好好休息。 需要多休息才会好得快。 嗨，Frank。 你怎么样了？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Oh, come on now. You're a big boy. It doesn't hurt that much, does it? Oh, I'm sorry it hurts so much, and won't be able to have dinner. You're just going to have to have ice cream. Yes, Ice cream. Lots of flavors. Want to hear them?
lines.chinese: 噢，别这样了。 你是个大孩子了 它没有那么痛，是吗？ 啊，我很抱歉让你这么难受。 你没有办法吃晚饭了。 你只得吃冰淇淋了。 对，冰淇淋。 有很多种口味的。 你想听听吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Chocolate?
lines.chinese: 巧克力？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Then chocolate it is. One scoop or two?
lines.chinese: 那就吃巧克力的。 一勺还是两勺？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Three scoops?
lines.chinese: 三勺？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Then three it will be.
lines.chinese: 好，就三勺。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: You want three scoops also?
lines.chinese: 你也要三勺？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Chocolate, too?
lines.chinese: 也是巧克力的吗？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Well, I see you're feeling better.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我看得出你现在好些了。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Well, at least you're acting like you feel better. Three scoops of chocolate ice cream for Tim coming up. Hi, Carl. How you doing?
lines.chinese: 不过，至少你表情证明你感觉好多了。 给 Tim的三勺巧克力冰淇淋马上送来。 嗨，Carl。 你怎么样？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: I know it hurts. But it'll be better tomorrow. In the meantime, what would you like?
lines.chinese: 我知道它痛。 但是明天就会好些了。 对了，你想要点什么？

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.english: Surprise.
lines.chinese: 惊喜。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: A surprise? I promised you a surprise, didn't I? And it wasn't just ice cream, was it?
lines.chinese: 惊喜？ 我答应过要给你一个惊喜，不是吗？ 这惊喜还不仅是冰淇淋，对吗?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Your birthday is tomorrow, isn't it?
lines.chinese: 你生日是明天，对吧？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Well, maybe, just maybe, there will be a surprise. But first you have to smile. I just want to see one smile from you.
lines.chinese: 嗯，或许，只是或许， 会有一项让你惊喜的事。 但首先你得笑一笑。 我就想看你笑一笑。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: No smile, no surprise . That's the deal. No smile, no surprise. If you want a surprise, then you've got to smile first.
lines.chinese: 不笑，就不给你惊喜。 这是交换条件。 不笑，就没有惊喜。 如果你想要一个惊喜， 你就得先笑一笑。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: How you all doing? Well, I'm glad you're feeling better because we have a little surprise for you today. It's Carl's birthday, and we have Popo the Clown to entertain you. And here he is -- Popo the Clown.
lines.chinese: 你们大家怎么样？ 我很高兴各位感觉好些 因为今天我们要给各位一个惊喜。 今天是 Carl 的生日。 我们请了小丑 Popo 来给大家表演助兴。 这位就是小丑 Popo。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Happy birthday, Carl. Happy birthday. All right everybody. OK, Carl. It's yur birthday. What's your wish? What would you like?
lines.chinese: 生日快乐，Carl。 生日快乐。 各位，你们好。 好的，Carl。 今天是你的生日。 你有什么愿望？ 你想要什么？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hmm?
lines.chinese: 嗯？

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: You want to play charades?
lines.chinese: 你想玩哑谜？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Who is it?
lines.chinese: 是谁?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Dad.
lines.chinese: 爸爸。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Come on in, Dad.
lines.chinese: 请进来,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I thought you might be hungry. I brought you a chicken sandwich and a glass of milk.
lines.chinese: 我想你大概饿了。 我替你带来一份鸡肉三明治和一杯牛奶。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I am hungry. Thanks, Dad. What time is it, anyway?
lines.chinese: 我真是饿了。 谢谢，爸爸。 几点了，顺便问一下？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Ten 0'clock. What are you working on?
lines.chinese: 十点钟。 你在干什么？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm writing a story for the high-school paper.
lines.chinese: 我正在为高中校刊写篇东西。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Can't you finish it tomorrow?
lines.chinese: 你明天完成它不行吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: No, I have to turn it in in the morning.
lines.chinese: 不行，明天上午我要交上去。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What's it about?
lines.chinese: 是关于什么的？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm writing an article on the feelings about graduation.
lines.chinese: 我在写一篇关于毕业感觉的文章。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: And...how do you feel?
lines.chinese: 那……你的感觉是什么？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Me? A little scared. And excited, too.
lines.chinese: 我吗？ 有点害怕。 也很兴奋。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I felt the same way.
lines.chinese: 我当时也有这种感觉。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: The scary part's leaving home and moving to college.
lines.chinese: 害怕的是要离开家到学校去。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh, leaving home is part of growing up. Well, don't work all night.
lines.chinese: 呵，离开家是成熟过程的一部分。 好啦，别通宵工作。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I don't mind. I enjoy writing.
lines.chinese: 我不在乎。 我喜欢写作。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, maybe you should think about becoming a writer.
lines.chinese: 那么， 也许你应该考虑成为一名作家。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Maybe I should.
lines.chinese: 也许我该这样。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You have lots of time to decide.
lines.chinese: 你有很多时间做决定。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's the worst part-making decisions.
lines.chinese: 最伤脑筋的是做决定。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You'll be OK. Good night, Son.
lines.chinese: 你不会有问题的。 晚安，孩子。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Good night, Dad. Grandpa&
lines.chinese: 晚安，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: "Hail to the victors valiant, Hail to the conquering heroes, Hail, Hail to Michigan, The champions of the West!"
lines.chinese: 向勇敢的胜利者致敬。 向进取的英雄们致敬， 致敬，向 Michigan 致敬, 西部的优胜者  ！”

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Ah, good morning Robbie.
lines.chinese: 啊，早安，Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Good morning, Dad.
lines.chinese: 早安，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: How's my grandson?
lines.chinese: 我的孙子怎样啦？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Fine, Grandpa. Fine! What's all the cheering about Did the University f Michigan another football game?
lines.chinese: 很好，爷爷。很好！ 这么高兴是为什么？ 是不是Michigan 大学赢得了一场足球赛

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Better than that. Tell him Philip.
lines.chinese: 比那种事更值得高兴。 告诉他，Philip。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I just spoke with Charley Rafer.
lines.chinese: 我刚和 Charley Rafer通了电话。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Who's Charley Rafer?
lines.chinese: 谁是 Charley Rafer？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: He's the Dean of Admission for the University of Michigan.
lines.chinese: 他是Michigan 大学招生办主任。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: And it turns out he's a classmate of Philip's.
lines.chinese: 有意思的是，他和 Philip 是同班同学。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: We were both on the tennis team.
lines.chinese: 我们都是网球队的成员。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Great!
lines.chinese: 真棒！

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: It is great. He's going to be in New York tomorrow to interview applicants for admission.
lines.chinese: 的确是太好了。 明天他要在纽约 与申请入学者面谈。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: And he's agreed to fit you into his schedule.
lines.chinese: 他同意明天把你安排进他的名单 。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: But I may not want to go to Michigan.
lines.chinese: 但是我可能不去 Michigan。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: It's one of the best schools in the country, Robbie. I studied medicine there. Your grandfather went to the Engineering School there.
lines.chinese: 这是全国最好的大学之一，Robbie。 我在那儿学医学。 你爷爷进那儿的工学院。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know that, but...
lines.chinese: 这我知道，但是……

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: You said you wanted to be a doctor like your father.
lines.chinese: 你说过你希望像爸爸一样成为一名医生。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Not exactly.
lines.chinese: 还不一定。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: You couldn't pick a finer medical school than Michigan.
lines.chinese: 你再也找不到一所比 Michigan 大学更好的医学院了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, I know that.
lines.chinese: 是的，我知道。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Let's meet with Charley at the university club. Ten 0'clock tomorrow morning. It doesn't mean you're going Michigan.
lines.chinese: 我们就去大学俱乐部见 Charley吧。 明早十点钟。 这并不是说你就要上 Michigan 大学。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It doesn't mean you have to be a doctor. But the interview will be good experience for you.
lines.chinese: 也并不意味着你一定要当医生。 但这次面谈对你来讲是一次很好的经验。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: In that case, it's OK. Dad, growing up means making my own decisions, doesn't it?
lines.chinese: 这么说，我就去。 爸爸，长大了意味 我自己能做决定，对吧？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You're right, Robbie. But, like your Grandpa suggested, have the interview.
lines.chinese: 你说得对，Robbie。 但是，照你爷爷所建议的 去参加这次面谈。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: And then make your own decision.
lines.chinese: 然后你自己做决定。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That sounds fine.
lines.chinese: 这样听起来蛮好的。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I know it's sudden, Robbie, but this is an important opportunity. We'll head down there first thing tomorrow morning. OK?
lines.chinese: 我知道这件事很突然，Robbie。 但这是一次很重要的机会。 明早第一件事就是这。 好吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Sure, Dad.
lines.chinese: 一定，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I want you to know something, Son. I'm...very proud of you.
lines.chinese: 我希望你知道一件事，孩子。 我很……以你为荣。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Dad.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, I've got an appointment at the hospital. I'll see you all at dinnertime.
lines.chinese: 好啦，我在医院有个会。 吃晚饭时见面了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Bye, Dad.
lines.chinese: 再见，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Is something still wrong, Robbie?
lines.chinese: 还有什么不对的，Robbie？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll be OK.
lines.chinese: 没什么。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Going away to college for the first time always makes one a little nervous.
lines.chinese: 第一次离家上大学 总是让人有些紧张。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I guess so. I'll be OK. I just need time to think.
lines.chinese: 我猜是这样。 我会适应的。我只是需要时间思考。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Sorry, Robbie. Sorry to be late this morning, but, well, we've still got some time for a cup of coffee. I can't wait to see my old pal Charley Rafer.
lines.chinese: 对不起，Robbie。今天早上迟了点， 不过，我们还有喝杯咖啡的时间。 我真想早点见到老友 Charley Rafer。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Neither can I.
lines.chinese: 我也一样。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: So you thought about it, huh?
lines.chinese: 你考虑过了吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, I have, Dad.
lines.chinese: 是的，我考虑了，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, I'm glad. I knew you'd realize that this interview could be an important experience for you.
lines.chinese: 那好，我很高兴。 我知道你会认识到 这次面谈是一次很难得的经验。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I came to the conclusion.
lines.chinese: 我的结论也是这样。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: That's very wise, Robbie. Very wise. Now let's head off for the city and the university club.
lines.chinese: 这是很明智的，Robbie。 非常明智。 现在我们进城去，到大学俱乐部。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Dad.
lines.chinese: 谢谢，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Thanks...for what?
lines.chinese: 谢什么？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks for hearing me out. And...
lines.chinese: 谢谢你听我的意见。而且……

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: And...?
lines.chinese: 而且……？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And thanks for being such an understanding father.
lines.chinese: 而且谢谢你是这样一位善于了解我的父亲。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, thank you, Robbie. Thank you.
lines.chinese: 嗯，谢谢你，Robbie。  谢谢你。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Philip Stewart! It's great to see you!
lines.chinese: 真高兴见到你！

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Charley Rafer-you look as young as ever.
lines.chinese: 你看起来就跟以前一样年轻。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: You must be Robbie.
lines.chinese: 你就是 Robbie 吧。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes, this is my youngest son Robbie. Robbie, I want you to meet one of the best tennis players on the Michigan team-Charley Rafer.
lines.chinese: 你好。 是的，这是我的小儿子 Robbie。 我要你见见 当年 Michigan球队最好的网球选手之一--

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Nice to meet you, Dean Rafer.
lines.chinese: 很高兴见到你，Rafer主任。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Well, are you as good a tennis player as your dad?
lines.chinese: 嗯，你是否像爸爸那样是一名优秀的网球选手呢？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: No, I'm not very good at it.
lines.chinese: 不，我网球不行。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Frankly, neither was I. Charley was the star of the team.
lines.chinese: 坦白的说，我当年也不行。 是当时队里的明星。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Yeah. Thanks. Well, how've you been, Philip?
lines.chinese: 凑数的，谢谢你。 嗯，这些年来怎么样，Philip？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh, working too hard.
lines.chinese: 噢，工作太累人了。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Doesn't show. How's Ellen?
lines.chinese: 倒是看不出来。 怎么样？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Fine, thank you. And how's Marge?
lines.chinese: 很好，谢谢。 怎么样？

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: She's still giving the toughest English history exams in the school and loving every minute of it. And speaking of minutes, I have interviews until noon, so why don't we get right to work?
lines.chinese: 她仍用最难的英语史试题考学生 在学校乐此不倦。 谈到时间， 我从现在到中午有一系列的面谈， 我们现在就开始工作，好吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Can you have lunch with us later?
lines.chinese: 晚些时候，你能与我们一起共进午餐吗？

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: I'd love to , Philip, but I'm afraid I can't. I'm only here two days, and I have interviews with twenty-six applicants.
lines.chinese: 我很想，Philip，但是我恐怕不行。 我只有两天时间， 而要面谈的申请人有二十六位。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I understand. Well, thanks. I'll wait outside. Good luck, Son.
lines.chinese: 我能了解。 噢，谢了。 我到外面等。 祝你好运，孩子。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Did you bring your transcript from high school?
lines.chinese: 你把高中的成绩单带来了吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, sir. Right here.
lines.chinese: 带来了，先生。 在这儿。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Thank you. Please sit down.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。 请坐下。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: I see under "activities" that you've been writing for the school paper.
lines.chinese: 我注意到在“活动”项目中提到 你为校刊写文章。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, sir.
lines.chinese: 是的，先生。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: What kinds of articles have you written?
lines.chinese: 你写过一些什么样的文章？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: All kinds-sports, editorials, theater reviews. You name it, I've written it.
lines.chinese: 各种各样的---体育，社论，剧评。 你说得出的，我都写过。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Hmmm. Well, have you ever thought of becoming a journalist?
lines.chinese: 嗯。 那好，你是否想过成为一名新闻记者？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: A professional writer? Not until recently.
lines.chinese: 职业写作人员？ 最近才考虑到。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Michigan has a fine School of Journalism.
lines.chinese: 大学有一个很好的新闻学院。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, I know that.
lines.chinese: 是的，我知道。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: You seem to have some reservations.
lines.chinese: 看起来你还有些犹豫。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm a little uncertain.
lines.chinese: 我有点犹豫不决。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: It's been very nice talking to you.
lines.chinese: 很高兴与你交谈。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Nice talking to you, sir.
lines.chinese: 我也很高兴与您交谈，先生。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: One piece of advice. The most important thing is for you to decided your own future.
lines.chinese: 给你一句忠告。 最重要的是你要自己决定自己的未来。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, sir. Good-bye. Dean Rafer.
lines.chinese: 是的，先生。 再见，Rafer主任。

lines.speaker: Dean
lines.english: Good-bye. Robbie. Good luck.
lines.chinese: 再见，Robbie，祝你好运。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: I had an interview today, too. I had a great interview with Admissions at Columbia University.
lines.chinese: 我今天也参加了一个面谈。 我参加了一次很精彩的面试。 与 Columbia 大学的招生人员。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Really? What did they say? Will you get into the school?
lines.chinese: 真的？ 他们说什么？ 你会被录取吗？

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: Well, they didn't say anything for sure. But I figure that with my grades and with my personality, I'll have no problem.
lines.chinese: 嗯，他们没有任何准确的答覆。 但我想凭我的成绩和我的品行， 我不会有问题。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Columbia's a terrific school. What are you going to do?
lines.chinese: 是一所很难进的学校。 你打算怎么办？

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: Do? I don't know. I also applied to NYU.
lines.chinese: 怎么办？我不知道。 我还申请了纽约大学。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You sound excited about Columbia. What's your problem, Mike?
lines.chinese: 听起来你对 Columbia 大学挺有兴趣的。 你现在问题在哪，Mike?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: Indecision. Indecision. It's not easy, and this is an important decision we have to make. What about you? How as your interview with Michigan?
lines.chinese: 下不了决心。拿不定主意。 实在不容易， 这又是我们必须做的一个重大决定。 你呢？ 你跟 Michigan 大学的人面谈得如何？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: The interview was fine.
lines.chinese: 面谈得很好。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: It's a great college.
lines.chinese: 那是一所好大学。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It is. My father would like me to go there. He and my Grandpa both went there.
lines.chinese: 是的。 我爸爸希望我去那儿。 他和我爷爷都曾在哪儿读书。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: Great medical school, too.
lines.chinese: 而且有很好的医学院。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know.
lines.chinese: 我知道。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: You can follow in your father's footsteps.
lines.chinese: 你可以跟随你父亲脚步 。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Ah! I'd like to follow in my own footsteps, Mike.
lines.chinese: 噢，我想走自己的路，Mike。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: What do you want to study?
lines.chinese: 你想学什么？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I've been thinking. I think I want to study journalism to be a reporter-a newspaperman.
lines.chinese: 我一直在考虑。 我想学新闻学。 将来当一名记者---一个新闻从业人员。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: You do a pretty good job on the Riverdale High School paper.
lines.chinese: 你在 Riverdale 高中校刊做得有声有色。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And I've been thinking about it a lot lately.
lines.chinese: 最近我一直就此事想了很多。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: Have you discussed it with your parents?
lines.chinese: 你和父母商量过了？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: No. But I have to.
lines.chinese: 没有。但有此必要。

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.english: OK. Let's talk.
lines.chinese: 好，我们谈谈吧。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hi, Dad. Everything's fine. I was just waiting for your to get home so we could talk.
lines.chinese: 嗨，爸爸。一切都很好。 我正等你回来 好跟你谈谈。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Anything special you want to talk about?
lines.chinese: 有什么特殊的事要谈吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: There is, Dad.
lines.chinese: 有，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'm listening.
lines.chinese: 那就说吧。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, I know you and Mom have given up a lot to save money for my college tuition.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我知道你和妈省吃俭用 存钱准备我的大学学费。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: We want you to go to college, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 我们希望你上大学，Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know. I do.
lines.chinese: 我知道。我会的。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: But?
lines.chinese: 那还有什么事？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, I've Thought a lot about which college, and one of them is Columbia.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我为了上哪一个大学想了很多， 其中一所是 Columbia 大学。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Columbia? Why Columbia?
lines.chinese: 为什么是 Columbia？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: First, they have an excellent School of Journalism.
lines.chinese: 首先，那里有很优秀的新闻研究院。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: They do. And your friends are planning to go to Columbia?
lines.chinese: 是的。 而且你的朋友们也想去 Columbia 大学，对吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: That's only part of it. It's complicated. I'll try to explain. Mike and I had a hamburger this afternoon, and we talked.
lines.chinese: 这只是一部分原因。 原因很复杂。 我会尽量给你解释。 今天下午 Mike 和我一起吃汉堡时讨论过。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 是吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, we talked about a lot of thing .He applied to Columbia, and his interview was very successful. He thinks he'll be accepted, and he really wants to go there.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我们谈了很多。 他申请了 Columbia， 他的面谈很成功。他觉得他会被录取， 他确实很想去那儿。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Dean Rafer called me today. He told me he was very impressed with you.
lines.chinese: 主任今天打电话给我。 他告诉我他对你印象很好。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: He's a nice man. He was very kind.
lines.chinese: 他是个好人。 对人和蔼。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: He told me you had some doubts about wanting to go to Michigan.
lines.chinese: 他告诉我 你对上 Michigan 大学还有些疑虑。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes. I do. I'm just not sure about what I want to do.
lines.chinese: 是的，我有疑虑。 我不知道该读什么。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: That's OK.
lines.chinese: 没关系的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You understand?
lines.chinese: 你能谅解？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Let me tell you something, Robbie. Something that might be surprising to you.
lines.chinese: 让我告诉你一件事，Robbie。 一件也许会让你吃惊的事。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: What? Tell me.
lines.chinese: 什么事，说给我听听。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, Grandpa wanted me to study engineering, like him. Well, I wasn't clear about my future, but I knew engineering was not for me.
lines.chinese: 嗯，爷爷希望我像他一样学工程。 哦，我对自己的未来也不清楚，但我知道工程对我不适合。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: What did you tell Grandpa?
lines.chinese: 那你是如何对爷爷讲的？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: The truth.
lines.chinese: 实话实说。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Then you're not upset about my not wantin to go into medicine?
lines.chinese: 那么你有没有感到不高兴 对我不学医。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I'm not upset at all. I'm just happy that we're able to talk about it.
lines.chinese: 一点也不。 我很高兴我们能够共同商讨这件事。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I am too, Dad.
lines.chinese: 我也一样，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I suppose you want to apply to Columbia.
lines.chinese: 我猜想你会申请 Columbia 大学。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes, but I also wanted to apply to several other colleges.
lines.chinese: 是的，但我还想申请几所其他的大学。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I thought you wanted to go to Columbia.
lines.chinese: 我还以为你只想上 Columbia 大学。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, I might want to go to Columbia. But I might not. I just want to be able to make my own decision.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我也许去 Columbia 大学。 但也许不去。 我只想能够自己决定。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You're a real Stewart!
lines.chinese: 你真是我们 Stewart 家的人！

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And if I think about it long enough, you never know...
lines.chinese: 如果我考虑成熟的话，说不定……

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Never know what?
lines.chinese: 说不定什么？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: If I make my own decision, I might choose Michigan.
lines.chinese: 如果我自己作决定， 我说不定选择 Michigan大学。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Robbie, you're something! You know, when I was your age, said exactly the same thing to Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 你真了不起！ 要知道，当我像你这么大的时候， 我跟你爷爷也是这么说的。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Good morning, Susan.
lines.chinese: 早安,Susan。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Good morning, Sam . What's the schedule today?
lines.chinese: 早安,Sam。 今天的工作是怎么安排的？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Ten 0'clock, telephone FAO Schwarz about the new twin baby dolls.
lines.chinese: 十点钟， 打电话给FAO Schwarz 谈关于双胞娃娃玩具的事。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Telephone Mrs. Zaskey at the advertising agency.
lines.chinese: 打电话给广告代理 Zaskey夫人。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I did that. Go on.
lines.chinese: 我已经打了。  继续说。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Eleven 0'clock, approve the sketches for the toy spaceship.
lines.chinese: 十一点钟，批玩具太空船的草图。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Where are they?
lines.chinese: 草图在哪儿？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Right here.
lines.chinese: 就在这儿。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Did you look at them?
lines.chinese: 你看过了吗？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Yes, I did.
lines.chinese: 是的，我看过了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What do you think of the spaceship?
lines.chinese: 你觉得那个太空船怎么样？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: I think the kids'll love it.
lines.chinese: 我觉得孩子们会喜欢。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Would you show me the drawings, please?
lines.chinese: 请把草图给我看看好吗？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Huh.
lines.chinese: 嗯。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Now, what else is on the schedule today?
lines.chinese: 那么，今天的工作表还有些什么?

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Well, at one o'clock you have a lunch appointment with Mr.Levine, the client from the Toytown Stores.
lines.chinese: 嗯，一点钟 你跟 Levine 先生约好吃午饭， 这个客户来自 Toytown Stores。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Where?
lines.chinese: 在什么地方？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: At Rossano's.
lines.chinese: 在 Rossano 餐厅。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hmm. Anything else?
lines.chinese: 嗯，还有其他事吗？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: At four o'clock, you have a meeting with the production staff in the conference room.
lines.chinese: 四点钟， 要与生产部门人员开会 在会议室。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Make sure everybody is at that meeting.
lines.chinese: 要确定每一位都出席这次会议。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Will do. At six you're meeting Mr.Ozawa.
lines.chinese: 没问题。 六点钟要会见 Ozawa 先生。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh, yes. Are his models here?
lines.chinese: 噢，对啦。他的模型在这儿吗？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: They're in my office.
lines.chinese: 在我办公室。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'd like to see them.
lines.chinese: 我想看看。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Right.
lines.chinese: 好的。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What else?
lines.chinese: 还有什么？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Come on, Sam...
lines.chinese: 过来，Sam……

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: You work hard, Susan. When was your last day off?
lines.chinese: 你太拼命工作了，Susan。 上次休假是在什么时候？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hmm. I can't remember.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我记不起来了。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: You really ought to take some time off.
lines.chinese: 的确应该休一次假。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What for?
lines.chinese: 为什么？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: To enjoy the simple things in life...
lines.chinese: 享受人生乐趣……

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I know, Sam. Maybe soon.
lines.chinese: 我知道，Sam。 也许很快就会。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: To smell the flowers.
lines.chinese: 去轻松一下。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh, wait a minute. What's today' date?
lines.chinese: 噢，等一等。今天几号？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Today is the twelfth. Why?
lines.chinese: 今天是十二号。怎么了？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It seems to me I scheduled something else.
lines.chinese: 好像我还安排了什么别的事情。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: There's nothing else in the appointment book.
lines.chinese: 在工作日程上没有别的的事了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'm sure I did. Oh, well, I'll probably remember it later.
lines.chinese: 我确信我安排了什么事情。 噢，也许过一会我会想起来。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: I hope it isn't important.
lines.chinese: 希望不是什么重要的事。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hmm. It's probably nothing. OK, let's get started. Would you call Priscilla Smith at FAO Schwarz, please?
lines.chinese: 嗯，也许没什么事。 好吧，我们开始工作。 请拨电话给FAO Schwarz 的 Priscilla Smith，好吗？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Right. Sam These are the models from the Japanese film maker.
lines.chinese: 好的。这些是那位日本电影制作人制作的模型。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Thank you. Just put them on my desk.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。  把它们放在我桌上。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: And the new drawings for the toy spaceship.
lines.chinese: 还有玩具太空船的新草图。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Wonderful. That was fast.
lines.chinese: 真精彩。 而且又快。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: We have a new artist. She's very talented.
lines.chinese: 我们找来了一位新的美工人员。 她很有才华。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What time is it, anyway? My watch stopped.
lines.chinese: 几点钟了，顺便问一下？ 我的表停了。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: It's eleven thirty.
lines.chinese: 十一点半。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What time is my lunch date with Bill Levine.
lines.chinese: 我与Bill Levine  约好的中饭时间是几点？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: One 0'clock.
lines.chinese: 一点钟。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Remind me to leave at twelve forty-five.
lines.chinese: 提醒我十二点四十五分走。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Did you remember your other appointment for today?
lines.chinese: 还记得今天的另一个约会吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: No, but I have a feeling it's going to be too late when I do remember.
lines.chinese: 记不起来了。 但我觉得 等我想起来时已经太晚了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, Sam?
lines.chinese: 什么事，Sam？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: I just solved the mystery.
lines.chinese: 我刚刚把那个谜底解开了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What did I forget?
lines.chinese: 我忘记什么？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: You have some guests in the reception room.
lines.chinese: 有几位客人在接待室等你。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What? Who?
lines.chinese: 什么？是谁？

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Mr. Harry Bennett and his daughter.
lines.chinese: 先生和他女儿。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I remember! Oh... Harry! I made a lunch date with him and his daughter weeks ago.
lines.chinese: 我记起来了！ 噢……Harry！ 几星期前我约好和他以及他女儿共进午餐。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Is he a client?
lines.chinese: 他是顾客吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: He's a friend.
lines.chinese: 他是我的一位朋友。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Well, He's here with his daughter to have lunch.
lines.chinese: 嗯，他和他女儿已到这儿等候吃午餐了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I met her at Thanksgiving, and I promised to have lunch with both of them today.
lines.chinese: 我在感恩节与她见面， 我答应今天和他们共进午餐。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Yes, indeed. What are you going to do about your appointment with Mr.Levine?
lines.chinese: 是的，原来如此。 那该怎么办 你与 Levine 先生的邀约？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Any suggestions? Oh!
lines.chinese: 有什么建议吗？ 噢！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hi, Michelle. Hello, Harry. It's nice to see you again.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Michelle。 你好，Harry。 很高兴再见到你们。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Hello.
lines.chinese: 你好。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Hi, Susan. We have both been excited about seeing you and having lunch with you today. Michelle picked these flowers out for you.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Susan。 我们两个很高兴见到你 与我们一起吃午餐。选这些花送给你。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Daddy, can we go soon?
lines.chinese: 爸爸，我们能快点走吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: We're going to go to lunch in a few minutes, honey.
lines.chinese: 我们一会就去吃午餐，亲爱的。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: But I'm thirsty.
lines.chinese: 可是我渴了。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: OK. You go out and get a drink of water at the fountain.
lines.chinese: 好。出去在饮水机那儿喝点水吧。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: The fountain is over there, Michelle. Near the Exit sign.
lines.chinese: 饮水机在那儿，Michelle。 就在出口附近。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢  。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Michelle is a little shy.
lines.chinese: 有点不好意思。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I used to be that way when I was her age. Harry, if Michelle doesn't want to go, we don't have to.
lines.chinese: 我像她这般年纪也是这样。 如果 Michelle 不想去， 我们不必勉强。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: She'll be fine. Remember, I haven't dated anyone else since her mother died. This is a little difficult for her. Are you ready to go?
lines.chinese: 她没有问题。 别忘了， 自从她母亲去世之后，我从没有和别人约会过。 这对她来说有点不习惯。准备好动身吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes. But could you wait one minute? I have a call to make. Would you excuse me?
lines.chinese: 是的。不过你能等一下吗？ 我需要打个电话。 失陪一下。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Sam, get Mr. Levine a Toytown Stores on the telephone for me, please.
lines.chinese: 给 Toytown Stores的 Levine 先生 请替我拨电话。

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.english: Right. Hello. Susan Stewart calling Mr. Levine, Susan Stewart. I find myself in an barrassing situation. I made another lunch date for today and forgot to enter it in my appointment book. Can you and I meet for drinks tomorrow? I'd really appreciate it...
