lines.english: Reading.
lines.chinese: 读书。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Reading? At this hour? Ah, come on, Robbie. What are you doing up this late?
lines.chinese: 读书？ 在这个时候？ 噢，算了吧，Robbie。 这么晚你不睡在干什么？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Things on my mind.
lines.chinese: 想一些事情。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Do you care to talk about them?
lines.chinese: 你想谈谈它们吗？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Sure, if you don't mind listening.
lines.chinese: 当然， 假如你不介意听的话。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Robbie, Robbie, remember me? I'm your mother. If you have something you want to talk about, I'm always prepared to listen.
lines.chinese: 记得我？ 我是你母亲。 假如你有什么事情要谈， 我总是准备听的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You haven't been around much lately.
lines.chinese: 最近你在家的时候不多。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: So that's it. OK, let's talk.
lines.chinese: 原来是这件事。 好，让我们谈谈。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You and Dad are like ships that pass in the night. Dad works hard, and he works late. You work hard on all your committees, and you work late.
lines.chinese: 和爸爸就像在夜里交错而过的船一样。 爸爸工作忙，而且忙到很晚。 而你总是在各种委员会忙， 也工作到很晚。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I thought you were proud of the work I do.
lines.chinese: 我还以为你为我所做的工作感到骄傲呢。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I am, Mom. Real proud. You are one fantastic mom, but...but I've been noticing how little quality time you spend with Dad and me... and the family.
lines.chinese: 我确实感到骄傲，妈妈。 真的骄傲。 你是一位好母亲。 但……但我注意到 黄金时光太少了 和父亲，我……及全家人共度的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: It's a real problem, Robbie. I know it.
lines.chinese: 这确实是个问题，Robbie。 我知道。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm concerned. There must be a way that Day and you can spend more time together.
lines.chinese: 我很担心。 总该有个办法 能使你和爸爸有更多时间在一起。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, we always talk about taking a vacation together with the family.
lines.chinese: 说的也是，我们常在谈论 要一起渡个假---和全家一起。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I think you ought to take a vacation away from the family-alone. Kind of a second honeymoon.
lines.chinese: 我觉得你们应该 离开家人而单独在一起渡个假。 类似二度蜜月的假期。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: It would be wonderful, but our schedules won't allow it.
lines.chinese: 那倒是很美妙， 但我们的工作时间表不允许这样。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I think I have an idea.
lines.chinese: 我有一个主意。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You do?
lines.chinese: 真的？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yup. I think I have an idea that will bring Dad and you together in a more scheduled way.
lines.chinese: 是的。 我想我有一个办法 使你和爸爸 能更定时在一起。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: What is it?
lines.chinese: 是什么主意？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, you know how Dad is always talking about the kids in the ward and how important it is for them to be paid attention to?
lines.chinese: 噢， 知道爸爸时常谈起 住院的孩子们 以及他们何等需要受人关怀？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well...and how hard it i because the doctors and murses are so busy?
lines.chinese: 好…… 他还说这件事很难 因为医生和护士们都非常忙？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, how would it be if you took some time to work with Dad towards solving that problem?
lines.chinese: 好，那你花些时间 和爸爸一起来解决这个问题怎么样？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I don't get it.
lines.chinese: 我不懂你的话。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Like setting up a regular weekly reading program. You and Dad. You and Dr.Philip Stewart-going to the children's ward once or twice a week and reading to them.
lines.chinese: 譬如说开办一项每周一次的定期阅读计划。 你和爸爸。 和 Philip Stewart 医生--- 每星期就去小儿科病房一两次 为他们朗读。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Not bad. Not a bad idea, Robbie. As a matter of fact, it fits right in with something I'm working on right now with the school-board committee.
lines.chinese: 不错。 蛮好的主意，Robbie。 事实上  ， 这跟我正在进行的某项小组工作不谋而合 与联合校董事会有关。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: What's that?
lines.chinese: 什么样的工作？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I've been trying to work out a program in the public school that will bring parents and teachers together once a week to read to the students-their own children, really. By doing that, it will encourage reading.
lines.chinese: 我一直努力 想研拟一项计划 在公立学校中 让家长们及教师每星期一次 共同为学生们---其实就是他们自己的孩子朗读。 这样做能鼓励阅读。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: So it might fit in with a program for reading to the kids in the hospital.
lines.chinese: 所以这个跟计划相当吻合 为住院的孩子朗读。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You're right. We'll do it! I'm going to talk to Daddy about it right now.
lines.chinese: 你说得对。 我们就来进行吧！ 我现在就去跟爸爸谈谈这件事。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: But Dad was so exhausted when he came home from work. Why don't you talk to him about it tomorrow?
lines.chinese: 但爸爸工作回来时已经累得不得了。 何不明天再跟他谈？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You are a very smart young man, Robbie. I think I'll wait until tomorrow.
lines.chinese: 你是个绝顶聪明的年轻人，Robbie。 我想我就等明天再谈。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You won't forget, will you?
lines.chinese: 不会忘记吧？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Believe me, I won't. It is a great idea, and I promise you I won't forget.
lines.chinese: 放心，我不会的。 这是个极好的主意。 我向你保证我不会忘的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Mom.
lines.chinese: 谢谢，妈妈。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Thank you, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你，Robbie。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Good morning. What a wonderful morning! Don't the flowers smell wonderful?
lines.chinese: 早安。 多么美好的早晨！ 花儿闻起来好香，不是吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Good morning, Ellen. Yes, they do. That's why I'm reading my paper and having my coffee on the patio this morning. Ah, it does smell sweet. How was your school- board meeting last night? You must've come home very late.
lines.chinese: 早安，Ellen。 是的，花儿好香。 这就是今天早上为什么我看报纸喝咖啡 要在院子里。 噢，它们确实很香。 昨天晚上你们的联合校董事会会议开得怎么样？ 你一定很晚才回家。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Did you find the sandwich I made for you?
lines.chinese: 你找到我为你做的三明治了？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Thanks, dear. I was so tired I didn't even finish it.
lines.chinese: 谢谢，亲爱的。 我太累了。 没有能吃完它。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Philip, I've been working on this special project with the school board, and I'd like your opinion about it.
lines.chinese: 我一直在研拟一项特别计划 和联合校董事会一起， 我需要你的意见。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What is it?
lines.chinese: 是个什么样的计划？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I've been trying to find a way to encourage reading.
lines.chinese: 我一直在寻求 鼓励阅读的办法。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Good luck!
lines.chinese: 祝你好运！

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, I think I may have found a way to do it.
lines.chinese: 噢，我想我也许已找到一种办法。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Tell me about it. I work with families every day, Ellen. I see how people spend their leisure time-young and old.
lines.chinese: 说给我听吧。 我每天的工作就是接触一些家庭，Ellen。 我看到人们怎样利用空闲时间---不管是年轻的还是年老的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Mostly watching television. Well, that would be OK if , and I repeat, if people took the time to read.
lines.chinese: 大部分是看电视。 那倒没有什么关系。 只要，我重复一遍， 只要人们肯花时间去阅读。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I couldn't agree with you more.
lines.chinese: 我彻底同意你的看法。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: The question is, how do we get them to read more?
lines.chinese: 问题是， 我们怎样才能使他们多阅读？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I think you're going to give me the answer to tha question. You have that looking your eye.
lines.chinese: 我想 是要给我这个问题一个答案。 你的眼睛显示出你已有了答案。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I do have an answer, Philip. Or at least I think I do.
lines.chinese: 我确实有一个答案，Philip。 至少我想我有了答案。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, tell me about it.
lines.chinese: 那么，告诉我吧。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: The plan is a simple one. Involve the entire family in a reading project.
lines.chinese: 计划很简单。 让整个家庭都参与阅读计划。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: In the home?
lines.chinese: 在家中？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes, in the home. But first in the school-rooms.
lines.chinese: 是的，在家中。 但首先是在教室里。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Hmm, interesting. But how do you plan to do that?
lines.chinese: 嗯，有意思。 但你预备怎么做呢？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: By arranging with the public schools to schedule one hour a week-to start with. During that time parents are invited to attend-and to read along with the children- their children.
lines.chinese: 首先从公立学校开始 安排一星期一个小时。 在那一小时 家长被邀请来参加--- 和孩子们---他们的孩子们一起阅读。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: It can go beyond the school system, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 这可以推广到学校体制以外，Ellen。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Really?
lines.chinese: 真的？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I guarantee you it would go very in the hospitals. My patients-mostly kids-would love to read and be read to.
lines.chinese: 我保证在医院这种计划会推行得很好。 我的病人---大多数是孩子--- 会喜欢阅读并且喜欢别人读给他们听。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You think so?
lines.chinese: 你想会是这样吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I know so.
lines.chinese: 我确定知道是这样。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: May be we can experiment with your patients and see how the plan works.
lines.chinese: 也许我们可以在你的病人中试一试。 看看这项计划实施得如何。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I love the idea. Would you work with me?
lines.chinese: 我喜欢这个主意。 你愿意和我一起来做吗？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I would love to, Philip.
lines.chinese: 我当然愿意，Philip。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: And that way, we'll spend more time together, Ellen. We just don't see each other anymore.
lines.chinese: 而且那样的话， 我们会有更多的时间在一起，Ellen。 我们彼此差不多见不到面了。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You and I are very busy these days. This is true. We need to find time to be together more, to do things together more-you and I. This would be a wonderful way to accomplish that.
lines.chinese: 这些天来我们俩都很忙。 这倒是事实。 我们确实需要多找时间相聚一块， 也需要多在一起工作。 这倒是达到这个目的的绝佳办法。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I have a question.
lines.chinese: 我有一个问题。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 是吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What do we read?
lines.chinese: 我们读些什么呢？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: To the patients in the ward?
lines.chinese: 读给病房里的病人？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, let you and I talk about it. What would you like to read to them?
lines.chinese: 好， 我们就来讨论一下。 你想读些什么给他们听？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Mrs. Stewart and I will read a poem by Robert Frost.
lines.chinese: 太太和我 要朗读 Robert Frost 作的一首诗。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: It's called "Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening."
lines.chinese: 它的题目是 雪夜林边小驻”  。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Would you begin, Ellen?
lines.chinese: 请你开始，Ellen  ？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: All right. "Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening"by Robert Frost. Whose woods these are I think I know. His house is in the village though; He will not see me stopping here To watch his woods fill up with snow.
lines.chinese: 好的。 雪夜林边小驻” 作。这是谁的林子我想我知道。虽然他的屋子是在村子里；他不会看到我驻足此地注视他落满雪花的林子。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: My little horse must think it queer. To stop without a farmhouse near Between the woods and frozen lake. The darkest evening of the year.
lines.chinese: 我的小马一定感到奇怪为何停在没有农舍的地方就在林子和冰湖之间在这一年中最漆黑的夜晚。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: He gives his harness bells a shake To ask if there is some mistake. The only other sound's the sweep Of easy wind and downy flake.
lines.chinese: 他摇动绳上的铃铛想问问是否搞错了。徐风掠过和细雪纷飞徐风掠过和细雪纷飞。

lines.speaker: Ellen&Philip
lines.english: The woods are lovely, dark and deep, But I have promises to keep, And miles to go before I sleep, And miles to go before I sleep.
lines.chinese: 林子迷人，漆黑而深邃，但是我有约要赴，在我就寝前还得赶许多里路，在我就寝前还得赶许多里路。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: You two belong on stage! That was wonderful!
lines.chinese: 你们俩简直是职业演员！读得太棒了！

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Grandpa!
lines.chinese: 爷爷！

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Dad...Robbie. When did you come?
lines.chinese: 爸爸……Robbie。你们什么时候来的？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: We've been listening to you both. These are lucky kids.
lines.chinese: 我们一直在听你们朗诵。 这是一群幸运的孩子。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Do you enjoy reading together?
lines.chinese: 你们喜欢在一起朗诵吗？

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, we may read together aloud at home.
lines.chinese: 嗯，我们或许可以在家里一起大声朗诵。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: You were right, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 你做对了，Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know.
lines.chinese: 我知道。

english_title: A Big Fish in a Little Pond

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I really like this one Susan. Do you?
lines.chinese: 我真的很喜欢这一件，你呢？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Turn around, Michelle. Let me see the back of it. I like it a lot. It fits well. It doesn't need any alterations. We must've bought the right size.
lines.chinese: 转过去一下 Michelle。让我看看它的背面。 我非常喜欢。它很合身。 不需作任何修改。我们一定是买对了尺寸。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I like the color. She looks good in blue.
lines.chinese: 我喜欢这颜色。她穿蓝色的很好看。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I like blue, too, Daddy.
lines.chinese: 我也喜欢蓝色的，爸爸。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Try on the skirt and blouse outfit, Michelle-the one that Daddy wanted you to wear.
lines.chinese: 试试上衣和裙子的那一套吧，Michelle---- 爸爸要你穿的那一套。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Michelle has been a different kid since we've been married. She's never been happier.
lines.chinese: 好的。 自从我们结婚之后，Michelle 变成另一个人了。 她从来没有像现在这样快乐过。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And I've never been happier, Harry. I love her very much.She's been a joy.
lines.chinese: 我也从来没有这样快乐过，Harry。 我很爱她。她是个讨人喜欢的孩子。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: We're very lucky, the three of us...and becoming part of the Stewart family, too.
lines.chinese: 我们非常幸运，我们三个… 而且成为 Stewart 家庭的一份子。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: We couldn't ask for anything more, could we?
lines.chinese: 我们再没什么可求的了，对吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Well...

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Well...? Could we ask for anything more?
lines.chinese: 嗯……？我们还有什么可求的？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Well...we...
lines.chinese: 嗯……我们……

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: How do you like it, Daddy?
lines.chinese: 你觉得怎样，爸爸？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: It's my favorite outfit.
lines.chinese: 这是我喜欢的那一套。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It's good for every day. It will be good for school, Michelle.
lines.chinese: 这套衣服每天都可以穿。它适合上学时穿，Michelle  。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I like it, too. I always like skirts that go like this. Do you want to see the winter jacket on me, Susan?
lines.chinese: 我也喜欢它。我一直喜欢像这样飘动的裙子。 想看看我穿上冬季的夹克怎样吗，Susan?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, I do. Change back into your jeans, and put on the new winter jacket we bought today.
lines.chinese: 是的，我想看看。换回你的牛仔， 也把我们今天买的冬季夹克穿上。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What did you mean by"well...?" You had something on your mind when I said we couldn't ask for anything more.
lines.chinese: 好的。 你说“嗯……”的意思是什么？ 你显然有话要说 在我说我们再没什么可求的了的时候。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Is everything all right?
lines.chinese: 一切都好吗？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Everything is fine, Michelle.
lines.chinese: 一切都好，Michelle。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Let's take a look at the winter jacket. Come on over here, Honey.
lines.chinese: 让我们看看冬季夹克。到这儿来，亲爱的。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: It's kind of warm.
lines.chinese: 它很暖和。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It is. That's why we bought it for you. This will be a perfect jacket for the wintertime when it's very cold out. But it's kind of small also. We must've bought the wrong size.
lines.chinese: 是的。这就是我们买给你的原因。 这一件夹克就很适合 冬天外面很冷的时候。 但它也有点小了。我们一定买错了尺寸。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Looks like we should've bought a bigger one. I guess we'll have to exchange it, too. I'm sure the store has others.
lines.chinese: 看来我们应该买一件大些的。 我想我们还得去换一件。 我相信那家店一定还有其它的尺寸。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I look silly! It is too small!
lines.chinese: 我看来很滑稽！它太小！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: You're growing so fast, Michelle.
lines.chinese: 你长得太快了，Michelle。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Can I take it off? I'm hot!
lines.chinese: 我可以脱掉吗？我好热！

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Sure. Put it back in your room, and we'll hang everything up later.
lines.chinese: 当然。将它放回你的房间，过一会儿我们来一件件收起来。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Well, are you going to tell me what's on you mind, Harry?
lines.chinese: 好了，你要不要告诉我你在想什么， Harry?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I have been offered a job with a major accounting company in Los Angeles. I have been offered a job with a major accounting company in Los Angeles.
lines.chinese: 有一家大会计公司提供我一个工作 在 Los Angeles。 这可是个大决定。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Los Angeles? That's a big decision.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I know. It will also affect you and your job, if we decide to go.
lines.chinese: 我知道。假如我们决定去的话，也会影响到你和你的工作。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Wow! It sure will. But first tell me about the job, Harry. If it's a good one, then we'll make it work for us.
lines.chinese: 喔！当然会。但首先告诉我是什么样的工作，Harry？ 假如它是个好工作，我们就顺水推舟。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I have a client in the garment business, on Seventh Avenue. I do his taxes every year. He has a big sales office in Los Angeles, and the company in Los Angeles that does his major accounting work is looking for an executive. And he recommended me.
lines.chinese: 我有个客户在 Seventh Avenue 从事成衣生意。 我每年为他处理税务。 他在 Los Angeles 有一个大的销售办事处， 而在 Los Angeles 承办他主要会计工作的那家公司 正在物色一位主管。他推荐了我。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: That's wonderful, Harry.
lines.chinese: 那太棒了，Harry。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Yes, but it would mean that we'd have to move to L.A.
lines.chinese: 是的。但这意味着我们必须搬到 Los Angeles？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What about the salary?
lines.chinese: 薪水怎么样？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: The real discussion comes tomorrow. Susan, I don't plan to make any decisons until I have a chance to talk with you about it.
lines.chinese: 明天才会正式商谈。 我不打算做决定， 除非我有机会跟你谈过。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I understand, Harry.
lines.chinese: 我了解，Harry。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: And I don't have to make a quick decision. They know that I'm married and that I have a family.
lines.chinese: 而且我也不需要很快下决定。 他们知道我结婚了，有一个家。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Well, there's a lot think about. If it's a good job, then I've got to do some thinking about my career opportunities in Los Angeles.
lines.chinese: 噢，有许多事需要考虑。 假如它是个好工作。 那么我就必须考虑考虑我在 Los Angeles 的事业机会。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Is everything OK?
lines.chinese: 一切都好吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, honey.
lines.chinese: 是的，亲爱的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Hello. Hello there. Are you ready for lunch with your grandpa?
lines.chinese: 哈。哈。准备好跟你的祖父一起吃午饭？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh! Hi, Grandpa. Yes, of course, I am, but my mind isn't.
lines.chinese: 噢！嗨，爷爷。是的，当然，我准备好了，但是有点心烦。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: What's the matter, Susan?
lines.chinese: 怎么了，Susan?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: A real dilemma.
lines.chinese: 一个大伤脑筋的事。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Does it have anything to do with you and Harry?
lines.chinese: 是关于你和 Harry 的事吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yes, but I don't know where to start.
lines.chinese: 是的，但我不知道从何说起。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Maybe I can help. Tell me what it is, Susan.
lines.chinese: 也许我能帮忙。说给我听听，Susan。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Thanks, Grandpa. Please sit down, Oh! Harry has been offered a job in Los Angeles.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你，爷爷。请坐。 噢，有人聘请 Harry到 Los Angeles 工作。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well, this something to think about.
lines.chinese: 噢，这种事确实需要想一想。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: There are so many things to consider. There's Michelle. I wonder if a move would be a bad thing for her. And my job. I don't know if I can get a good job in Los Angeles. And what about our family?
lines.chinese: 要考虑的事太多了。首先是 Michelle。 我不知道搬家对她来说是否是件坏事。还有我的工作。 我不知道我能否在 Los Angeles 找到好工作。 另外就是我们家的人怎么办？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Can I tell you what I think?
lines.chinese: 让我来告诉你我的想法好吗？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Tell me.
lines.chinese: 告诉我吧。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I think that you're very successful and that you have a fantastic reputation in the toy industry. I think you could talk to Mr. Marchetta, and I think he could help you find a real good job in Los Angeles. He was very helpful to me, remember?
lines.chinese: 我认为你事业有成 而且在玩具界有很好的声誉。 我想你可以跟 Marchetta先生谈谈， 我觉得 他能够帮你在 Los Angeles 找个很好的工作。 他帮过我大忙，你记得？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I suppose I could call him. But I'm not so sure that I want to leave New York, you, and the rest of our family.
lines.chinese: 我想我可以打个电话给他。 但我不能确定我真想离开纽约， 你，和我们家的其他人。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well, I'm not going to kid you, Susan. You know we'd all miss you. But this should be your decision. It's something that only you and Harry can work out.
lines.chinese: 噢，我可不想哄你，Susan。 你知道我们都会思念你。 但这必须由你做决定。 这件事只有你和 Harry才能定夺。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: If moving to L.A.is in Harry's best interest, I have to do what I can do to support him.
lines.chinese: 假如搬到L.A.对 Harry最有利的话， 我就应该尽我的力量来支持他。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: In every marriage, sacrifices have to be made by one partner from time to time.
lines.chinese: 在婚姻中， 总要有一方必须不时做些调整。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And what about Michelle?
lines.chinese: 那 Michelle怎么办？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well, What do you think?
lines.chinese: 嗯，你觉得怎样？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I think Michelle is better off staying where she is.
lines.chinese: 我觉得 Michelle呆在原地比较好。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: What does she think?
lines.chinese: 她怎么想呢？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I don't know for sure.
lines.chinese: 我不太清楚。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Well, you'll have to ask her.
lines.chinese: 噢，应当问问她。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I think I'm going to have a talk with Mr. Marchetta and get his feelings about my leaving. And about helping me find a job in Los Angeles.
lines.chinese: 我想我要跟 Marchetta 先生谈谈 征求他关于我离开的意见。 请他帮我在 Los Angeles 找一份工作。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Good idea.
lines.chinese: 好主意。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'll call him right now. No point in delaying. Thanks.Grandpa.
lines.chinese: 我现在就打给他。没有道理拖拉。 谢谢你，爷爷。

lines.speaker: Bill
lines.english: Harry, it's the perfect job for you. You'll love it.
lines.chinese: 那是最适合你的工作。你会喜欢的。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: It's a big decision for me, Bill. And I have to discuss it with my wife. I don't know if it's right for her. BIll： She'll love it. It's a once-in-a-lifetime offer, Harry.
lines.chinese: 这对我来说是个大决定，Bill。 我必须跟我的太太讨论。 我不知道这事对她是否恰当。她也会喜欢的。这是个千载难逢的机会， Harry。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: OK. Tell it to me again. BIll： The company is Craft and Craft, the biggest accounting company in the country.
lines.chinese: 好吧。再说给我听听。这家公司叫 Craft and Craft ， 是全国最大的会计公司。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I know the company well. It's big.
lines.chinese: 这家公司我很清楚。是大公司。

lines.speaker: Bill
lines.english: The biggest.
lines.chinese: 最大的。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Yeah, yeah. The biggest. When do I have to let you know?
lines.chinese: 是的，是的。最大的。我什么时候该给你回音？

lines.speaker: Bill
lines.english: Talk it over. Think it over. Let me know by the end of the week.
lines.chinese: 好好地谈一谈。好好地想一想。这个周末以前让我知道你的决定。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: When would we have to move?
lines.chinese: 什么时候我们得搬家？

lines.speaker: Bill
lines.english: As soon as possible.
lines.chinese: 越快越好。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I also have my daughter to consider. I don't want to interrupt her school year.
lines.chinese: 我还要考虑我女儿。 我不愿意打断她这个学年。

lines.speaker: Bill
lines.english: Let me know by the end of the week. It's a great opportunity for you, Harry. Believe me.
lines.chinese: 这个周末前给我回音。 这对你是个大好机会，Harry。 相信我。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I know. BIll： Craft and Craft is the biggest in the country.
lines.chinese: 我知道。是全国最大的。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Yeah, I know. The biggest.
lines.chinese: 是的，我知道。最大的

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I think Michelle is asleep now. Let's talk.
lines.chinese: 我想 Michelle 现在睡着了。让我们谈谈吧。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I met with Bill York today.
lines.chinese: 今天我跟 Bill York 会面了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And I talked with Mr. Marchetta. Did York make the offer?
lines.chinese: 我也和Marchetta 先生谈了。York 是否跟你谈那个工作机会？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Yup. He asked me if I want the job.
lines.chinese: 是的。他问我要不要接受那份工作。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: That's exciting, Harry. What was it?
lines.chinese: 太令人兴奋了，Harry。是什么样的工作？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: A vice-presidency with the biggest accounting company in th country-Craft and Craft.
lines.chinese: 副总裁 全国最大的会计公司---

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Aren't you excited about that?
lines.chinese: 你不感到兴奋？

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Sure I am. But there's so much more to consider.
lines.chinese: 我当然兴奋。但是还有那么多问题需要考虑。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I talked to Mr. Marchtta.
lines.chinese: 我跟 Marchetta 先生谈了。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: What did he say? Did you tell him about me?
lines.chinese: 他怎么说？

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Of course, Harry. I want what's best for you, and I think I can get a good job through Mr. Marchetta inoios Amgeles also.
lines.chinese: 当然，Harry。我要的是对你最有利的事， 而且我想我也可以找到一份好工作 通过 Marchetta先生的帮助 在 Los Angeles。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: You're kidding.
lines.chinese: 你在说笑吧。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: No, I'm not kidding. I talked with him, and he understands completely. He has a major toy buyer in Los Angeles, and he's pretty sure that I can get a good job there.
lines.chinese: 不,我不是在说笑。 我与他谈了,他完全了解。 他在 Los Angeles 有一个玩具大买主, 他相当肯定我可以在那儿弄到一份好工作。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Unbelievable!
lines.chinese: 真不敢相信!

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: But I think we should talk to Michelle about all of this.
lines.chinese: 但我认为我们应该跟 Micelle 谈谈这整件事。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: You're right. We'll talk to her about it.
lines.chinese: 说得对。我们要跟她谈谈。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And how do you feel about taking the job in Los Angeles?
lines.chinese: 你对于到 Los Angeles 接受这份工作有何感想?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: How should I feel? It's the biggest company in the country.
lines.chinese: 我该作何感想? 它是全国最大的公司。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Well, then you feel good about taking it?
lines.chinese: 嗯,那你觉得接受它很对?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Well... I feel fine about it. Why shouldn't I?
lines.chinese: 嗯……我觉得不错。为什么不呢?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I love my school. I have so many good friends there now. I wouldn't miss a day even if I were really sick.
lines.chinese: 我喜欢我的学校。我现在有那么多好朋友在那儿。 即使我真的病了也不想错过一天。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Come and sit down for a minute, Michelle. I'd like to talk to you about something. Something important.
lines.chinese: 过来坐一会儿, Michelle 。 我想跟你谈一件事。 一件重要的事。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: What's wrong, Susan?
lines.chinese: 有什么问题吗,Susan?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh, there's nothing wrong, Michelle. But your dady and I are talking about something that I'd like your opinion about.
lines.chinese: 噢,没什么,Michelle。 但你爸爸和我正在讨论一件事 我需要你的意见。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I know. I heard you talking about it the other night when I was trying on my new clothes. It's about moving to Los Angeles.
lines.chinese: 我知道。我听到你们谈论的那件事 也就是我试新衣服的那天晚上。 是关于搬家到 Los Angeles 的事。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: You're right. How do you feel about it?
lines.chinese: 说对了。你觉得怎么样?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Well, I really wouldn't want to move, but...
lines.chinese: 噢,我实在不愿意搬家,但是…

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: But?
lines.chinese: 但是什么?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: But if you and Daddy wanted to, I guess you know what's best for the family and for me.
lines.chinese: 但是假如你和爸爸想搬的, 我猜想你们一定知道怎样做对整个家庭和我是最有利的。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: That's very considerate of you, Michelle. But what about your friends?
lines.chinese: 真会体谅别人,Michelle。 但你的朋友怎么办?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I'd miss them a lot, but I know what it feels like to miss someone.
lines.chinese: 我会非常想念他们, 但我知道想念一个人是什么样的滋味。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Honey, we don't have to move if you're no going to be happy about it.
lines.chinese: 亲爱的,我们将不搬 假如你会因为这种事而不快乐的话。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Does Daddy want to move?
lines.chinese: 爸爸想要搬吗?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I think so. He's going to tell us tonight about the job offer.
lines.chinese: 我想是这样。他今天晚上会告诉我们关于那份工作的事。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Well, how was everybody's day today?
lines.chinese: 喂,今天各位过得怎么样?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Michelle was chosen to do the school poster for the play this year.
lines.chinese: 被挑选去 做今年学校话剧的海报。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Congratulations, Michelle! That's something! And how was your day, Susan?
lines.chinese: 恭喜,Michelle!太好了! 那你今天过得怎么样, Susan?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I see you're in a good mood. Why don't you tell us about your day.
lines.chinese: 我看你心情很好。 何不告诉我们你这一天过得如何?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I met with Bill York.
lines.chinese: 我与Bill York 会面了。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It's OK to talk about it, Harry. Michelle knows all about it.
lines.chinese: 这件事可以摊开来谈,Harry。 已经全知道了。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Really?
lines.chinese: 真的?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Really, Harry. Michelle and I have all kinds of feelings about leaving New York, the family, and friends. But is you think you should take the job, we're behind you.
lines.chinese: 真的,Harry。 和我感触很多 对于离开纽约的家人,朋友。 但如果你认为你应该接受这份工作,  我们支持你。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: What about Michelle's school?
lines.chinese: 那Michelle 的学校怎么办?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: We'll move after the school term.
lines.chinese: 我们等这学期结束后再搬。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: What about her new friends?
lines.chinese: 那她的新朋友?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: I'll make new friends wherever we are as lon as we're together.
lines.chinese: 只要我们能在一起无论在哪儿我都能交到新朋友。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: We're a family, Harry. Whatever you think is right for you is right for us.
lines.chinese: 我们是一家人,Harry。 你认为对你是好的对我们来说也是好的。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I am so touched. The two of you are really something.
lines.chinese: 我太感动了。你们俩个真是了不起。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: We love you, Daddy.
lines.chinese: 我们爱你,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: And I love you.
lines.chinese: 我也爱你们。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: OK. Now, tell us about your talk with Mr. York. Did you take the job?
lines.chinese: 好啦,现在告诉我们你跟 York 先生的谈话吧。 你接受了那份工作?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Nope. M ichelle： What?
lines.chinese: 没有。 什么?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: No? You didn't take it?
lines.chinese: 没有?你没有接受?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: No, I did not take the job.
lines.chinese: 对,我没有接受那份工作。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: But, Daddy, I thought...
lines.chinese: 但是,爸爸,我想……

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Harry, you didn't turn it down because of me...
lines.chinese: 你拒绝它该不是因为我……

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Or me?
lines.chinese: 或者我?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: No, no. I turned it down because of me.
lines.chinese: 不,不。我因为我自己而拒绝了它。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: How's that?
lines.chinese: 这是怎么一回事?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: Well, I began to think about you and about Michelle, and then I asked myself, do I really want to work for the biggest company in the country?
lines.chinese: 噢,我开始想到你和 Michelle, 然后我问自己, 我真的想替全国最大的公司工作?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And?
lines.chinese: 结果呢?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: And I don't. I went into business for myself because I like being my own boss. I run my own company. I'm a big fish in a little pond. I'm not really sure I want to be a little fish in a big pond.
lines.chinese: 我不想这样。 我当初自己开公司 是因为我喜欢自己当老板。我经营自己的公司。我是一条小池里的大鱼。 我不是真的很确定我想成为一条大池里的小鱼。

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Oh, Daddy, does that mean we don't have to move?
lines.chinese: 噢,爸爸,你的意思是我们不必搬家?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: That's right, sweetheart.
lines.chinese: 是的,宝贝。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Are you sure?
lines.chinese: 你确定?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: I couldn't be more sure, Susan.
lines.chinese: 我再确定不过了,Susan。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I'm glad if you are, Harry.
lines.chinese: 假如你很确定我就高兴, Harry。

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: And besides, how could I live in Los Angeles when all my favorite people live here?
lines.chinese: 更何况, 我怎么能住在 Los Angeles 而所有我喜欢的人都在这儿?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Your favorite people?
lines.chinese: 你喜欢的人?

lines.speaker: Michelle
lines.english: Who's that?
lines.chinese: 谁呀?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.english: The Stewart family, of course.
lines.chinese: 当然是 Stewart 一家人。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: "Rock-a-bye, baby, on the tree top, When the wind blows. The cradle will rock. When the bough breaks, The cradle will fall, And down will come baby, Cradle and all."
lines.chinese: 摇呀摇,小宝宝,在树顶， 风儿轻轻吹， 摇篮跟着晃。 树枝若折断， 摇篮会掉落， 宝宝跌下来， 摇篮一道摔。”

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Hi, Marilyn. What are you doing?
lines.chinese: 嗨，Marilyn。 你在做什么？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Just sketching. I've been thinking a lot about our responsibilities in the past few weeks.
lines.chinese: 只是画些草图。 我对于我们的职责想了很久 在最近几个星期。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I never stop thinking about them.
lines.chinese: 我一直在思考这些问题从未间断。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I've been wrestling with question of whether I go back to work or not.
lines.chinese: 我一直左思右想 为我是否回去工作这个问题。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I see.
lines.chinese: 这一下我明白了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: And I'm torn. I really want to go back to work, use my talents, and pursue my career in fashion design like we as a fulltime mother, especially when he's a baby.
lines.chinese: 但我不知如何取舍。 我真的想回去工作， 发挥我的才智， 追求我在时装设计方面的事情 就像我们一向认定的那样。 但是现在…… 我又想和Max 在一起做个全职的母亲， 特别是当他还是个婴儿的时候。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I really understand, Marilyn, But you never have to worry about Max. There's Mother and Grandpa...and I can always arrange my photo schedule around your schedule, if that will help.
lines.chinese: 我真的能理解，Marilyn。 但你根本不用担心 Max。 有妈妈和祖父呢…… 而且我也能随时安排我的摄影工作 配合你的时间表， 假如那样有所帮助的话。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It's not the same, Richard.
lines.chinese: 那是不一样的，Richard。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Have you discussed going back to work with your boss?
lines.chinese: 你已跟你的老板讨论过回去工作的事？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Rita Mae called yesterday.
lines.chinese: 昨天打电话来了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: Ah! That's what's got you thinking, isn't it?
lines.chinese: 噢，就是那通电话使你开始思量起来的，是吗？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: She wants to know when I think I'll be returning to the boutique.
lines.chinese: 她想知道 我打算什么时候回去时装店工作。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: And you said...?
lines.chinese: 那你怎么说的……？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I said I'd give her an answer in a few days...that I wasn't sure.
lines.chinese: 我说这几天给她回答…… 我说我不能确定。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I'm sure Rita Mae will understand and wait until you're ready to go back to work.
lines.chinese: 我相信 Rita Mae会理解 而且会等你准备好了才回去工作。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Well, maybe she will, and maybe she won't. Who knows? If I don't accept her offer, maybe she'll find someone else in the meantime, and when I'm ready to go back, there won't be a job for me.
lines.chinese: 嗯，也许她会，也许她不会。 谁知道？ 假如我不接受她这个工作机会， 她也许会在这段时间找别的人， 而当我准备好要回去， 已经没有空缺了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: That's something to consider. You've got yourself to think about, too.
lines.chinese: 这是需要考虑的一点。 你也得为自己着想。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: But I am thinking about myself. Don't you see?
lines.chinese: 但我就是在为自己着想呀。 你不知道吗？

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: What do you mean?
lines.chinese: 是什么意思？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It's not just the job. It's also my career as Max's mother. That's the way I look at it. I have two career opportunities at the same time. My career as a fashion Designer and my career as a mother.
lines.chinese: 不只是那项工作而已。 当 Max 的母亲也是我的职业。 我就是这么看这件事的。我同时有两个事业机会。 时装设计事业 和担任 Max母亲的事业。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I never really thought about being a mother as a career. I guess you do have two career opportunities and a decision to make.
lines.chinese: 我真的从来没有想到做母亲还是一种事业。 我想你的确是有两个事业机会而且必须做一个抉择。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I hear Max.
lines.chinese: 我听到 Max哭了。

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.english: I'll go to him.
lines.chinese: 我去。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: No, that's OK. I'll do it.
lines.chinese: 不，没关系。 我去。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: There's your teddy bear, Max.
lines.chinese: 这是你的玩具熊，Max。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: He just loves that teddy bear that Grandpa Philip bought for him.
lines.chinese: 他就喜欢这个玩具熊 祖父 Philip 给他买的。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I took him to Philip's office yesterday for a checkup. You should have seen the look on his face when Molly gave him the injection.
lines.chinese: 我昨天带他到 Philip 的办公室去做检查。 真该看看他脸上的表情当Molly给他打针时。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, did he cry?
lines.chinese: 噢，他哭了吗？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: No, My dear little boy just looked up at me as if to say, "Mama, what are they doing to me? Help!"
lines.chinese: 没有。 我亲爱的小男孩只是仰头看着我好像在说 妈妈，他们在对我做什么？救命呀！”

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: How did you feel? Tell the truth didn't you feel terrible?
lines.chinese: 感觉怎么样？ 告诉我实话。 没有感到可怕吗？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I sure did. I held him closely. I kissed the top of his dear little head. He looked up at me. He tried to smile. Being with him helped.
lines.chinese: 我的确有。 我紧紧地抱着他。 我吻着他可爱的小头顶。 他仰头看我。他设法要微笑。 和他在一起有帮助。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Helped him? Or helped you?
lines.chinese: 帮助他？ 还是帮助你？

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Being a mother is not easy, if that's what you mean.
lines.chinese: 当一个母亲真不容易， 是这个意思吧。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Speaking of being a mother, I've been meaning to ask you what you were thinking about regarding going back to work. I know Rita Mae called. I can imagine what is going through your head.
lines.chinese: 谈到当母亲 我一直想问 你是否打算回去工作。 我知道 Rita Mae 打电话给你了。 我能想像你的头脑正在考虑什么事。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm sure you can, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 说的没错，Ellen。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: There are so many things to consider. One thing that makes it easier for you is that you have us. Max will always have a family member to watch over him while you're at work. I didn't have that when Richard and Susan were born.
lines.chinese: 是有许多事情要考虑。 有一件事可以使做起决定来比较容易 就是有我们帮忙。 家里总会有一个人照顾 Max 在你工作的时候。 在 Richard和 Susan 出生时我可没有人帮忙。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: What did you do?
lines.chinese: 那你怎么办呢？

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I chose to continue with my career as a music teacher. We hired a woman to watch Richard and then Susan, and I continued with my career.
lines.chinese: 我选择继续我的音乐教师的事业。 我们雇用一名女士来照顾 Richard  后来又照顾 Susan， 而我则继续我的事业。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Do you think you made the right decision?
lines.chinese: 你认为你的决定正确吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I think I did. But when Robbie was born, I decided to give fulltime attention to raising Robbie. I felt differently at that time.
lines.chinese: 我想是的。 但当 Robbie 出生后, 我决定全力抚育他。 那时我的感觉又不一样了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: And you gave up your career as a music teacher?
lines.chinese: 那么你就放弃了音乐教师的事业?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Not exactly. I continued to teach piano lessons at home.
lines.chinese: 不完全。 我继续在家教钢琴。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: How did you feel about being away when Susan and Richard were babies?
lines.chinese: 对出外工作有何感想 当Richard和 Susan 还很小时 ?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I think I did the right thing for them and for myself and for Philip. We needed the money. Remember?
lines.chinese: 我觉得我做了一件对的事 为他们也为我自己和 Philip。 我们当时需要钱。 记得吗?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Well, we do too, Ellen. Everything I earn helps us towards getting that house we want and need.
lines.chinese: 嗯,我们也需要,Ellen。 我的每一笔进帐都可帮助我们得到那幢房 我们盼望而且也需要的。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I can't wait till he's just a little older. Our toy company makes the most wonderful toys for kids.
lines.chinese: 我迫不及待地希望他长大些。 我们玩具公司为小孩子们造最棒的玩具。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Max thanks you. I thank you. And Ricard thanks you. Now may I please say hello?
lines.chinese: 谢谢你。 我也感谢你。 也会感谢你。 现在我可以说声你好吗?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hello. Hello. I miss Max and think about him all week long. We talk about him at dinnertime.
lines.chinese: 你好。 你好。 我想念Max 一整个星期都在想他。 我们吃晚餐时总谈起他。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Will you please try to relax? I've never seen you so wound up.
lines.chinese: 能不能放轻松些? 我从来没有看过你如此紧张。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: You seem to be enjoying the pressure.
lines.chinese: 看起来好像很乐于承受压力。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: The truth is, I am. My job is not an easy one, but I really enjoy it.
lines.chinese: 事实上,我的确如此。 我的工作不轻, 但我确实乐在工作。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: That is exactly what I wanted to talk to you about, Susan.
lines.chinese: 这正是我想要跟你谈谈的,Susan 。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: What's the problem?
lines.chinese: 什么问题啦?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Marilyn's career.
lines.chinese: 的事业。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Well, my choice of careers.
lines.chinese: 是的,我的事业抉择问题。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Choice?
lines.chinese: 抉择?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: My career as a fashion designer versus my career as a mother.
lines.chinese: 我以时装设计为事业 或是以当个母亲为事业。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Why does it have to be one or the other?
lines.chinese: 为什么非得有这个就没有那个?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: That's what I said.
lines.chinese: 我也是这么说。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: How's that?
lines.chinese: 那怎么成呢?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Why can't you do both?
lines.chinese: 为什么不能两样一起?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: She's right.
lines.chinese: 她说得对。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Both?
lines.chinese: 一起?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Well, that's what I do. I have a job, and I have Michelle. I take care of both to the best of my ability. It's not easy, but what is?
lines.chinese: 是啊,我正是这么做的。 我有工作,我也有 Michelle。 我尽我所能把两方面都照顾好。 这不容易,但什么事又容易?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: And that's what I did. I did both with Richard and Susan, and I did both with Robbie.
lines.chinese: 我也这样做的。 有 Richard 和 Susan 时我这样, 有 Robbie 时我也这样做的。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I thought you stayed home with Robbie?
lines.chinese: 我还以为你是跟 Robbie呆在家里的?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I did. But I was lucky enough to have a career as a music teacher which I could continue at home.
lines.chinese: 是的。 但我很幸运拥有一个音乐教师的事业 可以在家中继续从事。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Why can't you work at home, Marilyn? You're very talented. Designing dresses is a career you could establish out of your home, couldn't you?
lines.chinese: 为什么不能在家中工作呢, Marilyn? 你非常有才华。 设计时装是一种职业 可以在家中开创, 不是吗?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I don't know why I didn't think of it. It seems so simple now.for a year or two I could stay at home with Max and do my dress designs.
lines.chinese: 我不知道为什么我没有想到这一点。 现在事情显得很简单了。 在一两年内 我可以和 Max 呆在家里从事我的服装设计。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: And you could make your dresses at home.
lines.chinese: 可以在家做衣服。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Sounds like a great way to solve the problem.
lines.chinese: 听起来好像是个解决问题的好办法。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: That could solve your problem, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 这样可以解决你的问题, Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm going to call rita Mae at home and ask her come by and talk about it. She want to see Max, anyway.
lines.chinese: 我会打电话到 Rita Mae 家 请她过来谈谈这件事。 毕竟她也想看 Max。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: I think that really answers your questions, Marilyn. You can do it.Do your designs at home-here.
lines.chinese: 我觉得这确实解决了你的问题, Marilyn。 你可以这样做。 在家里设计服装。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: And let Rita Mae do the selling at the boutique.
lines.chinese: 而让Rita Mae 在时装店负责销售。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: And you can both benefit financially.
lines.chinese: 你们俩都获得金钱上的利益。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm going to call Rita Mae right now. Oh, Susan, thank you so much for coming all this way form the city to talk to me about it. I hope you don't mind having taken so much time away from your busy schedule.
lines.chinese: 我现在就打电话给 Rita Mae。 噢, Susan,  谢谢你。 从城里大老远赶来和我谈这件事。 希望你不介意 我在你忙碌的生活中用了这么多时间。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Are you kidding? I don't mind at all. As a matter of fact, I came to spend some time with my favorite nephew.
lines.chinese: 你在开玩笑吗? 我一点也不介意。 事实上, 我来是为了和我心爱的侄儿相聚一些时间。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I think you should call Rita Mae right now. I think your idea of working at home is perfect.
lines.chinese: 我想你现在就打电话给 Rita Mae。 我觉得你在家里工作的主意太好了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I don't know what I would do without you. I'm lucky to have you all.
lines.chinese: 我真不知道没有你们我怎么办。 我真的觉得拥有你们很幸运。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: We are lucky to have you, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 拥有你是我们的幸运, Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: And so is Max.
lines.chinese: 也是 Max的幸运。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Hi, big guy.
lines.chinese: 嗨,好小子。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: That must be Rita Mae.
lines.chinese: 那一定是 Rita Mae。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: She sure got here quickly. That's a good sign. She must like you and your work, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 她来得真快。 这是个好兆头。 她一定是喜欢你和你的工作,Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I think she's just anxious to see Max. She loves children.
lines.chinese: 我觉得她只是急着想看看 Max。 她喜欢孩子。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Hi, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 嗨, Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Welcome. It's so nice of you to come.
lines.chinese: 欢迎。 你能来真好。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Oh, I just wanted to see your baby, Max.
lines.chinese: 噢,我只是想看看你的宝贝,Max。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Hello, Rita Mae.
lines.chinese: 哈, Rita Mae。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: I haven't seen you since the hospital.
lines.chinese: 自从医院相遇之后再也没有见到你。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I'm Ellen Stewart, Marilyn's mother-in-law.
lines.chinese: 我叫 Ellen Stewart, Marilyn 的婆婆。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: We met at the hospital. Hello. How are you?
lines.chinese: 我们在医院见过。 哈。 好吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I remember. How are you?
lines.chinese: 我记起来啦。 好吗?

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Oh, and there is Max! Oh! My, how he's grown! A little present for Max.
lines.chinese: 噢 ,Max 在那儿! 噢 !天啊 ,他长这么大 ! 给 Max 的一件小礼物。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Oh, it's beautiful, Rita Mae! You shouldn't have.
lines.chinese: 噢,太漂亮了, Rita Mae ! 不该这样破费的。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: It's nothing. It's just a little present for Max.
lines.chinese: 没什么。 这仅仅是给 Max 的一件小礼物。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Can I get you some coffee or tea a cold drink, Rita Mae?
lines.chinese: 要咖啡,茶或者冷饮吗,Rita Mae?

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Oh, nothing, thank you.
lines.chinese: 噢,什么也不要, 谢谢你。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, I will leave you two to talk. Come on, you big guy. Yes, come on. That's it. Eleln： It's nice seeing you. Let me know if you need anything.
lines.chinese: 嗯,我走开你们谈谈吧。 过来,  你这个好小子。 是的,  过来。 就这样。非常高兴见到你。 假如你需要什么就通知我。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Thanks, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 谢谢, Ellen。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Thanks, Ellen.
lines.chinese: 谢谢, Ellen。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: OK, Marilyn. You sounded like you've made a decision when you called me. I'm all ears.
lines.chinese: 好了, Marilyn。 你好像已经作了决定 当你打电话给我的时候。 我洗耳恭听。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I have made a decision, Rita Mae. I've decided to stay at home and be a full-time mother.
lines.chinese: 我已经做了决定，Rita Mae。 我决定留在家里做一个专职母亲。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: I'm disappointed, but I respect your decision. If I had a child as cute as Max, I might do the same thing.
lines.chinese: 我很失望,  但我尊重你的决定。 假如我有一个像 Max这样可爱的孩子, 我也可能会做同样的决定。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: But I haven't finished telling you the other half of my decision.
lines.chinese: 但我还没有对你说完 我这个决定的另一半。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: The other half?
lines.chinese: 另一半?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Yes. I think I can stay at home and take care of Max and continue my career.
lines.chinese: 是的。 我觉得我可以呆在家里 一面照顾孩子,  同时继续我的事业。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Sounds interesting. Let me hear it.
lines.chinese: 听起来很有趣。 说给我听听。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Do you remember our talks about custom-designed dresses for the boutique?
lines.chinese: 你记得 我们曾经谈过为时装店设计订制的服装?

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: I sure do.
lines.chinese: 我当然记得。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Why can't I design dresses for you here at home? And make them here. Have the fittings here, too.
lines.chinese: 为什么我不能在家里为你设计服装呢? 在这儿缝制。 也在这儿试穿。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: And I could do the selling and the pricing at the boutique.
lines.chinese: 而我在时装店负责销售和标价。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Exactly.
lines.chinese: 就是这样。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Oh! What kind of dresses would you design?
lines.chinese: 噢! 打算设计哪种服装?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I've thought about that for some time.
lines.chinese: 我已经想过一阵子了。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 真的?

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Wedding dresses.
lines.chinese: 结婚礼服。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Wedding dresses? Brilliant idea! There's a big market today in wedding dresses.
lines.chinese: 这个主意真棒! 结婚礼服在目前有很大的市场。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: That's what I thought.
lines.chinese: 我也是这样想的。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: I like the idea very much. And if it's successful, we can expand to all kinds dresses.
lines.chinese: 我很喜欢这个主意。 假如成功的话， 我们可以扩展到所有种类的服装。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: That's what I thought.
lines.chinese: 我也正这样想。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: As a matter of fact, I have a customer for your first wedding dress. My niece is getting married, and I've been trying to find just the right thing for her. Marilyn, you're going to design my niece's dress. That'll be our first one, and then we'll use it to sell others.
lines.chinese: 事实上, 我已经有了你的第一套结婚礼服的顾客。 我侄女即将结婚, 而我一直在为她找件合适的东西。 现在就靠你设计我侄女的结婚礼服。 这将成为我们的第一件, 然后我们再利用它来销售其他的顾客。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Do you really mean it?
lines.chinese: 说的可是当真?

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: I really mean it. It's a simple idea, and it will work. You can certainly design dresses. I know that. And there's no reason why you can't do it from your home.
lines.chinese: 当然是真的。 这主意很简单,而且一定可行。 你确实很能设计服装。 我知道。 而且也没有理由不可以在家里做事。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: I'm so excited! I can't wait to tell Richard!
lines.chinese: 我好兴奋! 我简直迫不及待想告诉 Richard!

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: If I had a baby like Max, I'd want to stay home and be near him all the time, too. You're making the right decision for Max and for yourself too, Marilyn.
lines.chinese: 假如我有一个像 Max 这样的宝贝, 我也要整天都在他身边。 你做了一个正确的决定。 为 Max,也为你自己, Marilyn。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: It all sounds so easy.
lines.chinese: 一切听起来竟是如此简单。

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: Now the hard work begins.
lines.chinese: 艰苦的工作现在开始了。

lines.speaker: Marilyn
lines.english: Would you like to see some of my designs that I've been working on?
lines.chinese: 你想不想 看我正在设计的一些服装?

lines.speaker: Rita Mae
lines.english: I'd love to . Ooh! Oh, that's wonderful! Ooh...
lines.chinese: 我想看。 噢!噢,太好了! 噢……

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Morning, Grandpa. Is something the matter, Grandpa?
lines.chinese: 早安,爷爷。 怎么了，爷爷？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: The editorial in this paper has my friend Nat Baker real upset. Ah! I'll read it to you. "The old library building on Chestnut Street, which has been vacant for over a year now, was supposed to be made into a community center to serve the senior citizens as well as the younger people of Riverdale. Due to lack of funds for the repainting of the interior of the building and for the furniture needed, the plans for the community center have been postponed indefinitely." He's coming over to talk about it.
lines.chinese: 这张报纸上的社论着实令我的朋友 Nat Baker不高兴。 啊！我来读给你听听。 街的老图书馆， 已空了一年多，原计划改成一座社区交谊中心 为 Riverdale的老年人 和年轻人服务。 由于缺乏经费 用来重新粉刷内部 和购买必需家具， 这项修建社区中心计划 被迫无限期延迟！” 他就是要来谈这个问题。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Is it tat serious a problem, Grandpa?
lines.chinese: 这个问题有那么重要吗，爷爷？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It is. Nat's not as lucky as I am, Robbie. He doesn't have any family with him. He lives alone and depends on places like a community center to be with people- people hi own age.
lines.chinese: 是的。 不像我这样幸运，Robbie。 他没有家人和他在一起。 他一个人生活 主要靠社区中心这样的地方 和别人交往。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: But there's the old community center on Elm Street.
lines.chinese: 但是在 Elm街有一个旧的社区中心。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's small, and the problem is that it's set up primarily for kids to play. Ping-Pong tables, soda machines, and lots of music. It's too noisy for some older people like Nat.
lines.chinese: 它小小的， 而问题是它主要是让孩子们去玩的。 乒乓球，汽水贩卖机，热闹的音乐。 它对于像Nat 这样的老人来说太吵了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I never realized that.
lines.chinese: 我从来没有意识到这点。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's hard for some older people to take all that noise. That's why the new community center is a good idea. Part of the building for older people, part of the building for younger people.
lines.chinese: 一些老年人没法忍受那些噪音。 这就是为什么新的社区中心是个好主意。 建筑物中的一些由老年人用， 另一部分给年轻人用。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I see what you mean.
lines.chinese: 我明白你的意思。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That must be Nat.
lines.chinese: 一定是Nat。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: It could be Alexandra. She's coming over this morning to help me with my math.
lines.chinese: 可能是 Alexandra  。 她今天早晨要来帮我补习数学。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Hi, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi, Alexandra. Come on in. Do you want something cold to drink? Axexandra： I'd love some cola, please.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Alexandra。请进。 想喝点什么凉的东西吗？请给我可乐。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Cola coming up. I really appreciate you coming over to help with my math. My final exam is next Tuesday.
lines.chinese: 可乐马上就来。 我真的很感谢你过来帮我补习数学。 期终考试就在下周二。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: You're so good in all your other subjects. I just can't understand why you have so many problems with math.
lines.chinese: 你别的功课都那样好。 我就不懂 为什么你在数学方面有那么多问题。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Hi, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Hi, Mr. Stewart.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Stewart  先生。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I thought that was Nat Baker who rang the front doorbell. Don't let me interrupt you.
lines.chinese: 我还以为是 Nat Baker按大门铃呢。 别让我打搅你们。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: No problem, Grandpa. We're just having some cola before getting to tough stuff- math.
lines.chinese: 没有关系，爷爷。 我们只是先喝点可乐 在对付难缠的数学之前。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: He'll do anything to avoid getting down to math lessons, Mr. Stewart.
lines.chinese: 他老是设法想逃避数学， 先生。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I was the same way.
lines.chinese: 我当年也是这样。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Really, Grandpa?
lines.chinese: 真的，爷爷？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Really. I didn't like math, I wasn't good at it, and I didn't like studying it.
lines.chinese: 真的。我不喜欢数学。 我不精于此道，也不爱去学它。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: But you had to be good at math. You graduated from engineering school.
lines.chinese: 但是你数学一科很好。 你是从工学院毕业的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I was. But not in high school. For some reason, I couldn't get a handle on it. Then, in college. I became good at it.
lines.chinese: 说的对。但高中时不好。 因为某些原因，我就是开不了窍。 然而，在大学，我变得很精于数学。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Then there's hope for Robbie.
lines.chinese: 看来Robbie 还有希望。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I can't wait. You think I can just skip it now and get to it at college?
lines.chinese: 我迫不及待。 你想我现在略过数学，等到上了大学再学可以吗？

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: You'll never get to college to find out, Robbie, if you skip it now.
lines.chinese: 你根本就进不了大学去探究这个问题的答案，Robbie， 假如你现在略过它的话。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That must be Nat.
lines.chinese: 这一定是 Nat。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Sit down, Robbie. Let's get to work.
lines.chinese: 坐下来，Robbie，  让我们开始做功课吧。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I'd like you to meet my friend Nat Baker. This is Alexandra Pappas, and this is my grandson Robbie, whom I think you've met once twice before.
lines.chinese: 我来向你们介绍我的朋友 Nat Baker。 这是 Alexandra Pappas，这是我孙子 Robbie， 我想你以前见过他一两次面。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Nice to meet you, Mr. Baker.
lines.chinese: 很高兴见到你，Baker先生。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi, Mr.Baker. We met before.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Baker先生。我们以前见过面。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: Where?
lines.chinese: 在哪？

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: In town. At the hardware store.
lines.chinese: 在镇上。在五金商店。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: I remember now. Right. Hi. Hello, Alexandra.
lines.chinese: 我现在想起来了。对了。嗨。 哈，Alexandra。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Don't let us keep you from your math tutoring. Robbie. I know you want to get to it.
lines.chinese: 别让我们打扰你的数学家教，Robbie。 我知道你想要开始啦。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Stay...stay.
lines.chinese: 再待一会儿…再一会儿。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I told you. He'll use any excuse to avoid math.
lines.chinese: 我说嘛，他就适且找各种藉口来逃避数学。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: Did you read the story in the paper, Malcolm?
lines.chinese: 你看到报纸上的新闻了吗，Malcolm？

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I did.
lines.chinese: 看到了。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: It's a serious matter for a lot of us. A serious matter.
lines.chinese: 对我们许多人来讲这可是个严重的问题。 一个严重的问题。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It is. Come on out to the patio. We'll talk about it out there.
lines.chinese: 的确如此。请到院子里来吧。 我们到外头谈。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: Thanks. Nice to meet you...again.
lines.chinese: 谢谢。很高兴再次…见到你。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: What's the problem?
lines.chinese: 是什么问题?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Come on? You'll hear about it.
lines.chinese: 来吧!你将听到。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: There is a way, Malcolm. We get our friends to roll their sleeves up and get to work.
lines.chinese: 有一个办法,Malcolm。 我们召集我们的朋友卷起袖子来做。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's certainly a good idea. If I could take a look at the place, I could probably tell what it requires to fix it up. How much paint, how many hours of work...
lines.chinese: 这的确是个好主意。 假如我能看看那个地方的话, 我大致能说出修理它需要些什么。多少油漆,  多少小时的工作量……

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: That's what I came to ask you to do, Malcolm.If you would supervise the refurbishing, I'll find the people to help do it.
lines.chinese: 这正是我来请你做的,Malcolm。 假如你能监督修理工作, 我可以找人来帮忙。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll help too, Mr.Baker. I can get some of my friends to go around the neighborhood and collect the furniture we need.
lines.chinese: 我也要帮忙,Baker先生。 我可以叫我的朋友们在这社区 募集我们需要的家具。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I'll help.
lines.chinese: 我也来帮忙。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Tomorrow. Yes. We'll meet tomorrow morning, right here.
lines.chinese: 明天。对。我们明天早晨会面,就在这儿。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Can we help?
lines.chinese: 我们可以帮忙吗?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: I'd really like to.
lines.chinese: 我真的希望你们可以。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Sure.
lines.chinese: 当然。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: We might need you to come through with your friends, Robbie. Not just to go around the neighborhood asking for furniture, but to help with the paint job. That's backbreaking work and may be too much for us.
lines.chinese: 我们也许需要你们多邀朋友来帮忙, Robbie。 不仅在这社区募集家具, 还要帮忙粉刷。 这可是累人的工作,我们可能负荷不了。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'll do it. I'll talk to them.
lines.chinese: 我来做。我去跟他们谈一谈。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: And tomorrow morning we'll all meet here to discuss the plan?
lines.chinese: 是不是明天早上我们都聚到这儿来讨论整修计划?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Come in, come in. Please, come in.
lines.chinese: 请进,请进。请进来。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: I'd like you to meet my friend Malcolm Stewart. Malcolm, this Joanne Thompson
lines.chinese: 我来为你介绍我的朋友 Malcolm Stewart。 这是 Joanne Thompson  。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Hello, Joanne. Nice to meet you.
lines.chinese: 好, Joanne  。很高兴见到你。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: My pleasure, Malcolm.
lines.chinese: 我也很荣幸,Malcolm。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: And this is Abe Lucas. You must remember Abe. He ran the drugstore and used to play drums with the jazz band on weekends.
lines.chinese: 这是Abe Lucas。你一定记得 Abe。 他经营药房 周末还经常在爵士乐队中击鼓。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Oh, sure I do. Hi, Abe.
lines.chinese: 噢,我当然记得。嗨,Abe。

lines.speaker: Abe
lines.english: Hello, Mr. Stewart.
lines.chinese: 哈, Stewart 先生。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Malcolm, please.
lines.chinese: 请叫我Malcolm吧。

lines.speaker: Abe
lines.english: Hello, Malcolm.
lines.chinese: 哈, Malcolm。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Sit down, sit down. Have some coffee. And I've got some delicious Danish pastry for you.
lines.chinese: 请坐,  请坐。喝点咖啡。 我为你们准备了一些可口的丹麦点心。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: Where's your grandson Robbie and his friend Alexandra? Weren't they going to be here this morning?
lines.chinese: 你的孙 Robbie 和他的朋友 Alexandra 呢? 他们不是今天早上要来这儿吗?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I thought so, too. I'm surprised they're not here. Robbie left early this morning to meet Alexandra. Frankly, I thought they'd be here, but...
lines.chinese: 我也这样想。 我奇怪他们怎么没来。 早上很早出去接 Alexandra。老实说,我原以为他们会在这儿,  但……

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: It's OK. I'm sure they meant well, but they probably had other things on their minds.
lines.chinese: 没有关系。我可以肯定说他们是有心帮忙, 但他们也许还有其他的事想要做。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: I understand you used to be in the construction business, Malcolm.
lines.chinese: 听说你过去从事建筑业,

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I was, indeed.
lines.chinese: 的确如此。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: I wonder if you would take a look at the old library and make sure that it is in good condition so that we don't have to worry about any structural problems.
lines.chinese: 我不知道你是否可以看一看旧图书馆 确定它状况良好 我们就可以不必担心任何结构上的问题。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: When can I do that? I'd be happy to.
lines.chinese: 我什么时候可以去看?  我很乐意做这项工作。

lines.speaker: Abe
lines.english: We've got permission to go inside the old building during the week-Tuesday or Wednesday.
lines.chinese: 我们已获准进那栋老建筑物 在本周内--- 星期二或者星期三。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That's fine with me. I can do it either day.
lines.chinese: 对我来说时间适合。两天哪一天我都可以。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: That would be very helpful.
lines.chinese: 你这样做帮忙很大。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: I think the building just needs a good cleaning.
lines.chinese: 我想那座建筑只需要好好地打扫一下。

lines.speaker: Abe
lines.english: And a good paint job.
lines.chinese: 还需要好好的粉刷。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: Then we have to furnish it.
lines.chinese: 然后我们还得加点摆设。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I wish Robbie and Alexandra had come to this meeting. They had some ideas about getting the place fixed up.
lines.chinese: 我真希望 Robbie 和 Alexandra 已经来参加开会。 他们对于怎么修复这个地方有何构想。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: Perhaps they'll show up. In the meantime, let me give you some additional thoughts and ideas I have.
lines.chinese: 也许他们会出现。在这等待期间, 让我提出一些额外的想法。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: OK.

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: Go ahead, Janne. Janne： As I said, mostly the building just needs a good cleaning.
lines.chinese: 请讲吧, Joanne。就像我先前所说,这栋建筑物大部份仅需要好好打扫一下。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: This place can be developed with one real intergenerational program.
lines.chinese: 我们可以拓展这个地方 用一套真正跨辈份的活动。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That's an idea I like. A community center with the kinds of programs that fit everyone.
lines.chinese: 我喜欢这样的创意。 一个社区中心 拥有适合任何人的活动。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: And programs that don't leave anyone out.
lines.chinese: 而且是些不排除任何人的活动。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: It's asking a lot. But we can't do it without talking to the young people. Finding out what they want.
lines.chinese: 那需要做许多操作。 但我们不能在没跟年轻人谈谈的情况下就去做。 得看看他们想要什么。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: If only Robbie and Alexandra were here.
lines.chinese: 要是 Robbie和 Alexandra在这儿多好。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: Don't be upset, Malcolm. We'll have a chance to talk to them later.
lines.chinese: 别懊恼了, Malcolm。 我们以后还有机会跟他们谈。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's not like Robbie. If he says he's going to be here, he's here. I wonder what the problem is.
lines.chinese: 这不像是 Robbie的作为。 假如他说他要来这儿,  他就一定会来。 我不知道发生了什么问题。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi, everyone. Sorry I'm late. But Alexandra and I have been busy at work this morning on the community-center project.And we brought someone along who can help. You remember Charles Maxwell, Grandpa? He's the editor of the Riverdale paper. He wrote some nice articles on Mom when she was running for the school board.
lines.chinese: 嗨,各位好。很抱歉我迟到了。 但 Alexandra 和我 一早上都在忙事情 为社区中心的计划。 而且我们带来一些可以帮助我们的人。 你记得 Charles Maxwell吗,  爷爷?他是 Riverdale报的编辑。 他写了一些介绍妈妈的好文章 在妈妈竞选校联合会董事席位时。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Yes, I remember. You were a great help.
lines.chinese: 是的,我记得。你帮了个大忙。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: Hi, Mr. Stewart. Hope to be a bigger help on the new community-center project. From what Robbie and Alexandra have told me, you people are making one big story.
lines.chinese: 嗨, Stewart 先生。 希望能在新社区计划这件事上提供更大的帮助。 从 Robbie和 Alexandra 告诉我的情况看来, 你们正在制造一件大新闻。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Let me introduce you, Mr. Maxwell. This is Nat Baker, who's responsible for this meeting, and this is Joanne Thompson-and Abe Lucas, who used to run the drugstore in town.
lines.chinese: 让我给你介绍一下,Maxwell 先生。 这是 Nat Baker, 他是这个会议的负责人,这是 Joanne Thompson----还有 Abe Lucas, 他过去在镇上经营药房。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: Robbie and Alexandra told me what you need to fix up the old library. I am planning to write an editorial that I think will help you.
lines.chinese: 和 Alexandra 告诉我 你们修复旧图书馆所需要的东西。 我计划写一篇报道我认为应该能帮助你们。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: Let's go. What are your questions?
lines.chinese: 我就进行吧。你们有哪些问题?

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: OK. Now, I have...first...a couple of questions here. Have you talked to the community council? And have you had an engineer come in to do an inspection?
lines.chinese: 好,现在,  我有……第一……几个问题。 你们跟社区的议会谈过了吗?你们可有一个工程师来做过检查吗?

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: OK, what do you need most of all?
lines.chinese: 好,你们最需要的是什么?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: People power. Men and women, young and old, to give us their time.
lines.chinese: 人力。 不管男女老幼,请他们贡献时间。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: To do what?
lines.chinese: 做什么呢?

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: To help scrub the building interior clean.
lines.chinese: 帮忙把建筑的内部擦洗干净。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: So that we can repaint it.
lines.chinese: 好让我们可以粉刷。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: And you also need bodies to do repainting?
lines.chinese: 你们也需要人来重新粉刷吗?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That's right. And we'll also need some ladders and some brushes and some paint.
lines.chinese: 是的。 而且我们还需要一些梯子 刷子和油漆。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: When do you need the volunteers, and where do they report?
lines.chinese: 你们什么时候需要义工, 他们去哪儿报到?

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I've got the council to agree to open the building for us on the next four weekends.
lines.chinese: 我已说服议会 在往后四个周开放那座建筑。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: How about furnishings? Are there any special requirements that I should list in the paper?
lines.chinese: 家具摆设怎么办? 有什么特别的要求要我列在报纸上的?

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: Yes. Here is a copy of all the things we need to start with.
lines.chinese: 是的。 这是我们一开始需要的所有东西的清单。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: Let's see. Four desks. Eight straight-back chairs. Thirty folding chairs. Six table lamps. Three end tables .One piano. This is a good start. These items shouldn't be difficult to come by once I print the article in the paper. This community has always been very generous.
lines.chinese: 我来看看。四张桌子。 八张直背椅。三十张折椅。 六盏灯。三张茶几。一架钢琴。 这是一个好的开始。 这些东西应该是不难弄到的 等我将这篇文张刊登在报纸上。 这个社区一向是非常慷慨的。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: I agree, Mr. Maxwell.
lines.chinese: 我有同感, Maxwell 先生。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: What you're saying is, in order for this center to succeed, we need to put together volunteers from the various generations of future users.
lines.chinese: 你刚才所说的是为了使中心能成功, 我们需要募集志愿者 从不同辈份的使用者中。

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: That's right.
lines.chinese: 是的。

lines.speaker: Nat
lines.english: And without their energy and stamina, there's no way we can complete this project.
lines.chinese: 没有他们的体力和耐力, 我们无法完成这项计划。

lines.speaker: Maxwell
lines.english: I've got it. Now give m some information about how you see the building being used.
lines.chinese: 我知道了。现在告诉我 你们计划如何使用这栋建筑。

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.english: Oh, here. On the ground floor we have the reception area...
lines.chinese: 噢,看这个。在底层我们会有一个接待区……

lines.speaker: Grandpa
lines.english: It's here, Robbie. Charles Maxwell lived up to his word. "At the Stewart family home on Linden street yesterday, a group of caring Riverdale citizens gathered to plan the refurbishing of the old library to transform it into a new community center. The original plan by the council was tabled because of lack for funds.The new plan needs you . You could call it a community unity plan. It needs your time, and it needs your energy. And it needs your contributions of furniture, paint, brushes, ladders, lamps, et cetera. A list of these items and a volunteer form can be picked up at the Riverdale Press offices. By working together, this community can do anything to benefit its citizens, and we know you will all work together towards refurbishing the old library and making it a new community center. Charles Maxwell, Editor."
lines.chinese: 就在这,Robbie。 兑现了他的诺言。 昨天在 Linden 街 Stewart 的家中, 一群热心公益活动的 Riverdale 的居民聚集在一起 计划重新整修旧图书馆 将它转变成一个新的社区中心。 议会原有的计划 因为缺乏经费而无限期地搁置。 这项新计划需要你的协助。 你可以称它为社区团结计划。它需要你的时间,需要你的力气。 而且也需要贡献你的家具, 油漆,刷子,梯子,灯等等。 这些物品的清单和义工申请表格 可以到Riverdale Press各办事处索取。 透过共同工作, 这个社区可做任何造福居民的事情， 我们相信各位会共同出力 去重新整修老图书馆 使它成为一个新的社区中心。 编辑，Charles Maxwell。”

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi, Mom.
lines.chinese: 嗨,  妈妈。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Hi, Robbie You're home from school early.
lines.chinese: 嗨，Robbie。 你今天从学校回来得很早。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yeah, they're getting the assembly hall ready for the graduation ceremony, so we all got to go homeearly. Too noisy to study.
lines.chinese: 是啊，他们在布置大礼堂 为毕业典礼做准备， 所以我们都非得早回家不可。 太吵了书看不下去。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, now that you're here, you can help me with dinner. I need those potatoes peeled and sliced.
lines.chinese: 嗯，既然你回来了， 你就来帮我准备晚餐。 那些马铃薯需要剥皮切片。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Mom, give me a break Alexandra's coming over to help me study for my math final.
lines.chinese: 妈，让我喘口气。 就要来帮我 温习数学准备期末考试。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, in that case, you can wash the dishes and clean up after dinner.
lines.chinese: 嗯，既然这样， 你就在晚餐后洗盘子，收拾桌子。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Can I invite Alexandra to stay for dinner?
lines.chinese: 我可以请 Alexandra 留下来吃晚餐吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Of course.
lines.chinese: 当然可以。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Mom.
lines.chinese: 谢谢,妈。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: You an Alexandra have become good friends, haven't you?
lines.chinese: 你和 Alexandra 成了好朋友,不是吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes. I like her.She's a terrific person. I'm going to miss her when she goes back to Greece.
lines.chinese: 是的,我喜欢她。 她人很好。 我会想念她 当她回去希腊时。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Would you like to give her a little farewell party?
lines.chinese: 你要不要为她举行一个饯行派对?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Mom, that would be terrific! Maybe we could make it a surprise.
lines.chinese: 那太棒了,妈! 也许我们可以让它变成一个惊喜。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Oh, I don't know. Surprise parties don't always work out.
lines.chinese: 噢,这个我就不知道了。 惊喜派对不是每次都能成功的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, we could tell her it's a graduation party for me. When Alexandra arrives, we'll surprise her.
lines.chinese: 嗯,我们可以告诉她 这是为我毕业所办的派对。 等 Alexandra到达时, 我们再让她惊喜一下。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Well, I suppose that might work.
lines.chinese: 嗯,我想这样或许可以奏效。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'd like to give her a nice going-away present.
lines.chinese: 我很想送给她一件好的离别礼物。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Fine.
lines.chinese: 好啊。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: There's only one problem.
lines.chinese: 只有一个问题。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: What's that?
lines.chinese: 什么问题?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I'm broke. I should have saved some money.
lines.chinese: 我身无分文。 我早该存些钱。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I'm sure Alexandra would be happy with something simple, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 我相信Alexandra 会欣然接受简单的东西, Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I know. But, well, I'd like to give her something nice to remember me by. Maybe I could borrow some money from you and Dad.
lines.chinese: 我知道。 但是,嗯, 我想给她一件精美的礼物 让她看到东西就想到我。 也许你从你爸爸那儿可以借点钱。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: It's all right with me if it's all right with your dad.
lines.chinese: 我没有问题 假如你爸爸答应的话。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Mom. I'll talk to him. Is he still in his office?
lines.chinese: 谢谢,妈。 我会去跟他谈谈。 他还在办公室吗?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: I think so.
lines.chinese: 我想是的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Mom.
lines.chinese: 谢谢,妈。

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.english: Robbie! Good luck!
lines.chinese: 祝你好运!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Here are the X-rays you wanted , Dr. Stewart.
lines.chinese: 这是你要的 X光片, Stewart 医师。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Oh. Thank you, Molly. Now, let me check them.
lines.chinese: 噢,  谢谢你, Molly。 现在,让我来看一看。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: What do you think?
lines.chinese: 你看怎么样?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: I don't see any breaks or fractures. Well, well. Thank you, Molly.
lines.chinese: 我看不出有任何破裂或骨折。 还好,还好。谢谢你，Molly。

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.english: Thank you.
lines.chinese: 谢谢你。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Come in! Hi, Son.
lines.chinese: 进来! 嗨,儿子。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hi, Dad. Am I interrupting you?
lines.chinese: 嗨,爸爸。我打搅了你?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: No, no, no, no,. What's up?
lines.chinese: 不,不,不,不。 什么事?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Can we talk?
lines.chinese: 我们能谈谈吗?”

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Sure.
lines.chinese: 当然可以。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I need some help.
lines.chinese: 我需要帮助。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, that's what fathers are for.
lines.chinese: 嗯,父亲们的功用正在于此。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, before I go to college, I have the whole summer...
lines.chinese: 嗯,在我进大学之前, 我有一整个暑假可以用……

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Yes...
lines.chinese: 对呀……

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And I'm planning to get a job for the summer.
lines.chinese: 我想在暑假打工。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: And What sort of job?
lines.chinese: 哪一类的工作?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I applied for a job as a lifeguard at the community pool.
lines.chinese: 我申请了社区游泳池当救生员工作。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Sounds pretty good.
lines.chinese: 听起来不错。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes. I'll be earning pretty good money if I get it. But right now, I'm kind of short of cash.
lines.chinese: 是的。假如我得到这份工作的话我可以赚不少钱。 但现在,我手头很紧。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Who isn't?
lines.chinese: 有谁不紧?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And my friend Alexandra is going to Greece...
lines.chinese: 我的朋友 Alexandra 就要回希腊去了…

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Nice girl. We'll all miss her.
lines.chinese: 好女孩。 我们都会想念她的。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Mom says we can her a going-away surprise party.
lines.chinese: 妈妈说我们可以给她举行一个让她惊喜的欢送派对。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Good idea.
lines.chinese: 好主意。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: And I'd like to get her a nice gift...
lines.chinese: 我还想给她一份精美的礼物……

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: What'd you have in mind?
lines.chinese: 你心里有什么计划?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, a wristwatch, so she'll think of me when she looks at the time. Nothing flashy or expensive. Something simple-but a good one.
lines.chinese: 嗯,一个手表, 这样当她看时间的时候想起我。 不是什么俗丽的或贵的。 要简单的---但要精采。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Sounds fine, Robbie.
lines.chinese: 听起来不错, Robbie。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Well, I saw a nice watch. But I'll need a loan. If you could lend me the money, I could pay you back out of my lifeguard salary.
lines.chinese: 嗯,  我已看中了一个不错的手表。 但我需要借钱。 假如你能借钱给我的, 我可以从我当救生员的收入拿出来还你。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: Well, I guess your mother and I can manage it. When do you need the money?
lines.chinese: 嗯,我想你妈和我可以设法帮这个忙。 你什么时候需要钱?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Would tomorrow be OK?
lines.chinese: 明天可以吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You've got it.
lines.chinese: 没问题。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Thanks, Dad.
lines.chinese: 谢谢,  爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: My pleasure, Son. Oh, and, Robbie...
lines.chinese: 不客气,  儿子。 噢,  还有, Robbie…

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Yes?
lines.chinese: 什么?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You'll probably want the family car so you can drive her home after the party.
lines.chinese: 你也许需要用家里的车 在派对结束后送她回家。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Could I?
lines.chinese: 我可以用吗?

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: If you drive carefully.
lines.chinese: 只要你小心驾驶。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: I will. Thanks, Dad.
lines.chinese: 我会小心的。谢谢你,爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: My pleasure.
lines.chinese: 不客气。

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You're OK, Dad.
lines.chinese: 你很好, 爸爸。

lines.speaker: Philip
lines.english: You're not so bad yourself, Son.
lines.chinese: 你自己也不错,  儿子。

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: You ready for the next problem?
lines.chinese: 你准备好做下一道题吗?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: You know what? I can't look at another number. How about a lemonade break?
lines.chinese: 知道吗? 我简直一个数字也看不进去了。 休息一下喝点柠檬水?

lines.speaker: Alexandra
lines.english: Sure.
lines.chinese: 当然可以。
